programme.title: Edge of Alaska

programme.title: Speed of Life

programme.title: My Cat from Hell

programme.title: Treehouse Masters

programme.desc: Pete builds an all-star speakeasy for basketball legend Shaquille ONeal, creating a decagonal structure with soaring ceilings and extra-wide stairs

programme.title: Meet the Superbrains
programme.desc: Two teams of scientists demonstrate why electricity could help end humanitys reliance on fossil fuels, and build an electric speedboat and plane to prove their point

programme.title: How Do Animals Do That?
programme.desc: Animal facts, including why cows are always chewing, the reason rattlesnakes release their prey and what is the loudest creature on earth. Plus, the sensitive side of rhinos

programme.title: How Do Animals Do That?
programme.desc: The experts reveal why dogs bury bones, whether elephants can detect bombs, who birds sing in the morning and what makes seahorses almost indestructible

programme.title: Extinct or Alive
programme.desc: Forrest Galante returns to his childhood home in Zimbabwe searching for the extinct Cape lion after numerous sightings of a similar size lion with a black mane

programme.title: Alaska Gold Diggers
programme.desc: A power struggle erupts in Gold Run between SJ and John over mining locations - and there seems to be no easy solution for them to set their differences aside

programme.title: Tanked
programme.desc: Wayde King and Brett Raymer construct a tank for a communications company in need of an interactive aquarium, shaped like a giant telephone

programme.title: Tanked
programme.desc: The duo are asked to create a pipeline water tank, and also a smoker aquarium for the Rolling Smoke BBQ

programme.title: Fish or Die

programme.title: Edge of Alaska
programme.desc: The hidden city inside the mountain is within reach, but exploration means convincing locals for help, and the trailblazing ranchers are in danger

programme.title: The Haunted
programme.desc: How the alleged spirit of a man who was murdered in the basement of Al and Marias restaurant is terrorising their pet dogs. Stories of paranormal events

programme.title: Million Dollar Duck
programme.desc: The weird world of the Federal Duck Stamp Contest, in which artists paint waterfowl in their obsessive quests to win what has been described as the Olympics of wildlife art

programme.title: How Do Animals Do That?
programme.desc: Do mosquitos prefer the taste of some people over others? How can snakes hear if they have no ears? How do millions of birds fly as one?

programme.title: My Cat from Hell
programme.desc: Sandy and Phil were happily married until they adopted their cat Woody. Now the couple are convinced that Woody is evil enough to kill their other cat, Pirate

programme.title: Crikey! Its the Irwins
programme.desc: Terri, Bindi and Robert prepare Croc One, Steve Irwins research ship, for a special mission to release an endangered sea turtle back into the wild

programme.title: Lone Star Law
programme.desc: A team of special Texas Game Wardens spends a week on a floating cabin to stop drug-smuggling operations across the border

programme.title: Dr Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet
programme.sub-title: The Dog Who Won Jeffs Heart
programme.desc: A client brings in an unusual pet who is fast outgrowing his enclosure. Dr Jeff treats a cat with several serious - and mysterious - injuries

programme.title: Dr Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet
programme.desc: Dr Jeff performs a risky operation to save a puppys leg - but whether the pooch will walk again is another matter. Plus, an abandoned cats x-ray tells a shocking story

programme.title: Pit Bulls and Parolees
programme.desc: During the pandemic, Tia and Mariah must shut down their restaurant and boutique. Meanwhile, a Villalobos senior canine veteran finally finds a forever home

programme.title: My Cat from Hell
programme.desc: Behaviourist Jackson Galaxy helps a couple struggling to cope with their feuding felines

programme.title: My Cat from Hell
programme.desc: Behaviourist Jackson Galaxy deals with a deaf and blind cat that has stopped using its litter box and become violent towards its owners

programme.title: Treehouse Masters
programme.desc: Treehouse visionary Alain Laurens joins Pete on his travels through France, where he shares his fantastical structures that redefine what a treehouse can be

programme.title: Meet the Orangutans
programme.desc: The orphaned orangutan Peanut is one of the newest and youngest arrivals at the sanctuary. He has made friends with Beryl, but he is not feeling very well

programme.title: Meet the Orangutans
programme.desc: The orphans are learning how to make important relationships. Mui Mui and Anne have become inseparable, but now Anne is pregnant, and she needs to be separated

programme.title: How Do Animals Do That?
programme.desc: Amazing animal facts, including how sea turtles navigate their way home, why sloths turn green and how diving beetles spend so long underwater

programme.title: How Do Animals Do That?
programme.desc: Do mosquitos prefer the taste of some people over others? How can snakes hear if they have no ears? How do millions of birds fly as one?

programme.title: Little Giants
programme.desc: In the Mexican desert, Bradley Trevor Greive and Billy Almon track down and test the almost supernatural abilities of the giant horned lizard

programme.title: Little Giants
programme.desc: The team scours the Sonoran Desert for North Americas carnivorous grasshopper mouse. Its bite and vertical leap turn it into a vicious scorpion killer at night

programme.title: Alaska Gold Diggers
programme.desc: The team is on a roll at Gold Run, and things are beginning to look up. But everyone is forced to evacuate the camp when freezing winter storms approach

programme.title: Tanked
programme.desc: The brothers-in-law team up with a company to build a one-of-a-kind table tank for a Las Vegas trade show. Later, they create a replica crabbing boat aquarium

programme.title: Tanked
programme.desc: The brothers-in-law are approached by sea life painter Guy Harvey to build their largest tank to date for a resort in St Pete Beach, Florida

programme.title: Alaska: Homestead Rescue
programme.desc: Amputee Jeff and wife Carol want a liveable home, water, and a place to grow food. Elsewhere, the Raneys build an entire cabin from scratch and harness a natural spring

programme.title: Shark Bait
programme.desc: Documentary in which Dr Greg Skomal and his team head to Cape Cod to examine the the territorial struggle between seals and great white sharks

programme.title: The Haunted
programme.desc: A mother worries that her daughters ghost hunting has attracted paranormal trouble when she hears strange noises coming from the basement and their pets turn violent

programme.title: Shark Lockdown
programme.desc: During Covid-19, researchers build a self-propelled cage to examine changing hunting patterns of female great white sharks in the waters off New Zealand

programme.title: How Do Animals Do That?
programme.desc: How can a fish fly the length of three football fields? Can a spider be adorable? Whats the real story behind a flamingos colour?

programme.title: Dusty
programme.desc: Dusty Springfield hosts the entertainment showcase, with her backing band of Madeline Bell, Lesley Duncan and Barbara Moore, while the guests areAmerican vocal quartet the Four Freshmen. First shown in September 1966

programme.title: Genius of the Ancient World
programme.desc: Historian Bettany Hughes investigates the ideas of ancient philosophers, starting with the Indian nobleman Siddhartha Gautama, more popularly known as Buddha. Thought to have been lived and tought between the sixth and fourth centuries BC, the sage and holy man inspired a diverse belief system that influences the lives of millions of people to this day. She travels to India, where the Buddha experienced the challenging ideas and extreme methods of wandering truth seekers, after he had abandoned his family and homeland in the Himalayas to embark on his philosophical quest to find a solution to human suffering

programme.title: Top of the Pops
programme.desc: Simon Bates presents an edition first broadcast on May 6 1982, featuring appearances from the Scottish and English World Cup Squads, BA Robertson, Chas and Dave, Junior, Patrice Rushen, Depeche Mode, Tight Fit, Bananarama and Fun Boy Three, and Paul McCartney and Stevie Wonder. Plus, a dance performance by Zoo

programme.title: Top of the Pops
programme.desc: Andy Crane and Jenny Powell host the edition first shown on May 5, featuring performances by Edelweiss, Midnight Oil, Debbie Gibson, Bon Jovi, Roxette, Kylie Minogue, Poison, Live Report, Bangles and Chaka Khan

programme.title: Whitney at the BBC
programme.desc: Celebrating one of one of soul musics biggest-ever voices with a selection of her songs, illustrating why the world sat up and listened when Whitney Houston burst onto the scene in 1985 with Saving All My Love for You. This playlist traverses the 1980s, 90s and 00s, including Saving All My Love for You, Where Do Broken Hearts Go, How Will I Know and Your Love Is My Love

programme.title: The Good Old Days
programme.desc: A 1976 edition filmed at the Varieties Theatre Leeds, in which chairman Leonard Sachs introduces old-time cabaret performances featuring Edward Woodward, Larry Grayson, Frank Carson, Margaret Savage, Sheila Mathews, Ted Durante and Hilda, Peter Gale and Albert Aldred

programme.title: Dusty
programme.desc: Dusty Springfield hosts the entertainment showcase, with her backing band of Madeline Bell, Lesley Duncan and Barbara Moore, while the guests areAmerican vocal quartet the Four Freshmen. First shown in September 1966

programme.title: Hetty Wainthropp Investigates
programme.desc: When her nieces son is charged with possession of an ecstasy tablet, suspicions remain that he has been framed, so Hetty goes undercover in his school as a cafeteria worker to clear his name. Patricia Routledge stars

programme.title: The Count of Monte Cristo
programme.desc: Embedded in Parisian high society, Edmond methodically destroys those who betrayed him, only to discover that vengeance threatens to consume the innocent along with the guilty. Adaptation of Alexandre Dumas adventure, starring Pierre Niney. In French

programme.title: The Count of Monte Cristo
programme.desc: As his plans reach their end, Edmond must choose between revenge and mercy, confronting the cost of becoming the man he set out to be. Adaptation of Alexandre Dumas adventure, starring Pierre Niney. In French

programme.title: Keeping Up Appearances
programme.desc: Hyacinth is thrown into dismay when her beloved father goes to the register office to be married, and things go from bad to worse when her neighbour Emmett comes face to face with her uncouth relatives, Daisy, Onslow and Rose

programme.title: Sorry!
programme.desc: Timothy escapes his mothers attentions for the first time in his life, but becomes unaccountably jealous when cousin Brinsley wins her favour. Ronnie Corbett stars

programme.title: Talking Pictures
programme.desc: A look back at the career of the Oscar-winning actor through interviews conducted with the BBC. Hopkins talks about his approach to acting, his years as a hellraiser, and the films that helped make him a star, including Remains of the Day, Shadowlands, Nixon, and The Silence of the Lambs, in which he first portrayed his most celebrated character, Dr Hannibal Lecter. Sylvia Syms narrates

programme.title: Dance Passion Swansea
programme.desc: World-class dancers perform throughout the city of Swansea, such as the Ballet Cymru, who give Dance of the Knights from Prokofievs Romeo and Juliet a uniquely Welsh take. Freelance dancer and choreographer Joe Powell-Main performs a solo piece, incorporating Latin and ballroom with a twist. This programme also features a recital of Dylan Thomas Fern Hill, narrated by Cerys Matthews

programme.title: Hetty Wainthropp Investigates
programme.desc: When her nieces son is charged with possession of an ecstasy tablet, suspicions remain that he has been framed, so Hetty goes undercover in his school as a cafeteria worker to clear his name. Patricia Routledge stars

programme.title: The Good Old Days
programme.desc: A 1976 edition filmed at the Varieties Theatre Leeds, in which chairman Leonard Sachs introduces old-time cabaret performances featuring Edward Woodward, Larry Grayson, Frank Carson, Margaret Savage, Sheila Mathews, Ted Durante and Hilda, Peter Gale and Albert Aldred

programme.title: Planet Earth III
programme.sub-title: Planet Earth III: Wonders of Nature
programme.desc: David Attenborough presents a compilation of highlights from the natural history documentary. In the Namib Desert, a pair of ostriches raise their family in the searing heat to keep them safe from predators - but time is ticking as the chicks begin to hatch. In the cold waters of North America, a little horn shark stumbles into an ambush set by an angel shark - but the potential victim has a secret weapon. In Botswana, newly hatched lily-trotter chicks learn how to walk on water, and in Bali, long-tailed macaques steal tourists valuable items - which they use to barter with staff for food

programme.title: David Attenborough: A Life on Air
programme.desc: In 1952, David Attenborough was turned down for a job with BBC radio, only to end up working for the corporations fledgling TV service - eventually becoming director of programmes. Since then he has become one of the most respected wildlife film-makers in the business, fronting classic series such as Life on Earth, The Blue Planet and Planet Earth. He talks to Michael Palin about his time at the corporation. First broadcast in 2002

programme.title: Life on Earth
programme.desc: The first episode of the landmark natural history series, with David Attenborough exploring the wildlife and landscape that inspired Charles Darwins theory of evolution. First broadcast in 1979

programme.title: Natural World
programme.desc: Documentary following two tigers released into the wild to breed, where they must fight leopards for territory, learn to hunt boar and try to avoid being killed by poachers

programme.title: The Magic of Dance with Margot Fonteyn
programme.desc: Margot travels to Tchaikovskys house near Moscow, meeting Marie Rambert to discuss the life and legacy of Sergei Diaghilev, the founder of the Ballets Russes. The programme includes footage of Anna Pavlova, as well as Mikhal Baryshnikov dancing Petrushka

programme.title: Omnibus
programme.desc: A 1995 edition of the show looking at how the pairs musicals were made, featuring anecdotes from Rogers and clips from Astaires last TV interview

programme.title: Puttin on the Ritz: The Genius of Fred Astaire
programme.desc: A short compilation of clips from actor and dancer Fred Astaires days at RKO studios, where he formed an unforgettable partnership with Ginger Rogers

programme.title: An Art Lovers Guide
programme.desc: Janina Ramirez and Alastair Sooke embark on more cultural city breaks, beginning by heading to the Portuguese capital to see what it has to offer. From a spectacular monument to the maritime globetrotting of Portugals golden age and the work of a photographer documenting the citys large African population, they discover a complex history of former glories and a darker, slave-trading past

programme.title: Planet Earth III
programme.sub-title: Planet Earth III: Wonders of Nature
programme.desc: David Attenborough presents a compilation of highlights from the natural history documentary. In the Namib Desert, a pair of ostriches raise their family in the searing heat to keep them safe from predators - but time is ticking as the chicks begin to hatch. In the cold waters of North America, a little horn shark stumbles into an ambush set by an angel shark - but the potential victim has a secret weapon. programme.title: Saturday Kitchen Live
programme.desc: Matt Tebbutt is joined by chefs Anna Haugh and John Javier, and special guest Tim Minchin. Helen McGinn picks the drinks to go with the studio dishes

programme.title: Flaming Feasts
programme.desc: Chris Roberts heads to Porthmadog, a town where rugged mountains meet the sea and bold Welsh flavours meet global influence. He starts at the restaurant Nomi, where husband and wife Kartik and Nomi blend local produce with classic Indian flavours. He also ventures into the woods with mushroom forager Cynan, and enjoys a flame-seared venison feast at the Portmeirion Hotel

programme.title: Football Focus
programme.desc: Alex Scott looks ahead to the weekends matches, including Manchester City v Brentford and West Ham United v Arsenal, plus Tottenham Hotspur v Leeds United on Monday night

programme.title: Live Challenge Cup Rugby League
programme.desc: St Helens v Wigan Warriors (Kick-off 2.30pm). All the action from the semi-final at Halliwell Jones Stadium in Warrington. The last of the Saints 13 triumphs in this competition came in 2021 and they were impressive in the quarter-finals, comfortably defeating Catalans Dragons 36-4. Wigan are looking to regain the trophy they lifted for a record-extending 21st time in 2024 and claimed a hard-fought 26-22 away win against Wakefield Trinity in the last eight

programme.title: Final Score
programme.desc: Jason Mohammad presents a round-up of the results and this afternoons news from the Premier League, Scottish Premiership, and play-off matches in England and Scotland

programme.title: Celebrity Bridge of Lies
programme.desc: Ross Kemp presents the high stakes quiz. Actor Charlie Brooks, Dr Amir Khan, presenter Sara Damergi and comedian Tim Vine must cross the Bridge by stepping on the truths and avoiding the lies, earning money for the charity of their choice with each correct answer

programme.title: Blankety Blank
programme.desc: Bradley Walsh hosts the comedy quiz show in which a panel of six celebrities fill in the missing blanks and help win some brilliant prizes for some very lucky contestants. This week, he is joined by Julian Clary, Sophie Willan, Harry Pinero, Liza Tarbuck, Judi Love and Tom Allen

programme.title: Michael McIntyres Big Show
programme.desc: Joe Lycett hands over his phone for a Send to All with serious consequences, James Arthur performs a track from his latest album, and Michael takes The Wheel on the road to surprise a family in Hull. Plus, an incredibly deserving Unexpected Star of the Show shares the stage with a mystery guest

programme.title: The Weakest Link
programme.desc: Romesh Ranganathan is joined by contestants Barry McGuigan, Karen Hauer, Joe Thomas, Elaine C Smith, Tomasz Schafernaker, Vikkstar, Katie Thistleton and Shivi Ramoutar. They must initially work together to answer general knowledge questions and bank as much money as possible for their chosen charities, before voting off round by round

programme.title: Casualty
programme.desc: Teddy and the team rally to respond to what is assumed to be a gas explosion, while Matty risks his career to cover for Stevie, who is attempting to get by without medication. Cam is devastated when he loses a patient, Flynn is suspicious about a patients injuries, and Siobhan encourages Jan to speak to the police about the call centre hold-up

programme.title: Not Going Out
programme.desc: When Lee uses his collection of free discount vouchers to stay overnight in a mid-range hotel, he makes sure that he takes advantage of all the hotels complimentary services. Unfortunately, the packet of peanuts that he consumes from the minibar is not free, but hes damned if hes going to pay for it. Comedy, starring Lee Mack and Sally Bretton

programme.desc: A round-up of the latest headlines

programme.title: Match of the Day
programme.desc: Highlights of the latest Premier League matches, including Manchester City v Brentford at Etihad Stadium, and Liverpool v Chelsea at Anfield. The Citizens had already registered two victories over the Bees in the league and Carabao Cup this term, and were hoping for a third as they continue their quest for a ninth Premier League title, and a seventh in nine years. Meanwhile, the Reds were looking to take advantage of another period of instability for the Blues who have seen two head coach departures in this campaign. Plus, action from Brighton and Hove Albion v Wolverhampton Wanderers, Fulham v Bournemouth, and Sunderland v Manchester United

programme.title: The Football Interview
programme.desc: Kelly Somers talks to Chelsea and England full-back Lucy Bronze, who discusses winning Euro 2025 with the Lionesses and playing the entire tournament with a fractured leg

programme.title: Road House (1989)
programme.desc: A philosophy-reading kung fu expert gains a reputation as the best bouncer around, and is hired by the owner of a rowdy Missouri bar to keep the peace. When he fires some of the establishments corrupt staff, he incurs the wrath of a local crime boss who has a stranglehold on the towns businesses. Action thriller, starring Patrick Swayze, Ben Gazzara, Kelly Lynch, Sam Elliott and blues singer Jeff Healey

programme.title: Bargain Hunt

programme.title: Escape to the Country
programme.desc: Nicki Chapmans buyers are renting in the countryside of Herefordshire, but they need her help to find them a house of their own that comes with enough land for a holiday let. Watch out for a surprise visit from another of the shows presenters, who also famously lives in the county

programme.desc: A look ahead to the latest forecast

programme.title: Songs of Praise
programme.desc: Sean Fletcher visits the historic city of Lincoln to explore its faith and worship music, including a thriving network of churches with a total congregation of over 2,000 people

programme.title: Points of View
programme.desc: Viewers opinions on BBC shows and behind-the-scenes reports on new programmes

programme.title: Despicable Me 3 (2017)
programme.desc: Dismissed from the Anti-Villain League after botching a mission, Gru sets off to meet his long-lost twin brother for one final criminal mission. Animated sequel, with the voices of Steve Carell, Kristen Wiig, Trey Parker and Miranda Cosgrove

programme.title: Secret Garden
programme.desc: David Attenborough reveals how a remote garden on Scotlands west coast has become an oasis for barn owls and pine martens as they battle the elements. During the brief summer, crossbills pry seeds from the cones in specially planted Scots pine trees, house martins raise their chicks, reptiles are finally warm enough to breed, and carnivorous sundews trap insects in a specially created bog garden

programme.title: BBC News
programme.desc: A round-up of the latest headlines

programme.title: Weather
programme.desc: The latest forecast

programme.title: Wild London
programme.desc: Having lived in London for 75 years, David Attenborough shares his intimate knowledge of the citys natural history. London is considered the greenest city in the world with a surprising variety of animal dramas playing out in the most unexpected places - whether its pigeons commuting by the Tube, snakes slithering along Regents canal, parakeets raiding city parks or beavers building a home next to a busy shopping centre. The veteran naturalist celebrates the extraordinary ways animals adapt to survive in the urban jungle and the inspiring initiatives to encourage nature back into the city

programme.title: Countryfile
programme.desc: Charlotte Smith and Adam Henson visit Oswestry Livestock Market, one of the regions largest weekly cattle and sheep markets. As spring trading peaks, they step into a fast-moving world where fortunes can change in minutes. With livestock numbers falling and markets closing nationwide, Oswestry remains a crucial lifeline, not just for trade, but for farming communities to come together

programme.title: British Academy Television Awards
programme.desc: Greg Davies hosts the annual ceremony from the Southbank Centres Royal Festival Hall. Dramas hoping to win include Blue Lights, Code of Silence, This City Is Ours, A Thousand Blows, I Fought the Law, Trespasses, What it Feels Like for a Girl and Adolescence, while the acting categories see Aimee Lou Wood and Erin Doherty going up against each twice, in both the leading and supporting actress categories

programme.title: The Cage
programme.desc: Matty flails as Ning continues to push him. Meanwhile, Leanne and Gary bond, until he pressures her to betray Matty to safeguard her family

programme.title: Bikes!
programme.desc: Stephen Watson presents from the second day of the annual motorcycle event on a nine-mile course running between Portstewart, Coleraine and Portrush, featuring the Supertwin/Sportbike, Superbike and Supersport races

programme.title: Match of the Day
programme.desc: Highlights of the latest Premier League matches, including West Ham United v Arsenal at London Stadium and Burnley v Aston Villa at Turf Moor. The relegation-threatened Hammers took on their title-chasing London rivals, and the Villans continued their bid to secure Champions League football against a Burnley side already resigned to playing in the Championship next term. Plus, Crystal Palace v Everton and Nottingham Forest v Newcastle United

programme.title: Have I Got News for You
programme.desc: Steph McGovern hosts, with guest panellists comedian Jon Richardson and actress Sheila Hancock joining team captains Paul Merton and Ian Hislop as they delve into the weeks news

programme.title: BBC News
programme.desc: A round-up of the latest headlines

programme.title: Two Pints of Lager and a Packet of Crisps
programme.desc: Louise becomes desperate to move in with Janet, but is repeatedly rebuffed, and tries to persuade her by contacting the spirit of Jonny in a suspicious seance. Donna comes to the conclusion that her slightly camp boss Tim is homosexual, even though he is happily married with children, and resolves to help him come out of the closet

programme.title: Attenboroughs Birds of Paradise
programme.desc: Among David Attenboroughs life-long passions are birds of paradise, which he has tracked all over the jungles of New Guinea to film their beautiful and often bizarre displays. In this documentary, he examines how and why these creatures have captivated explorers, naturalists, artists, film-makers and even royalty, investigating the myths surrounding their discovery 500 years ago, the latest extraordinary behaviour captured on camera and the science behind their beauty. He also travels to a state-of-the art facility in Qatar that houses the largest breeding group of these birds in the world

programme.title: Paranormal: Britains Last Witch
programme.desc: Disturbed by a recording of what appears to be a spirit voice and accounts of the late medium Helen Duncan summoning physical spirit forms, Sian Eleri focuses on evidence from those who believe this apparent seance to be fake. Searching for answers and hoping to understand how Helen was convincing people they were communicating with their dead loved ones, Sian tracks down a modern-day medium. He claims to commune with the other side, but a seance in Edinburgh leaves Sian with more questions than she first started with

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson spares no expense when he tests the BMW X6. James May joins Margaret Calvert, one of Britains road-sign designers, to test-drive the Vauxhall Insignia VXR, and Richard Hammond tries out a £340,000 Lexus supercar. Blues musician Seasick Steve is the Star in a Reasonably Priced Car

programme.title: Doctor Who
programme.desc: The Time Lord finds himself on board a rebel spaceship surrounded by a fleet of his greatest enemies, coming face to face with that rarest of things - a Dalek that has developed a conscience. The only way to get to the bottom of the mystery is for the Docxtor and Clara to be shrunk miniaturised and venture inside the Dalek to see what makes it tick . Sci-fi adventure, starring Peter Capaldi and Jenna Coleman, with Zawe Ashton and Michael Smiley

programme.title: Doctor Who
programme.desc: The Time Lord and Clara land in 12th-century Sherwood Forest, where they meet none other than Robin Hood - despite the Doctors insistence that the legendary hero never actually existed. Theres also a Sheriff of Nottingham, who has gained control of dangerous alien technology. Sci-fi adventure, starring Peter Capaldi and Jenna Coleman, with Tom Riley and Ben Miller

programme.title: Ghosts
programme.desc: Alison and Mike camp in the grounds while the house is being fumigated for woodworm, and become competitive over who is the better camper. Pat and the Captain embrace the chance to spend some time in the great outdoors again, but Mary is terrified that the woodworm men intend to rid the house of its ghostly residents and resolves to scare them away

programme.title: Ghosts
programme.desc: Alison invites Lucy to stay, but begins to worry about her real motivations after a dire warning from her solicitor. The Captain decides to put his surveillance skills to the task of discovering whether Lucy is who she claims to be. A prank by Julian leaves Mike with an inappropriate e-mail and some awkward explaining to do with his new boss. Comedy, starring Charlotte Ritchie and Jessica Knappett

programme.title: Miranda
programme.desc: Penny decides to throw a party, hoping one of the male guests will turn out to be a suitable partner for Miranda. The singleton is mortified at the idea and invents a number of increasingly bizarre excuses to avoid attending the event. Starring Miranda Hart, Patricia Hodge, Sally Phillips and Adrian Scarborough

programme.title: Miranda
programme.desc: A handsome stranger loses his wallet in the joke shop, where it is found by Stevie and Miranda - who immediately begin trying to find out which one of them he would prefer to go on a date with. Meanwhile, Gary is offered a new job in Hong Kong, but seems to be waiting for someone to persuade him to stay. Starring Miranda Hart, Sarah Hadland and Tom Ellis

programme.title: Knocked Up (2007)
programme.desc: Ambitious journalist Alisons one-night stand with directionless layabout Ben has unexpected consequences when she discovers she is pregnant. However, the unlikely parents-to-be decide to give the relationship a try for their babys sake, forcing Ben to face the challenge of accepting responsibility for the first time in his life. Romantic comedy, starring Seth Rogen, Katherine Heigl and Paul Rudd

programme.title: Charlie Coopers Myth Country
programme.desc: The writer and actor tours the UK in his campervan, exploring local legends, myths and folklore and gathering evidence in a bid to get to the truth. He begins by going in search of Black Shuck, the demon dog of East Anglia, attempting an overnight stakeout to capture it on film, with unexpected consequences

programme.title: Two Pints of Lager and a Packet of Crisps
programme.desc: Louise makes a distressing discovery about her pregnancy. Gaz trains Munch to be his best man and Janet picks an unconventional theme for Donnas wedding - Dead Jonny

programme.title: Two Pints of Lager and a Packet of Crisps
programme.desc: Gaz and Donnas wedding turns out to be a morbid affair, prompting the groom to draw up a list of things to do before he dies and his bride to confront her fear of death by taking a job in a charity shop. Janet sees Munch in one of Johnnys old tracksuits, and Louise makes a shocking discovery about Corinthian

programme.title: Two Pints of Lager and a Packet of Crisps
programme.desc: Just as Janet begins to feel ready to go on with her life after Jonnys death, Louise reveals she has been hiding all of her post for six months - and among the unopened letters is a repossession order for Janets house. With only 24 hours to save her home, she seeks the help of Aidan, a bumbling local villain who has come into money after robbing a post office

programme.title: Two Pints of Lager and a Packet of Crisps
programme.desc: While Donna is away in London at a job interview, Gaz enlists Janets aid to inject some much-needed sophistication into his new home, but as the two decorate, their mutual attraction begins to resurface. Louise is alone when she goes into labour, and attempts to become her own birthing partner

programme.title: Miranda
programme.desc: Penny decides to throw a party, hoping one of the male guests will turn out to be a suitable partner for Miranda. The singleton is mortified at the idea and invents a number of increasingly bizarre excuses to avoid attending the event. Starring Miranda Hart, Patricia Hodge, Sally Phillips and Adrian Scarborough

programme.title: Miranda
programme.desc: A handsome stranger loses his wallet in the joke shop, where it is found by Stevie and Miranda - who immediately begin trying to find out which one of them he would prefer to go on a date with. Meanwhile, Gary is offered a new job in Hong Kong, but seems to be waiting for someone to persuade him to stay. Starring Miranda Hart, Sarah Hadland and Tom Ellis

programme.title: EastEnders
programme.desc: Nicola is shocked when she receives news about a face from the past, Phil and Sam support a loved one, and Ian desperately tries to gain extra votes

programme.title: EastEnders
programme.desc: Nicola is forced to come clean to George, Ian makes a rash decision after being humiliated by Oscar, and Grant gives Linda food for thought with Johnny after Elaine tells her he has money problems

programme.title: EastEnders
programme.desc: Walford is rife with gossip as Beas anonymous video of Elaine gains traction online. Ian instantly regrets his actions, Grant steps in to help a friend, while Gina and Harry are forced to come clean

programme.title: EastEnders
programme.desc: It is election day, and Ian and Elaine anxiously await the results, while Max and Cindy celebrate their joint birthday party in Harrys Barn, but tensions grow between him and Linda

On April 6, 1917, Lance Corporal Tom Blake and Lance Corporal William Schofield receive orders from General Erinmore to prevent Colonel Mackenzie from leading The 2nd Devons into a trap set by the Germans. The soldiers must proceed on foot into enemy territory to deliver the message, which will stop 1,600 men from walking straight into a deadly trap. Sam Mendes war drama, starring Dean-Charles Chapman, George MacKay, Daniel Mays and Colin Firth

programme.title: James Arthur: Out of Our Minds
programme.desc: Middlesbrough-born singer James Arthur opens up about his mental health struggles and issues he has had with antidepressants as he prepares to go out on tour. He also investigates male mental health, speaking to others like him who have found it hard to stop taking antidepressants, but have instead found other ways to help themselves and learn to thrive

programme.title: Roman Kemp: The Fight for Young Lives
programme.desc: Broadcaster Roman Kemp knows first-hand the impact of serious mental health issues. In 2020, he made Our Silent Emergency in the wake of the death of a friend. He encouraged those in need to talk to friends, family and professionals, but now strives to move the conversation on from talking about mental health to discovering what action is needed to support those suffering

programme.title: Sin City: The Real Las Vegas
programme.desc: Part two of two. Tir Dhondy goes further into the underbelly of Las Vegas to investigate how the reinvention of the city to pull in a new generation of visitors is affecting locals

programme.title: Charlie Coopers Myth Country
programme.desc: The writer and actor heads to Wiltshire, home to ancient sites such as Stonehenge, Avebury and the Westbury chalk horse, to get to the bottom of why humans feel the need to leave marks on the landscape. He turns his investigation towards the far more recent phenomenon of crop circles, hoping to settle a debate that has plagued his family for years. They think that crop circles are the work of aliens, but Charlie strongly doubts that belief

programme.title: Charlie Coopers Myth Country
programme.desc: The actor travels to Wales, the land of dragons and song, on a mission to discover if King Arthur was a real man or just a myth and if theres any truth behind this treasure story. In the process, he meets treasure hunters of different sorts, a recorder of rare and ancient folk songs, and finds what he refers to as his tribe, a metal-detecting club from south Wales. Hes optimistic he will return home a rich man - if not in wealth, then certainly in knowledge

programme.title: Doctor Who
programme.desc: The Time Lord finds himself on board a rebel spaceship surrounded by a fleet of his greatest enemies, coming face to face with that rarest of things - a Dalek that has developed a conscience. Sci-fi adventure, starring Peter Capaldi and Jenna Coleman, with Zawe Ashton and Michael Smiley

programme.desc: The Time Lord and Clara land in 12th-century Sherwood Forest, where they meet none other than Robin Hood - despite the Doctors insistence that the legendary hero never actually existed. programme.desc: Inspired by time spent at Bengal Brasseries in Belfast, Suzie Lee Arbuthnot makes her own version of chicken biryani

programme.title: MasterChef

programme.desc: The second episode reveals how Ann balanced her research into serial killers with life as a mother of four, as the Behavior Science Unit set out to prove the success of profiling

programme.title: Newsround

programme.title: Deadly 60
programme.desc: Steve Backshall goes on a journey to meet the extraordinary people fighting to save coral reefs. one of the most important environments on earth

programme.title: Gardeners World
programme.desc: The team visits the RHS Malvern Spring Festival in Worcestershire, where Rachel de Thame and Joe Swift share everything the show has to offer. Gardens, plants and expert advice, as well as tips and tricks to try at home. There is a visit to the Devon-Somerset border to meet a grower who, along with the help of a couple of feathered friends, has transformed a woodland landscape into a stunning nursery. And one designer explains why she is creating her first show to demonstrate the art of pressing flowers

programme.title: Dark Victory (1939)
programme.desc: Free-spirited young socialite Judith Trahernes fortune suddenly changes when she is diagnosed with a brain tumour. Kindly Dr Fredrik Steele takes charge of her care and the two grow increasingly fond of each other, but her negative prognosis casts a shadow over their romance, as she must prepare to face the worst. Melodrama, starring Bette Davis, George Brent, Ronald Reagan and Humphrey Bogart

programme.title: Now, Voyager (1942)
programme.desc: A nervous and frustrated spinster undergoes psychiatric treatment and emerges transformed. Despite her new-found happiness and optimistic outlook on life, she finds that beauty and confidence can bring their own share of heartache. Romantic drama, starring Bette Davis, Paul Henreid, Claude Rains, Gladys Cooper and Bonita Granville

programme.title: Live Womens Six Nations
programme.desc: Italy v England (Kick-off 2.00pm). All the action from the opening match in the fourth round of fixtures, held at Stadio Sergio Lanfranchi. Italy impressed last time out, picking up their first win of the campaign with an emphatic 41-14 victory here against Scotland. However, they will still be underdogs this afternoon against an England side who have not lost a Six Nations match since 2018 and are the reigning world champions

programme.title: Live Womens Six Nations
programme.desc: Scotland v France (Kick-off 4.15pm). All the action from the penultimate match of the championship for both teams, which takes place at Hive Stadium. Scotlands opening weekend victory in Wales was followed by heavy defeats at the hands of England and Italy. France are still in Grand Slam contention and will expect to triumph again to set up an intriguing final day showdown with the English

programme.title: Live Womens Six Nations
programme.desc: Ireland v Wales (Kick-off 6.30pm). Nicola McCarthy presents all the action from the final match in the fourth round of fixtures, held at Affidea Stadium. After victories in their opening two matches, Irelands Grand Slam hopes came to an end in a defeat away to France last time out. However, they will expect to get back to winning ways against a Welsh side who lost their opening three contests

programme.title: The Miracle Club (2023)
programme.desc: Chrissie Ahearn arrives in the town of Ballygar from Boston for the funeral of her mother Maureen, 40 years after she was banished by friends and family as a pregnant teenager. Her return coincides with a pilgrimage to Lourdes organised by Father Dermot Byrne. Comedy set in 1968, starring Maggie Smith, Kathy Bates and Laura Linney

programme.title: Simply Red at the BBC
programme.desc: A collection of archive performances by the band, who became one of the UKs biggest and most successful bands of the 1980s and 90s, thanks to a string of modern soul classics and covers built around the voice of frontman Mick Hucknall. Among the many songs being showcased here are much-loved favourites like Stars, Holding Back the Years and Something Got Me Started, alongside covers including Moneys Too Tight (to Mention), Every Time We Say Goodbye and If You Dont Know Me By Now

programme.title: 40 Years of Simply Red: Holding Back the Years
programme.desc: Concert film capturing the bands performance at the Movistar Arena in Santiago, Chile, in March 2025, as part of their 40th Anniversary tour. Featuring hits including A New Flame, Stars, Moneys Too Tight (to Mention), Its Only Love, Sunrise, If You Dont Know Me by Now, For Your Babies, Something Got Me Started and Holding Back the Years

programme.title: Margrete: Queen of the North (2021)
programme.desc: In 1402, Queen Margrete has achieved what no one has managed before, gathering Denmark, Norway and Sweden into a peace-oriented union that she rules through her adopted son King Erik. But a conspiracy is in the making, and she finds herself in an impossible dilemma that could shatter her lifes work. Period drama, starring Trine Dyrholm and Morten Hee Andersen. In Danish

programme.title: Mint
programme.desc: Reeling from a sudden loss, Shannon lashes out at her family. Only Ollie can offer her comfort, and as her day takes a surreal turn, she reconnects with herself and confronts her fears, at least until Dylans return snaps her back into a painful reality

programme.title: Mint
programme.desc: Dylans new life brings moments of comfort, but he also finds it challenging in a way he never saw coming. His old coping mechanisms no longer work, and he is forced to ask himself what he truly wants. A conversation with Luke reminds him whats at stake and what actually matters. Meanwhile, Cat seeks clarity from her son, hoping to understand the future she wants for herself and her family

programme.title: This Is BBC Two
programme.desc: Preview of upcoming programmes from BBC Two

programme.title: Take a Hike
programme.desc: Last to lead a walk is 32-year-old Rob from Dundee, who works for a communications company and plays amputee football for Partick Thistle. Hes leading the walkers to one of the Highlands best-known spots, Glenfinnan Viaduct, as featured in the Harry Potter movies

programme.title: Countryfile
programme.desc: Matt Baker and Vick Hope explore the chalk landscapes of the Chilterns, where rare grasslands, seasonal streams and specialised wildlife all depend on the fragile ground. Matt meets farmers working together to reconnect these landscapes, while Vick visits a rare winterbourne stream that flows only after winter rains. Plus, Adam Henson welcomes a rare breed Middle White pig to his Cotswolds farm

programme.title: Breakfast
programme.desc: A round-up of national and international news, plus current affairs, arts and entertainment, and weather

programme.title: Landward
programme.desc: Dougie Vipond heads to Ben Ledi in the Trossachs to help out with some high-altitude fieldwork, while Arlene Stuart revisits Landwards coverage of the 2001 foot-and-mouth outbreak and finds out about a legacy of the crisis thats helping farmers now. Rosie Morton is in Gairloch, Wester Ross, to hunt for herring and find out how this over-exploited fish is making a comeback, while Leanna Fernandez is in Fife to join a team researching the movements of snipe. Cammy Wilson visits an Ayrshire couple determined to preserve and promote the Clydesdale horse

programme.title: Beechgrove Garden
programme.desc: Planting borders and planning for cut flowers are on Lizzie Schofield and Brian Cunninghams to-do list at Beechgrove Garden. Lizzie is direct sowing in the new cuttings garden, while Brian is in the zig-zag border planting varieties that will grow tall, and so are ideal for the back of a plot, but that dont require support or staking. Brian also kicks off this years collection of plants being cultivated in the 6x8 glasshouse, while Lizzie is the first of the presenters to start work in her competition plot. Plus, a report on the alpine collection at the Royal Botanic Garden Edinburgh

programme.title: Saturday Kitchen Best Bites
programme.desc: Matt Tebbutt presents more highlights, with recipes from Big Zuu, Sophie Wyburd, Tony Singh and Samin Nosrat, while comedian Iain Stirling faces his food heaven or hell

programme.title: Best Bakes Ever
programme.desc: In light of Britains baking obsession, actress and cake expert Jane Asher presents a selection of recipes from television chefs, including James Martin, Mary Berry, Paul Hollywood, the Hairy Bikers, Raymond Blanc, Nigella Lawson, Tom Kerridge, Lorraine Pascale and Rachel Khoo

programme.title: Tea with Mussolini (1999)
programme.desc: Eccentric English and American women living in Florence during the tense pre-war years of the 1930s experience the ups and downs of parenthood when they collectively adopt a local boy disowned by his father. However, as international hostilities break out, their happy existence comes under threat. Period comedy drama, starring Maggie Smith, Judi Dench, Joan Plowright, Cher, Lily Tomlin and Baird Wallace

programme.title: Badminton Horse Trials
programme.desc: Live coverage of the final day of the prestigious equestrian event at Badminton House in South Gloucestershire. The globally renowned trials feature dressage, cross-country and jumping across several days

programme.title: Live Challenge Cup Rugby League
programme.sub-title: Warrington Wolves v Hull Kingston Rovers 10.05
programme.desc: Warrington Wolves v Hull Kingston Rovers (Kick-off 4.00pm). All the action from the second semi-final, held at Eco-Power Stadium in Doncaster. This is a repeat of last years final, which Hull KR edged 8-6 to win the trophy for the first time since 1980, before completing a treble by winning the League Leaders Shield and Super League. However, the Wolves have been in good form so far this term so will be hopeful of avenging that defeat

programme.title: Natural World
programme.desc: Surprisingly few people have seen a badger in the wild and little is known about their private lives. Hidden cameras monitored a sett in Devon for more than a year, revealing previously unknown aspects of the creatures everyday existence. Narrated by David Attenborough

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce marks the 80th anniversary of VE Day in Berlin and Bletchley Park. Featuring interviews with veterans and the stories of those who helped liberate Europe, including a 100-year-old woman who worked alongside Allied codebreakers and a German army veteran who reflects on the rise of the Nazi regime. Items valued include a pistol taken from a German general, stationery from Hitlers mountain retreat, model tanks from a training school, and a pair of miniature clogs

programme.title: The Elon Musk Show
programme.desc: Using extensive archive footage taken throughout his life, from South Africa to Silicon Valley, the series analyses the key moments in the entrepreneurs career from his first tech start-ups through to Tesla and SpaceX. In 1995, at the start of the Silicon Valley tech boom, Musk began his ascendency, building and selling a major new internet technology business, becoming a multi-millionaire at the age of just 28 - but just as he was enjoying newfound success, he faced his first major challenge

programme.title: Scandinavia with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: The adventurer explores the hidden gems of the countries of Scandinavia, marvelling at the Arctic landscapes and spectacular scenery along the way. The first leg of his journey takes him from the archipelago that marks the northernmost outpost of Norway, Svalbard, to the snowy region of Lapland - travelling along Natos longest border with Russia where tensions are high and Santas village is prepared for a potential war

programme.title: Inside Britains National Parks
programme.desc: Steeped in myth and untamed beauty, Dartmoors vast moorlands are characterised by open heathland, grassy hills and striking granite tors, providing a sanctuary for rare plant and animal species, as well as a treasure trove for archaeologists. Rivers meandering through the moors are home to salmon, otters and kingfishers, and peatlands host rare plants like the carnivorous sundew

programme.title: Sunday Politics Northern Ireland
programme.desc: Mark Carruthers looks at the political developments of the week, with policy-makers questioned on the key issues

programme.title: The Iron Claw (2023)
programme.desc: Biographical sports drama about the Von Erich family, who made history in the intensely competitive world of professional wrestling in the early 1980s, but were beset by tragedy. Starring Zac Efron, Jeremy Allen White and Lily James

programme.title: Suzie Lees Great Food Made Simple

programme.desc: Fiona Bruce presents an hour of post-election debate, with a panel of politicians and other guests facing questions from the audience

programme.title: Half Man

programme.desc: Les causes a stir when he tells a woman her gold bracelet is fake, and Seth later struggles to determine whether a watch is priceless or worthless

programme.title: Hardcore Pawn
programme.desc: Les makes a decision on impulse that threatens to backfire, and later gives a big loan to a customer with a dubious sob story

programme.desc: David Dickinson and antique dealers Ian Towning, Alison Chapman, James Layte and Tony Gearing travel to Coalville in Leicestershire, where they inspect items including a set of Georgian silver spoons, a naval percussion pistol and an Indian brooch - with members of the public deciding whether to accept cash for their goods or take a chance on an auction

programme.title: Wicked Tuna

programme.desc: Hunter Bruce Mitchell rejoins the fight with Zak and Aaron. Troy, Pickle, Bill and Tes team up to help a rancher with a serious problem. Meanwhile, Dusty devises a way to light up the night

programme.desc: Troy and Pickle battle a hyper aggressive breed of python. Bill and Tes try to stay one step ahead of the Army Corp of Engineers. Dusty works on a plan to get the snakes to come to him, while Zak and Bruce face off against two foes

programme.title: Gold Wars Downunder
programme.desc: The sale of gold is an important source of income for hundreds of thousands of Australians, including the men and women willing to risk it all. In this series, three hardcore mining teams battle it out on the one patch of gold-rich-land to see who can unearth the biggest nuggets and the most gold in an epic made-for-television gold-hunting season

programme.title: Gold Wars Downunder
programme.desc: Donnie and Ronnie have a bust up - threatening Donnies dream of owning a lease. At the 1870 mine, Richie builds a gold room to sort the super-fine gold from the waste material

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.sub-title: The Legacy of J Allen Hynek
programme.desc: The work of astronomer J Allen Hynek, best known as the notorious government UFO debunker who became one of the founding fathers of ufology

programme.title: The Proof Is Out There
programme.sub-title: Swamp Beast Sighting, Martian Conspiracy and Transparent Mexican Sea Monster
programme.desc: An investigation into a remarkable sighting of the skunk ape, a creature often likened to Bigfoot. A canoer claims to have captured footage of this elusive beast navigating through gator-infested waters, raising questions about what may be lurking in the swamps. Plus, the discovery of a peculiar transparent sea monster off the coast of Mexico, which has sparked the curiosity of marine enthusiasts and experts alike

programme.title: The Proof Is Out There
programme.sub-title: Modern Day Dinosaur Sighting, Mysterious Lights Above Norway, and Girl Punches Down Tree
programme.desc: An examination of several seemingly impossible things caught on film. programme.title: What on Earth?
programme.desc: Satellites discover what appears to be US stealth technology deep inside China, and an unidentified cloud swamps Americas skies

programme.title: Secret Societies: In the Shadows

programme.title: Hazardous History with Henry Winkler

programme.desc: Professor Alice Roberts reveals the history of Belfast, the UKs most Victorian city. programme.desc: A repairman is assigned to salvage the remaining resources from Earth, which has been left a devastated wasteland after a war with an alien race. Sci-fi adventure, starring Tom Cruise and Morgan Freeman

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: As the series reaches its halfway point, the Taskmaster is starting to know what to expect from his current crop of comics - but even hes surprised by the outrage Armando Iannucci causes with an ostrich, how Amy Gledhill struggles to remember the word for tube, and what Kumail Nanjiani does to time itself. Meanwhile, Joel Dommett has hours of fun with pots and pans, and Joanna Page and Alex Horne have an intimate conversation about guinea pigs

programme.title: Good Boys (2019)
programme.desc: Three lads skip school and embark on an epic journey while carrying stolen drugs. They are hunted by teenage girls, and attempt to make their way home in time for a long-awaited party. Director Gene Stupnitskys comedy, starring Jacob Tremblay, Keith L Williams and Brady Noon

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to Arvada, Colorado, where a husband and wife have allowed their restaurant to fall into disrepair. Randys hoarding is out of control, while Alexa, who runs the kitchen, has a lot to learn. To make matters worse, the Old Neighborhood is one of the filthiest eateries the fiery chef has ever seen, and only one of the biggest transformations of the series can save the business

programme.title: Travel Man: 48 Hours In
programme.desc: Comedian David ODoherty joins presenter Joe Lycett in Málaga, on Spains Costa del Sol for a fast and funny two-day trial of the best the Costa has to offer. They head to the citys oldest bar, where wine is poured directly from 100-year-old barrels, then enjoy a walk along the Caminito del Rey footpath, which clings to the side of a cliff face 100 metres up. Their next attraction is the International Museum of Nativity Scene Art in the small town of Mollina, while back in Málaga itself, they learn how to cook the perfect sardine before visiting the birthplace of painter and sculptor Pablo Picasso

programme.title: Four in a Bed

programme.title: Four in a Bed

Nikki and David get to grips with the unconventional facilities, and David reveals his background as a hotel inspector - with Amanda making her opinions on the star rating system very clear

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The third visit is to Monmouthshire, where Peter and Amanda Copp want to rope their guests into the world of glamping at Hidden Valley Yurts. John has a hairy encounter in his yurt, and the shared bathroom facilities fail to impress David and Nikki. The next morning, the DIY breakfast proves underwhelming for some, while the hosts discover that the great outdoors is not everyones cup of tea

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Former hotel inspector and owner David Stanbridge and manager Nikki Deans welcome the contestants to the Cley Hall Hotel in Spalding, Lincolnshire. Peter and Amanda are impressed by their room, but Simon and Lyn are unhappy with the state of the carpet. The next morning, the guests decide to put their eight-minute breakfast rule to the test, and some of them have concerns about Nikkis waitressing skills

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The hosts meet for the final time to find out what theyve been paid and confront their critics. Simon and Lyn kick off proceedings by demanding answers from John about his disturbed nights sleep, but then find themselves taken to task by David over their cleanliness feedback. However, the former hotel inspector receives his own interrogation from Peter and Amanda, who want to know why he didnt praise their shared bathroom facilities. Tensions run high as the payments are revealed and the winner is announced

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Doug breaks the double bed, so he and Carrie borrow two singles to tide them over until a replacement is delivered. To their surprise, however, they discover the different sleeping arrangement gives their marriage a much-needed boost

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Part one of two. Doug takes Carrie on a romantic weekend break, but she grows increasingly jealous when his new, slimmer physique draws admiring glances from passers-by. Meanwhile, Spence and Danny are left to look after Arthur and the house - but find themselves arguing over the tiniest problems

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Part two of two. Doug and Carrie end up lost in remote woodlands, ruining their romantic weekend. Comedy, starring Kevin James

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Robert starts to date a woman who claims to be 22, much to the dismay of Marie and Debra, who regard the age difference as unseemly and slightly distasteful. Comedy, starring Brad Garrett

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray overhears Debras parents discussing marriage counselling when they come over for Thanksgiving. Comedy, starring Ray Romano

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray is sneezed upon at the airport and convinces himself he has caught something serious, so the long-suffering Debra is lumbered with looking after him. Ray Romano stars

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: The shrink makes a disparaging on-air remark about Seattles weather, causing outrage across the city. He offers to host a charity benefit to make up for his careless words - but the event only leads to further trouble. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Martin makes an election broadcast on behalf of Seattle mayoral hopeful Holden Thorpe, prompting Frasier and Niles to throw their weight behind a rival candidate - who proves highly unsuitable for public office. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer, with the guest voice of Sydney Pollack

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Part one of two. While visiting the island of Bora Bora with new girlfriend Madeline, Frasier is unexpectedly reunited with his ex-wife Lilith. Comedy, guest starring JoBeth Williams and Bebe Neuwirth

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Part two of two. Liliths presence on Bora Bora causes Frasier to make a fool of himself, almost ruining his relationship with Madeline. Once back in Seattle, he tries to make amends. Starring Kelsey Grammer and Bebe Neuwirth

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: A mysterious cat burglar ransacks the Simpson household, making off with Lisas saxophone. Homer becomes the leader of a neighbourhood watch scheme to find the miscreant - but soon lets the power go to his head. Featuring the guest voice of Sam Neill

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Barts antics with family dog Santas Little Helper cause mayhem, and ultimately result in Principal Skinner getting the sack and eternal do-gooder Ned Flanders being appointed in his place

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: The Boy Who Knew Too Much
programme.desc: Mayor Quimbys nephew is wrongly accused of assault, presenting Bart with a dilemma - if he volunteers the information that would clear the lads name, he risks being expelled from school for playing truant

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Lisa takes offence at a new doll that supposedly demeans women, and persuades its inventor to design a more up-to-date version, hoping to provide young girls with a positive role model. Featuring the guest voice of Kathleen Turner

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Jean Johansson helps Dipti from Leicester find her dream holiday home in the sun, which one day could become her permanent home, on Spains Costa Almería. Joining Dipti on her quest in Mojácar is her best friend Anne. With a budget of £130,000, Jean shows them five properties, from a light and bright beach abode and a spacious, sophisticated townhouse, to a turnkey treat with views to die for

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The first venue of the week is Greenhills Hotel in Tenby, Pembrokeshire, where the guests go on a seal safari and the breakfast is more greasy spoon than country hotel

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Hospitality obsessive Tom hosts the group at his Three Cliffs Bay Holiday Park in Gower, Swansea which offers glamping yurts and caravan stays. Maxine and Tegan are on the warpath after Toms comments about their hotel and a discovery in the communal toilet leaves Dan and Lucy less-than-impressed. An invigorating afternoon sea swimming proves popular but it doesnt stop one couple leaving feedback that Tom feels is complete nonsense

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Chef Dan and his partner Lucy hope to cook up a storm for their guests at The Tal-y-Cafn in Conwy. The hosts make a splash with an afternoon of inland surfing but there are cleanliness concerns that just wont wash away

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The weeks final visit is to Cambrian House BandB in Carno, Powys, where husband-and-wife team Jacqui and Ivan think their value for money will be unbeatable. First impressions are certainly good, but a prank by Tom during an afternoon out coracle paddling sinks the atmosphere

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The 1,000 episode sees auntie and niece duo Maxine Walker and Tegan Styles of Greenhills Hotel in Pembrokeshire get to the bottom of Toms bathroom blues. Tom Beynon, owner of Three Cliffs Bay Holiday Park in south Wales also wants to know why he received a roasting for his hosting. Chef Dan Latham and partner Lucy Lonsdale of Tal-y-Cafn, Conwy, do not feel their hash browns were a burning issue, while Jacqui and Ivan Fabian of Cambrian House BandB in Powys, question whether tactics were played. Eventually, the payments are revealed and the winners announced

programme.title: Kirstie and Phils Love It or List It
programme.desc: In the desirable village of Radlett, Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer dive headfirst into a clash thats in danger of boiling over. Aneri, Nihar and their young daughter live in a three-bedroom end-of-terrace cottage. Aneri is desperate to leave behind the tight layout that prevents family gatherings, with its cubbyhole kitchen and lack of must-haves, such as a downstairs toilet. Nihar, however, is defiant that they will live there forever, refusing to let go of their beloved garden, and holds out hope that Kirstie can come up with a plan to resolve this two-year argument. With a £100,000 Love It budget, Kirstie faces a tall order and a planning headache that threatens to derail the whole build. Meanwhile, Phil is in his element finding dream properties with a £750,000 List It budget, but will Aneri play ball?

programme.title: Jamies Ultimate BBQ
programme.desc: Jamie Oliver presents tips on improving peoples grilling skills. He starts with a juicy sirloin steak cooked three ways, accompanied by chargrilled salad, with smoky flavours and textures only a barbecue can deliver. He also cooks up a chicken Caesar salad with charred vegetable and bacon, turns Italian-inspired lamb chops into sizzling lamb lollipops, and has a few tips for grilling a whole fish

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: Steam Train Diaries
programme.desc: A journey through North York Moors National Park aboard the heritage steam engines that travel through its hills and valleys. In this first episode, steam train aficionado Piglet fires an 88-year-old engine along the steepest section of track. Plus, a look into the complex workings inside traditional signal boxes and a groundbreaking mission to convert a full-size heritage engine from coal to oil

programme.title: Worlds Most Secret Hotels
programme.desc: Unusual destinations featured in this episode include a mountain retreat at the summit of Mount Pilatus in Switzerland, and a striking Brutalist hotel that transformed concrete into an architectural masterpiece. Off-grid in the English countryside, two handcrafted geodesic pods offer the ultimate digital detox, while a working lighthouse on La Palma secretly houses a luxurious hotel

programme.title: The Equalizer (2014)
programme.desc: A retired secret agent applies his talents to the task of helping victims of injustice. When he witnesses a prostitute being beaten up by a pimp, he kills the man, an act that draws him into a battle to the death with a Russian crime syndicate. Action thriller based on the 1980s TV series, starring Denzel Washington and Chloe Grace Moretz

programme.title: Moon (2009)
programme.desc: Astronaut Sam Bell has been working alone at an energy-generating base on the moon for three years and desperately longs to return home. After he is injured in an accident, he begins to discover the disturbing truth about the operation he is running, and is forced to question his own identity. Sci-fi drama, starring Sam Rockwell, with the voice of Kevin Spacey

programme.title: Gordon Ramsays Secret Service
programme.desc: In the first of a two-part mission, the chef gains insight on Callahans Seafood Bar and Grill, which has been sinking fast since the owner died and left the restaurant to his three daughters. The business used to be the centre of their family bond, but eldest daughter Anikas sub-standard leadership and the kitchen staffs lack of respect have left the restaurant - and the sisters relationship - in turmoil. Gordon begins by compelling the sisters and their staff to take accountability

programme.title: Your Song
programme.desc: In Birmingham, a former Birmingham City footballer sings for her grandad, while a Royal Navy officer performs Nessun Dorma, bringing the Bull Ring to a standstill. A primary school teacher unleashes her inner rock star, a pregnant woman sings the song that saved her, and an Iranian refugee for whom singing was once an act of rebellion takes to the stage

programme.title: Sarah Beenys New Country Lives
programme.desc: Pete and Carina want to create a caravan site, but who will use it? James finds out about holiday home rental rates, and Ioan builds on his newfound independence

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: A mysterious cat burglar ransacks the Simpson household, making off with Lisas saxophone. Homer becomes the leader of a neighbourhood watch scheme to find the miscreant - but soon lets the power go to his head. Featuring the guest voice of Sam Neill

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Lisa takes offence at a new doll that supposedly demeans women, and persuades its inventor to design a more up-to-date version, hoping to provide young girls with a positive role model. Featuring the guest voice of Kathleen Turner

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Barts antics with family dog Santas Little Helper cause mayhem, and ultimately result in Principal Skinner getting the sack and eternal do-gooder Ned Flanders being appointed in his place

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Doug asks Arthur to coach him at table tennis in a bid to beat Carrie and boost his deflated ego, while Spence is put out to learn his girlfiend has been promoted to waitress at the bowling alley. Comedy, starring Kevin James and Leah Remini

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Doug and Carrie decide to renew their wedding vows, but preparations for the ceremony throw up more challenges than anticipated - not least the task of finding a chimp to act as best man

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Deacons estranged wife tells Carrie she wants to get back with him. Doug isnt sure whether to reveal this new development to his friend - especially as hes just announced hes going away for the weekend with another woman

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray buys Debra an expensive Christmas present in the hope she will be grateful enough to let him go on a weekend golf trip with friends, but has not anticipated that she is getting him an even more extravagant gift. Comedy, starring Ray Romano and Patricia Heaton

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray becomes the butt of embarrassing jibes for failing to consider Debras feelings in a social crisis, and vows to be more attentive in future. Comedy, starring Ray Romano and Patricia Heaton

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray gets the chance to cover the Super Bowl for his newspaper - but feels guilty about not asking Debra to accompany him. Ray Romano stars

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: The shrink bumps into a former friend of Martins while visiting Maris in hospital. The pair parted on bad terms, so Frasier tries to effect a reconciliation. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer and John Mahoney

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: A plumber hired to repair Frasiers toilet turns out to be the bully who made Niles life a misery at school. Comedy, guest starring John C McGinley, with Kelsey Grammer and David Hyde Pierce

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Roz falls out with Frasier and accepts an offer from Bulldog to produce his show instead. Comedy, starring Peri Gilpin, Dan Butler and Kelsey Grammer

programme.title: Sunday Brunch
programme.desc: Tim Lovejoy and Simon Rimmer are joined by guests Alex Iwobi, Kevin Olusola, Alex Fletcher and Nick Pickard. With a live performance from Australian singer-songwriter Ruel

programme.title: Womens FA Cup
programme.sub-title: Liverpool v Brighton and Hove Albion
programme.desc: Liverpool v Brighton and Hove Albion (Kick-off 12.15pm). Jill Scott and Maisie Adam present live coverage of the semi-final at BrewDog Stadium in St Helens. Liverpool were made to work hard for a 1-0 win over Charlton Athletic after extra time in the previous round, while Brighton claimed a shock 2-0 win away to Arsenal, and both teams are now looking to reach the showpiece match for the first time in their history

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer meet two couples taking advantage of a first-time buyer scheme to help them onto the property ladder in Essex, only to find their budgets wont take them very far. Kirstie is with locals Sarah and Charlie who need a home to bring them together after five years of living with their respective parents. Theyve started to lose their nerve after eight months of unsuccessful house-hunting and it quickly becomes clear that their best chance of success is to take on a project. Phils couple Toby and Simone have high expectations of what their home should be after renting in London, but their budget doesnt match up to the house, or postcode, theyre accustomed to

programme.title: George Clarkes Amazing Spaces
programme.desc: An actress moves up the four-wheel property ladder, from a one-bed tiny transit to a two-bedroom luxury Luton Van conversion. A train carriage gets a makeover into a dog-friendly holiday let and George visits an amazing underground bar as well as a house in Denmark that is completely covered in seashells. The saga of the scissor-lift cabin continues, as George and Will Hardie get to grips with some serious weight issues

programme.title: The Day the Earth Stood Still (2008)
programme.desc: An alien arrives on Earth, accompanied by an awesomely powerful robot, on a fateful mission - to decide if the human race deserves to continue - and if not, to wipe it out. The visitor is imprisoned in a military facility, but a scientist helps him escape, hoping to prove that mankind is worth saving. Sci-fi drama remake, starring Keanu Reeves and Jennifer Connelly

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: The Great Celebrity Bake Off for Stand Up to Cancer
programme.desc: Rebecca Lucy Taylor, Tommy Tiernan, Meera Syal and Adam Buxton put their skills to the test to impress judges Caroline Waldegrave and Paul Hollywood, and raise money for charity. The bakers take on crumpets in the signature and try not to panic over perfect piping in the technical, before recreating their own celebrity hero in pastry for the showstopper

programme.title: Cruising to the Ends of the Earth
programme.desc: The Royal Princess drops anchor in Alaskas state capital Juneau, where a family from Preston travel off the beaten track to Auke Bay, a wildlife haven where bald eagles soar above snow-capped peaks and the ocean stirs with the presence of giants. Half a world away in the sun-drenched Mediterranean, shipmates Millie and Jon discover the timeless beauty of Corfu, journeying to an ancient olive mill thats been in the same family for six generations

programme.title: Your Song
programme.desc: Sam Ryder and Paloma Faith take the chosen singers into the studio to rehearse for the final concert. But first, they decide to include a fifth singer. Who should they bring back? As the practice sessions begin, Milo must learn to be bigger on stage, Chantel battles with self-doubt, Findlay rehearses his mums funeral song a year after her death and Mina starts losing her voice the day before the concert. Alison Hammond follows their progress

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on what they have been watching during the week, with cameras capturing their instant reactions

programme.title: Super Surgeons: A Chance at Life
programme.desc: Professor Vin Paleri attempts to reconstruct a throat cancer patients entire windpipe - but one mistake could leave him unable to swallow or speak. A woman who had a fibroid removed from her womb discovers it contains a rare form of cancer, and will now need to have her entire reproductive system removed. A patient has a rare cancer growing in the back of his abdomen

programme.title: Gordon Ramsays Secret Service
programme.desc: The conclusion of a two-part edition. After a much-needed reality check from Gordon, the three sisters unite to rebuild their familys legacy. What starts as a heartfelt memorial for their late father turns into a high-stakes mission to revamp Callahans Seafood Bar and Grill

programme.title: Travel Man: 48 Hours In
programme.desc: Joe Lycett and guest companion Phil Wang embark on a two-day mini-break in the US capital, Washington, DC. Their home for the weekend is the Eaton Hotel, which features a 24-hour radio station, a plant rehab centre and a crystal library. At the National Mall, the pair take in some of the planets most recognisable monuments and memorials, including the worlds biggest obelisk, aka the Washington Monument, the Reflecting Pool, the Second World War memorial and the Lincoln Memorial. Day two features a celebration of DCs diverse food scene

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Marge stumbles into a new job as a food-storage container-selling drag queen when ambitious hairdresser Julio gives her a makeover. Meanwhile, Lisa tries to make the world better in the style of Amelie from the French romantic comedy of the same name. With the guest voice of RuPaul

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer falls for a sexy colleague and tries to avoid her, fearing he may be unable to resist temptation. However, Mr Burns sends the two of them on a business trip together and the enforced intimacy puts an intolerable strain on his willpower. Featuring the guest voice of Michelle Pfeiffer

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Psychotic Sideshow Bob is released from Springfield Penitentiary thirsting for revenge - prompting Bart and the rest of the family to join the witness protection programme. Featuring the guest voice of Kelsey Grammer

programme.title: Good Boys (2019)
programme.desc: Three lads skip school and embark on an epic journey while carrying stolen drugs. They are hunted by teenage girls, and attempt to make their way home in time for a long-awaited party. Director Gene Stupnitskys comedy, starring Jacob Tremblay, Keith L Williams and Brady Noon

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to Arvada, Colorado, where a husband and wife have allowed their restaurant to fall into disrepair. Randys hoarding is out of control, while Alexa, who runs the kitchen, has a lot to learn. To make matters worse, the Old Neighborhood is one of the filthiest eateries the fiery chef has ever seen, and only one of the biggest transformations of the series can save the business

programme.title: Travel Man: 48 Hours In
programme.desc: Comedian David ODoherty joins presenter Joe Lycett in Málaga, on Spains Costa del Sol for a fast and funny two-day trial of the best the Costa has to offer. They head to the citys oldest bar, where wine is poured directly from 100-year-old barrels, then enjoy a walk along the Caminito del Rey footpath, which clings to the side of a cliff face 100 metres up.
