programme.desc: A journey through North York Moors National Park aboard the heritage steam engines that travel through its hills and valleys. In this first episode, steam train aficionado Piglet fires an 88-year-old engine along the steepest section of track. Plus, a look into the complex workings inside traditional signal boxes and a groundbreaking mission to convert a full-size heritage engine from coal to oil

programme.title: Worlds Most Secret Hotels
programme.desc: Unusual destinations featured in this episode include a mountain retreat at the summit of Mount Pilatus in Switzerland, and a striking Brutalist hotel that transformed concrete into an architectural masterpiece. Off-grid in the English countryside, two handcrafted geodesic pods offer the ultimate digital detox, while a working lighthouse on La Palma secretly houses a luxurious hotel

programme.title: The Equalizer (2014)
programme.desc: A retired secret agent applies his talents to the task of helping victims of injustice. When he witnesses a prostitute being beaten up by a pimp, he kills the man, an act that draws him into a battle to the death with a Russian crime syndicate. Action thriller based on the 1980s TV series, starring Denzel Washington and Chloe Grace Moretz

programme.title: Oblivion (2013)
programme.desc: A repairman is assigned to salvage the remaining resources from Earth, which has been left a devastated wasteland after a war with an alien race. He discovers a human survivor on the surface of the planet, an encounter that exposes secrets from the past that threaten the future of the human race. Sci-fi adventure, starring Tom Cruise and Morgan Freeman

programme.title: Gordon Ramsays Secret Service
programme.desc: The conclusion of a two-part edition. After a much-needed reality check from Gordon, the three sisters unite to rebuild their familys legacy. What starts as a heartfelt memorial for their late father turns into a high-stakes mission to revamp Callahans Seafood Bar and Grill

programme.title: Gordon Ramsays Secret Service
programme.desc: In the first of a two-part mission, the chef gains insight on Callahans Seafood Bar and Grill, which has been sinking fast since the owner died and left the restaurant to his three daughters. The business used to be the centre of their family bond, but eldest daughter Anikas sub-standard leadership and the kitchen staffs lack of respect have left the restaurant - and the sisters relationship - in turmoil. Gordon begins by compelling the sisters and their staff to take accountability

programme.title: Your Song
programme.desc: In Birmingham, a former Birmingham City footballer sings for her grandad, while a Royal Navy officer performs Nessun Dorma, bringing the Bull Ring to a standstill. A primary school teacher unleashes her inner rock star, a pregnant woman sings the song that saved her, and an Iranian refugee for whom singing was once an act of rebellion takes to the stage

programme.title: Sarah Beenys New Country Lives
programme.desc: Pete and Carina want to create a caravan site, but who will use it? James finds out about holiday home rental rates, and Ioan builds on his newfound independence

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: A mysterious cat burglar ransacks the Simpson household, making off with Lisas saxophone. Homer becomes the leader of a neighbourhood watch scheme to find the miscreant - but soon lets the power go to his head. Featuring the guest voice of Sam Neill

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Lisa takes offence at a new doll that supposedly demeans women, and persuades its inventor to design a more up-to-date version, hoping to provide young girls with a positive role model. Featuring the guest voice of Kathleen Turner

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Barts antics with family dog Santas Little Helper cause mayhem, and ultimately result in Principal Skinner getting the sack and eternal do-gooder Ned Flanders being appointed in his place

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Doug asks Arthur to coach him at table tennis in a bid to beat Carrie and boost his deflated ego, while Spence is put out to learn his girlfiend has been promoted to waitress at the bowling alley. Comedy, starring Kevin James and Leah Remini

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Doug and Carrie decide to renew their wedding vows, but preparations for the ceremony throw up more challenges than anticipated - not least the task of finding a chimp to act as best man

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Deacons estranged wife tells Carrie she wants to get back with him. Doug isnt sure whether to reveal this new development to his friend - especially as hes just announced hes going away for the weekend with another woman

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray buys Debra an expensive Christmas present in the hope she will be grateful enough to let him go on a weekend golf trip with friends, but has not anticipated that she is getting him an even more extravagant gift. Comedy, starring Ray Romano and Patricia Heaton

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray becomes the butt of embarrassing jibes for failing to consider Debras feelings in a social crisis, and vows to be more attentive in future. Comedy, starring Ray Romano and Patricia Heaton

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray gets the chance to cover the Super Bowl for his newspaper - but feels guilty about not asking Debra to accompany him. Ray Romano stars

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: The shrink bumps into a former friend of Martins while visiting Maris in hospital. The pair parted on bad terms, so Frasier tries to effect a reconciliation. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer and John Mahoney

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: A plumber hired to repair Frasiers toilet turns out to be the bully who made Niles life a misery at school. Comedy, guest starring John C McGinley, with Kelsey Grammer and David Hyde Pierce

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Roz falls out with Frasier and accepts an offer from Bulldog to produce his show instead. Comedy, starring Peri Gilpin, Dan Butler and Kelsey Grammer

programme.title: Sunday Brunch
programme.desc: Tim Lovejoy and Simon Rimmer are joined by guests Alex Iwobi, Kevin Olusola, Alex Fletcher and Nick Pickard. With a live performance from Australian singer-songwriter Ruel

programme.title: Womens FA Cup
programme.sub-title: Liverpool v Brighton and Hove Albion
programme.desc: Liverpool v Brighton and Hove Albion (Kick-off 12.15pm). Jill Scott and Maisie Adam present live coverage of the semi-final at BrewDog Stadium in St Helens. Liverpool were made to work hard for a 1-0 win over Charlton Athletic after extra time in the previous round, while Brighton claimed a shock 2-0 win away to Arsenal, and both teams are now looking to reach the showpiece match for the first time in their history

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer meet two couples taking advantage of a first-time buyer scheme to help them onto the property ladder in Essex, only to find their budgets wont take them very far. Kirstie is with locals Sarah and Charlie who need a home to bring them together after five years of living with their respective parents. Theyve started to lose their nerve after eight months of unsuccessful house-hunting and it quickly becomes clear that their best chance of success is to take on a project. Phils couple Toby and Simone have high expectations of what their home should be after renting in London, but their budget doesnt match up to the house, or postcode, theyre accustomed to

programme.title: George Clarkes Amazing Spaces
programme.desc: An actress moves up the four-wheel property ladder, from a one-bed tiny transit to a two-bedroom luxury Luton Van conversion. A train carriage gets a makeover into a dog-friendly holiday let and George visits an amazing underground bar as well as a house in Denmark that is completely covered in seashells. The saga of the scissor-lift cabin continues, as George and Will Hardie get to grips with some serious weight issues

programme.title: The Day the Earth Stood Still (2008)
programme.desc: An alien arrives on Earth, accompanied by an awesomely powerful robot, on a fateful mission - to decide if the human race deserves to continue - and if not, to wipe it out. The visitor is imprisoned in a military facility, but a scientist helps him escape, hoping to prove that mankind is worth saving. Sci-fi drama remake, starring Keanu Reeves and Jennifer Connelly

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: The Great Celebrity Bake Off for Stand Up to Cancer
programme.desc: Rebecca Lucy Taylor, Tommy Tiernan, Meera Syal and Adam Buxton put their skills to the test to impress judges Caroline Waldegrave and Paul Hollywood, and raise money for charity. The bakers take on crumpets in the signature and try not to panic over perfect piping in the technical, before recreating their own celebrity hero in pastry for the showstopper

programme.title: Cruising to the Ends of the Earth
programme.desc: The Royal Princess drops anchor in Alaskas state capital Juneau, where a family from Preston travel off the beaten track to Auke Bay, a wildlife haven where bald eagles soar above snow-capped peaks and the ocean stirs with the presence of giants. Half a world away in the sun-drenched Mediterranean, shipmates Millie and Jon discover the timeless beauty of Corfu, journeying to an ancient olive mill thats been in the same family for six generations

programme.title: Your Song
programme.desc: Sam Ryder and Paloma Faith take the chosen singers into the studio to rehearse for the final concert. But first, they decide to include a fifth singer. Who should they bring back? As the practice sessions begin, Milo must learn to be bigger on stage, Chantel battles with self-doubt, Findlay rehearses his mums funeral song a year after her death and Mina starts losing her voice the day before the concert. Alison Hammond follows their progress

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on what they have been watching during the week, with cameras capturing their instant reactions

programme.title: Moon (2009)
programme.desc: Astronaut Sam Bell has been working alone at an energy-generating base on the moon for three years and desperately longs to return home. After he is injured in an accident, he begins to discover the disturbing truth about the operation he is running, and is forced to question his own identity. Sci-fi drama, starring Sam Rockwell, with the voice of Kevin Spacey

programme.title: Ammo
programme.desc: Norwegian drama about the arms trade. Bjørn Urdal has been unemployed due to a corruption scandal, so when a weapons manufacturer want to hire him, he is inclined to agree. With the support of his family, Bjørn is ready to enter an industry that deals with life and death, only to slowly realise he stands to take the fall if the product is used on innocent targets. In Norwegian

programme.title: Salisbury Poisonings: The Untold Story
programme.desc: The documentary charts the immediate fallout of the attack, as staff on the hospital ICU battled to save the lives of the Skripals and local police officer Nick Bailey, who had become accidentally contaminated with Novichok. Public health officials worked round the clock with specially trained British armed forces in an attempt to stop the spread of the poison across Salisbury, while counter-terrorism officers launched a manhunt for those responsible

programme.title: Travel Man: 48 Hours In
programme.desc: Joe Lycett and guest companion Phil Wang embark on a two-day mini-break in the US capital, Washington, DC. Their home for the weekend is the Eaton Hotel, which features a 24-hour radio station, a plant rehab centre and a crystal library. At the National Mall, the pair take in some of the planets most recognisable monuments and memorials, including the worlds biggest obelisk, aka the Washington Monument, the Reflecting Pool, the Second World War memorial and the Lincoln Memorial. Day two features a celebration of DCs diverse food scene

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Marge stumbles into a new job as a food-storage container-selling drag queen when ambitious hairdresser Julio gives her a makeover. Meanwhile, Lisa tries to make the world better in the style of Amelie from the French romantic comedy of the same name. With the guest voice of RuPaul

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer falls for a sexy colleague and tries to avoid her, fearing he may be unable to resist temptation. However, Mr Burns sends the two of them on a business trip together and the enforced intimacy puts an intolerable strain on his willpower. Featuring the guest voice of Michelle Pfeiffer

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Psychotic Sideshow Bob is released from Springfield Penitentiary thirsting for revenge - prompting Bart and the rest of the family to join the witness protection programme. Featuring the guest voice of Kelsey Grammer

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: The Boy Who Knew Too Much
programme.desc: Mayor Quimbys nephew is wrongly accused of assault, presenting Bart with a dilemma - if he volunteers the information that would clear the lads name, he risks being expelled from school for playing truant

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Three pairs of partners from Berkshire compete to win the £1,000 prize, including Leanne and Ricci who hope to impress their guests with a Caribbean-inspired menu. Also competing are cultured couple Eveleen and Michael, before final duo Natasha and Paul throw an evening dedicated to fine dining and quality ingredients

programme.title: Jack Whitehall Gets Around
programme.desc: Filmed at the end of his March 2014 tour in front of a capacity crowd at Wembley Arena, the rising star performs in an in the round setting on a circular stage at the centre of the arena, a UK first for a solo stand-up tour

programme.title: Whose Line Is It Anyway? USA
programme.desc: Aisha Tyler welcomes actor and comedian Tony Cavalero to the comic improv show, with regulars Wayne Brady, Greg Proops, Colin Mochrie and Ryan Stiles

programme.title: Whose Line Is It Anyway? USA
programme.desc: Aisha Tyler hosts as regulars Wayne Brady, Ryan Stiles, and Colin Mochrie are joined by guest performer Gary Anthony Williams and an impressive star guest - sumo star Byamba

programme.title: Whose Line Is It Anyway? USA
programme.desc: Aisha Tyler hosts as regulars Wayne Brady, Ryan Stiles, and Colin Mochrie are joined by guest performer Jeff Davis and star guest Nolan Gould (Modern Family)

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Randy comes to terms with his role in the Covid-19 outbreak and the children head back to school after lockdown but nothing resembles normality

programme.title: Kevin Bridges: The Brand New Tour
programme.desc: A stand-up performance filmed as part of Kevins 2018 UK and Ireland tour and his 19-night residency at the Glasgow Hydro. The comic gives his take on the modern world, social media, anxiety, religion, conversations with his dog and having Barack Obama as his support act

programme.title: The Daily Show
programme.desc: A satirical sideswipe at the latest in news and current affairs

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with Rachels Going Away Party
programme.desc: The gang throws a going-away party for Rachel, but she prefers to say her goodbyes individually - and one of her friends is left feeling hurt at being overlooked. Meanwhile, Monica supervises the packing for a new life in the suburbs with Chandler, while also keeping a close eye on the mother of their future adopted child

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One After Ross Says Rachel
programme.desc: Despite Rosss massive blunder, he and Emily go through with the wedding - but she is clearly devastated and sneaks out of a window at the reception, declaring she never wants to see him again. Guest starring Helen Baxendale, Elliott Gould and Jennifer Saunders

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with Monica and Chandlers Wedding - Part One
programme.desc: Part one of two. Chandlers nerves get the better of him on the eve of his wedding and he disappears, leading to a frantic search by Ross. Joey rehearses for a film role with a major star, while Phoebe and Rachel make a startling discovery. Comedy, guest starring Kathleen Turner, Elliott Gould and Gary Oldman

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with Monica and Chandlers Wedding - Part Two
programme.desc: Part two of two. The gang continues to search for the missing Chandler, who is still suffering a severe case of premarital jitters. Joey tries desperately to be released from his role in a major film so he can act as minister at the wedding. Gary Oldman and Kathleen Turner guest star

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Rachel tries to decide what to do next, while Phoebe takes some of the heat off her by claiming she is the one who is pregnant. Chandler has trouble on the dance floor and Joey tries to impress an important Broadway producer with his acting ability. Jennifer Aniston and Lisa Kudrow star

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with the Red Sweater
programme.desc: Joey becomes convinced Phoebe is pregnant and proposes to her so she will not have to be a single mother - but Monica quickly tells him the truth. Meanwhile, Chandler and Ross misplace the disposable cameras used during the wedding

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Rachel reveals the identity of the father of her baby, while Chandler and Monica go on their honeymoon, but are constantly upstaged by another couple who get preferential treatment wherever they go

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Ross and Rachels attempt to explain how they ended up in bed together descends into an argument about who made the first move - until Ross shocks everyone by announcing he captured the whole encounter on videotape. David Schwimmer and Jennifer Aniston star

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Ross is horrified to learn Rachel is going on a date with a handsome soap star, and Chandler sabotages a quirky workmates chances of promotion. Meanwhile, Phoebe is attracted to a cute but clumsy chef whom Monica plans to fire. Jennifer Aniston and Courteney Cox star

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with the Halloween Party
programme.desc: Phoebe finds herself attracted to flighty twin sister Ursulas fiance as the gang has fun at Monicas Halloween party. The Bings dress up as Catwoman and a pink bunny, and Rachel tries to kick-start her maternal instincts with a host of trick-or-treaters. Guest starring Sean Penn

programme.title: Definitely, Maybe (2008)
programme.desc: A New York advertising executive on the eve of his divorce tells his daughter about his love life before he was married, including how he met her mother. However, he changes the names of his former lovers, leaving the girl - and viewers - to guess which one of three women he ended up marrying. Romantic comedy, starring Ryan Reynolds, Abigail Breslin, Elizabeth Banks, Rachel Weisz and Isla Fisher

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Pregnant Rachel considers moving out, prompting Ross to tell her about a vacancy in his building, and Joey creates a nursery to persuade her to stay. Eric dumps Ursula for twin sister Phoebe, and Monica suspects her new maid could be stealing her jeans - among other things. Guest starring Sean Penn

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Rachel finally tells her father she is pregnant, prompting him to confront Ross - who is just snuggling up to new girlfriend Mona. Monica feels guilty about denying Chandler a stripper on his stag night so she books one to make amends - but he gets a lot more than he bargained for

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: The gang celebrates Thanksgiving and Monica invites old high-school friend Will, the only student who was fatter than her - unaware of his animosity toward Rachel. Meanwhile, Chandler and Phoebe try to avoid helping in the kitchen and Joey vows to eat an entire turkey. Guest starring Brad Pitt

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Phoebe discovers Ben goes to school with Stings son and immediately sets about trying to wangle free concert tickets. Rachel mediates between an angry Joey and his pregnant sister, while Monica spends a fortune on a new pair of boots - only to find they hurt her feet. Guest starring Trudie Styler

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with the Creepy Holiday Card
programme.desc: Rachels hormones act up, prompting her to proposition Joey, and Chandlers newly divorced boss takes him to a strip club, convinced he and Monica are having problems. Meanwhile, Ross is disturbed to learn girlfriend Mona wants them to send out joint Christmas cards like a married couple

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Joey Dates Rachel
programme.desc: Rachel hits the town with Joey to coach him for a big date the following night, but the pair are so compatible they begin to see each other in a different light. Chandler sets a new record on Monicas game machine, and Ross teaches a class on the other side of town

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Chandler Takes a Bath
programme.desc: Monica mistakenly believes Joey is infatuated with Phoebe, and Chandler discovers the pleasures of a scented bath. Rachel vows not to find out the sex of her unborn child

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with the Secret Closet
programme.desc: A concerned Joey takes Rachel to the hospital and realises his romantic feelings for her could be excluding Ross from the joys of fatherhood. Chandler becomes obsessed with learning the contents of a secret closet and Monica shocks Phoebe by responding rather too enthusiastically to a massage

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with the Birthing Video
programme.desc: Monica prepares a Valentines Day surprise for Chandler, while Ross has difficulty telling girlfriend Mona that Rachel has moved in. Phoebe tries to lift Joeys spirits by bringing him a remarkably cheerful dog. Starring Courteney Cox

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Joey Tells Rachel
programme.desc: Ross has difficulty coming to terms with Joeys revelation, but eventually persuades him to tell Rachel how he feels about her, regardless of the consequences. Meanwhile, Chandler is disturbed by Phoebes new boyfriend, who shares a number of personality traits with Monica

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with the Tea Leaves
programme.desc: Joey avoids all contact with Rachel, so she tries to repair their friendship by telling him a big lie. Phoebe believes the tea leaves foretell she is about to meet the man of her dreams, and Ross tries to recover his favourite pink shirt from former girlfriend Monas apartment. Guest starring Alec Baldwin

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Monica is upstaged by superior public speaker Ross while giving the toast at a wedding anniversary party for their parents - who cause outrage by asking pregnant Rachel to pretend she is married. Meanwhile, Phoebes boyfriend drives the gang crazy with his boundless enthusiasm. Guest starring Alec Baldwin

programme.title: Michael McIntyres The Wheel
programme.desc: The comedian hosts the game show in which contestants take on a colossal spinning wheel and answer questions in the hope of securing a cash prize. Celebrity experts offering advice are Russell T Davies on Doctor Who, AJ Odudu on fitness, Deborah Meaden on business, Lucy Beaumont on chocolate, Harry Redknapp on football, William Hanson on etiquette and Bash the Entertainer on social media

programme.title: The Longest Yard (2005)
programme.desc: A washed-up quarterback ends up in jail after a drunken night out, and is ordered by the warden to put together an American football team to take on the guards, with the help of a former college champ. Remake of 1974 comedy The Mean Machine, with Adam Sandler, Chris Rock, Nelly and Burt Reynolds, who starred in the original

programme.desc: Extended highlights of the irreverent panel show hosted by Jimmy Carr, with team captains Jon Richardson and Sean Lock being joined by guests to answer questions based on opinion polls carried out around the country to see who best understands what is going on in Britain today

programme.desc: Rachel returns from Greece and Chandler proves popular with the womenfolk. Phoebe feels upset about missing out on all the excitement in London, so the gang decides to treat her to a weekend in Atlantic City. Comedy, starring Jennifer Aniston and Matthew Perry

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Surrogate mum Phoebe goes into labour and gives birth to triplets, but it proves harder than she anticipated to hand them over to her brother. Meanwhile, Joey experiences some pain of his own and Monica plans to spite Chandler by dating a male nurse

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Though Joey is thrilled when his name is used in a magazine crossword puzzle, he is reluctant to let the publication do a profile of him after his last magazine interview got him fired. Rachel persuades him to reconsider so that he can mention her, though Joey insists all his friends be present to ensure he does not say anything too controversial this time

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with the Baby Shower
programme.desc: Rachel panics at the thought of caring for her baby and reluctantly agrees to her mother moving in - much to Rosss annoyance. Chandler tries to help Joey prepare for his audition as a TV quiz show host by constantly playing a baffling game

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with the Cooking Class
programme.desc: Phoebe holds a job interview coaching session for a nervous Chandler, and Ross unwittingly makes Rachel jealous by flirting with a sales assistant. Monica is stung by a restaurant reviewers comments and joins his cookery class to persuade him to reconsider his opinion

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Rachel Is Late
programme.desc: Phoebe and Monica have fun placing bets on when Rachels overdue baby will arrive, while Chandler accompanies Joey to the premiere of his new film - and promptly falls asleep

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Rachel Has a Baby - Part One
programme.desc: Part one of two. As Rachels labour begins and expectant father Ross paces the corridors, the rest of the gang finds the hospital the perfect place for romance. Phoebe courts a handsome patient, while Monica and Chandler decide there is no time like the present to start a family of their own

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Rachel Has a Baby - Part Two
programme.desc: Part two of two. Rachel finally gives birth after enduring 21 hours in labour - but Phoebe cannot understand why Ross and the new mother are apart. Meanwhile, Joey finds Rosss engagement ring and accidently proposes to the vulnerable new mother

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where No One Proposes
programme.desc: Joey tries to tell Rachel that he did not really propose, but cannot get a moment alone with her. Monica and Chandler continue trying for a baby - much to the horror of Mr Geller, who catches them in the caretakers cupboard

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Chandler falls asleep in a meeting - with disastrous consequences. Meanwhile, Rachel desperately searches for a solution to baby Emmas non-stop crying and Ross breaks his finger trying to punch Joey

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Monica accepts a job as chef at arenownedManhattan restaurant, while Chandler decides to split his working week between Tulsa and New York. Phoebe and Joey agree to find dates for each other and Rachels paediatrician drops her from his list of clients because she keeps pestering him about Emma

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Phoebes fear that she may be about to lose her latest boyfriend is compounded by Rosss foolish comments. Monica makes a startling discovery about Chandler while visiting him in Tulsa, and Joey is upset to learn his date does not remember having previously slept with him

programme.title: Dr Dolittle (1998)
programme.desc: A doctor is stunned to discover he can talk to animals, and it is not long before his home and surgery are taken over by an assortment of ailing creatures in need of help. However, when the medics odd behaviour attracts his colleagues attention, he is forced to rely on his new-found furry friends to save him from the asylum. Comedy, starring Eddie Murphy, Ossie Davis and Oliver Platt

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with Phoebes Birthday Dinner
programme.desc: The pals eagerly look forward to Phoebes birthday dinner at a fancy restaurant, but Chandler and Monica have an argument just before setting off. Meanwhile, Ross creates a domestic crisis by locking himself and Rachel out of the flat - with Emma inside. Directed by and starring David Schwimmer, with Jennifer Aniston

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with the Male Nanny
programme.desc: Ross mocks Rachels decision to hire a sensitive male nanny, while Phoebes love life is complicated by the return of former boyfriend David, who left for a job in Minsk but now wants to rekindle their relationship. Guest starring Freddie Prinze Jr and Hank Azaria

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with Rosss Inappropriate Song
programme.desc: Ross makes Emma laugh by singing Baby Got Back, while Joey and Chandler find an incriminating video in Richards old apartment with a familiar face in a leading role. Phoebe fails to impress her boyfriends parents, who encourage him to date someone else, forcing him to declare his love for her

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with Rachels Other Sister
programme.desc: Rachels sister Amy joins the gang for Thanksgiving, and Monica worries about her best china getting damaged. Meanwhile, Joey forgets to turn up for the Days of Our Lives cast float. Guest starring Christina Applegate

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with Rachels Phone Number
programme.desc: Chandler returns from Tulsa to visit Monica, but has to hide from Joey after rejecting his offer of free basketball tickets. Rachel goes out with Phoebe for a night on the town, while Ross and Mike find they have nothing in common

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with Christmas in Tulsa
programme.desc: Chandler feels glum at having to spend Christmas in Tulsa, so a workmate stays behind to keep him company. Unfortunately, she ends up making a pass at him, prompting him to take drastic action and quit his job altogether. Guest starring Selma Blair

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Rachel Goes Back to Work
programme.desc: Rachel visits work to show off her baby and immediately clashes with the temp standing in for her, convinced he is trying to steal her job. Phoebe causes havoc on the set of Joeys TV show, while Chandler and Monica reconsider starting a family. Guest starring Dermot Mulroney

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Rachel tries to make amends with work rival Gavin, but realises she will never get along with him. Ross urges Joey to stay away from Emmas new nanny, while Phoebe and Mike adopt a litter of rats. Melissa George and Dermot Mulroney guest star

programme.title: Austin Powers: International Man of Mystery (1997)
programme.desc: A velvet-clad, sex-crazed secret agent from the 1960s agrees to be put into a state of suspended animation after his arch-enemy escapes justice. Thirty years later he is defrosted to do battle with the power-mad villain again, but the mission proves nearly as daunting for him as getting to grips with 1990s social values. Spoof spy adventure, with Mike Myers, Elizabeth Hurley, Mimi Rogers, Michael York and Robert Wagner

programme.title: Iain Stirlings Roast the Internet
programme.desc: Iain is joined by Katherine Ryan, Layton Williams and Amy Gledhill to mock internet nonsense, ripping into bizarre cleaning hacks, drama-filled comment sections and viral disasters

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats
programme.desc: Extended highlights of the irreverent panel show hosted by Jimmy Carr, with team captains Jon Richardson and Sean Lock being joined by guests to answer questions based on opinion polls carried out around the country to see who best understands what is going on in Britain today

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Uncut
programme.desc: Extended highlights edition of the 2011 series of the irreverent panel show hosted by Jimmy Carr, with team captains Jon Richardson and Sean Lock. Guests include Charlie Brooker, Sarah Millican, Gok Wan, Jack Dee, Jedward, Amy Childs, Micky Flanagan and Jack Whitehall

programme.title: Whose Line Is It Anyway? USA
programme.desc: Aisha Tyler welcomes actor Malcolm Goodwin to the comic improv show, with regulars Wayne Brady, Gary Anthony Williams, Colin Mochrie and Ryan Stiles

programme.title: Utopia
programme.desc: Tonys holiday is derailed by the arrival of a new minister, a wifi upgrade and Rhonda. Plans for an infrastructure conference become complicated when Karsten gets involved

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Rachel Has a Baby - Part One
programme.desc: Part one of two. As Rachels labour begins and expectant father Ross paces the corridors, the rest of the gang finds the hospital the perfect place for romance. Phoebe courts a handsome patient, while Monica and Chandler decide there is no time like the present to start a family of their own

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Rachel Has a Baby - Part Two
programme.desc: Part two of two. Rachel finally gives birth after enduring 21 hours in labour - but Phoebe cannot understand why Ross and the new mother are apart. Meanwhile, Joey finds Rosss engagement ring and accidently proposes to the vulnerable new mother

programme.title: Bradley and Barney Walsh: Breaking Dad
programme.desc: The actor and his son embark a 3,000-mile journey through Europe, aiming to experience extremes from the fiery heat of the Mediterranean to the icy tundras of the Arctic Circle. They begin in Croatia, where they swing off the roof of Hajduk Splits football stadium, before diving headfirst into the crystal-clear waters of the Adriatic. The action continues when the pair go head-to-head on aqua bikes alongside a former world champion, before heading to the capital Zagreb to meet a young inventor, who stuns them with his electric creation

programme.title: Bradley and Barney Walsh: Breaking Dad
programme.desc: The actor and his son head to Hungary, where they take to the open waters of Lake Balaton for a spot of high-speed catamaran sailing with an Olympic crew, before warming up in their RV with some goulash. The pair finish in the capital Budapest, where Barney has arranged to meet a world-famous escapologist

programme.title: Michael McIntyres Big Show
programme.desc: The comedians Saturday night entertainment showcase continues, as celebrity couple and TV presenting duo Marvin and Rochelle Humes both hand over their phones for the shows first-ever double Send-to-All. Pop-rock outfit The Vamps perform on-stage, and Michael showcases some of his new material. Plus, an extra in an in-production advert suddenly finds himself under the spotlight as the Unexpected Star of the Show

programme.title: Whose Line Is It Anyway? USA
programme.desc: Aisha Tyler hosts as regulars Wayne Brady, Ryan Stiles, and Colin Mochrie are joined by guest performer Gary Anthony Williams and an impressive star guest - sumo star Byamba

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray lies to Debra, pretending he has bought her something extra special for Christmas - then has to seek Roberts advice to choose a gift that lives up to his extravagant claims. Comedy, starring Ray Romano and Brad Garrett

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Frank blithely starts helping himself to the snacks on sale in a local supermarket - much to the anger of the manager, who wastes no time in confronting him. Comedy, starring Peter Boyle, with Jeff Garlin

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray impulsively agrees to start sharing the childrens washing facilities so that Debra can have the bathroom to herself - but soon regrets acting so hastily. Ray Romano stars, with Patricia Heaton and Peter Boyle

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra and Ray happily befriend a new couple - whose annoying eight-year-old son Spencer insists on making a nuisance of himself. Ray Romano stars

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Robert becomes convinced he has found the perfect woman, but Ray witnesses something that makes him think otherwise. Brad Garrett and Ray Romano star

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Marie starts wearing glasses and begins to see the family in a new light, while Robert gets back together with Amy and invites her to a Thanksgiving dinner. Doris Roberts, Ray Romano and Brad Garrett star

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray loses his wedding ring and is propositioned by an attractive woman at the airport, so a jealous Debra decides to get her own back - with disastrous results. Ray Romano and Patricia Heaton star

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray and Debra try to conceal an embarrassing accident by telling Frank they fell down the stairs, sending him into a DIY frenzy that puts him in hospital

programme.desc: A chance to buy bargains galore

programme.title: Michael McIntyres Big Show
programme.desc: The lively comedians family entertainment series returns, as Michael invites more stars to perform in front of a live audience at Londons Theatre Royal on Drury Lane. For this first edition, chart-topping, Grammy-nominated singer Ellie Goulding performs, and the cast of Andrew Lloyd Webbers new West End production School of Rock also take to the stage. An unsuspecting member of the public is dragged into the limelight when they become the Unexpected Star of the Show, and Michael gets up to more mischief when Olly Murs hands over his smartphone in Celebrity Send to All

programme.title: Bradley and Barney Walsh: Breaking Dad
programme.desc: Bradley is on the mend following his rodeo injury and determined to get back behind the wheel of the RV. As the pair continue on their journey, Barney is thrilled to be celebrating his birthday with a trip to the iconic Niagara Falls. Later, Bradley and Barney take the RV on a small cargo ferry as they head to Vermont. Here, the pair have a go at ice climbing, which proves treacherous for them and the crew, before a spot of dog sledding through the frozen wilderness and an inevitable race through the forests

programme.title: Bradley and Barney Walsh: Breaking Dad
programme.desc: On the final leg of their journey, the pair continue through the snow to New Hampshire. Here, they meet rally-driving champion Tim ONeil who gives them a crash course in driving in the ice and snow before they take on an intense time trial. The pair travel on to Maine, where they take part in some wilderness training, before bidding farewell to the RV and heading out into the extremely choppy seas for some lobster fishing. Before heading home, the pair look back on some of their favourite moments from the trip

programme.title: Bradley and Barney Walsh: Breaking Dad
programme.desc: The actor and his son hit the road together again, but this time they are staying closer to home and heading for Europe as they travel from Essex to Italys Amalfi coast. Their first stop is the Netherlands, where they try out the sport of canal jumping, before the pair don Lycra for a spot of velodrome track cycling alongside a world champion, and take on the worlds tallest freestanding climbing wall

programme.title: Bradley and Barney Walsh: Breaking Dad
programme.desc: Bradley and Barney continue their European adventure in Germany. They head to the city of Frankfurt, where Brad is pushed to the edge, literally, as he attempts to abseil down the side of a building, facing forwards. The boys also make a stop at a bratwurst-themed hotel and soak up some local Bavarian culture when they have a go at finger wrestling. The pair finish off their time in Germany with a wet and wild adventure in the mountains

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Chandler Takes a Bath
programme.desc: Monica mistakenly believes Joey is infatuated with Phoebe, and Chandler discovers the pleasures of a scented bath. Rachel vows not to find out the sex of her unborn child

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with the Secret Closet
programme.desc: A concerned Joey takes Rachel to the hospital and realises his romantic feelings for her could be excluding Ross from the joys of fatherhood. Chandler becomes obsessed with learning the contents of a secret closet and Monica shocks Phoebe by responding rather too enthusiastically to a massage

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with the Birthing Video
programme.desc: Monica prepares a Valentines Day surprise for Chandler, while Ross has difficulty telling girlfriend Mona that Rachel has moved in. Phoebe tries to lift Joeys spirits by bringing him a remarkably cheerful dog. Starring Courteney Cox

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Joey Tells Rachel
programme.desc: Ross has difficulty coming to terms with Joeys revelation, but eventually persuades him to tell Rachel how he feels about her, regardless of the consequences. Meanwhile, Chandler is disturbed by Phoebes new boyfriend, who shares a number of personality traits with Monica

programme.title: Bradley and Barney Walsh: Breaking Dad
programme.desc: The actor and his son continue their European adventure in Slovenia, where Brads passion for bikes gives Barney an excuse to take his dad motocross racing. They meet a beekeeper and are treated to some unusual honey therapies, before joining the national quidditch team in the capital Ljubljana, and having a go at the notoriously dangerous sport of ski jumping

programme.title: Bradley and Barney Walsh: Breaking Dad
programme.desc: The actor and his son continue their European adventure in Switzerland, where they take a ride on a mountain rollercoaster before exercising their vocal chords when they try the Swiss tradition of yodelling. The following day, Barney arranges a unique way for them to enjoy some local cheese, and then drive to the Contra Dam, where Barney reveals they are about to attempt one of James Bonds most famous stunts

programme.title: Bradley and Barney Walsh: Breaking Dad
programme.desc: The duo continue their European adventure in Italy, starting in the picturesque Lake Garda, where Barney surprises his dad by explaining theyll be running off the top of Monte Baldo and paragliding over the lake below. The next day Bradley is treated to a hair-raising ride in a Formula 1 speed boat, before the Walshes are invited to the home of opera superstar Andrea Bocelli

programme.title: Bradley and Barney Walsh: Breaking Dad
programme.desc: The duo embark on the final leg of their European road trip as they explore more of Italy, engaging in gladiatorial combat in Rome, before continuing south and making a stop to soak up the views from a sky-high zipwire. As they reach their final stop on the Amalfi Coast, they get the chance to swim in the sea, but theyll have to dive in from a cliff

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: The Barones watch Geoffrey having trouble getting the hang of a game, but Ray learns the hard way that his sons lack of ability should not interfere with his enjoyment

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debras divorced parents join the Barones for Thanksgiving - but her father puts a damper on the festivities by bringing a date. Comedy, starring Ray Romano, Patricia Heaton, Brad Garrett and Doris Roberts

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Robert encounters a beautiful woman who learns his surname is Barone and mistakenly assumes he is Raymond - a situation he is quick to turn to his romantic advantage. Brad Garrett stars

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Frank catches a football at a college game and refuses to give it back. He tries instead to auction it over the radio for $10,000 - much to the horror of Ray, who tries to make him feel guilty for being so mercenary

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Marie receives a letter in which a relative boasts about how well her children are doing, and responds by enlisting Debras help to concoct a fictitious catalogue of her own familys achievements. Doris Roberts and Ray Romano star

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with the Tea Leaves
programme.desc: Joey avoids all contact with Rachel, so she tries to repair their friendship by telling him a big lie. Guest starring Alec Baldwin

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Monica is upstaged by superior public speaker Ross while giving the toast at a wedding anniversary party for their parents - who cause outrage by asking pregnant Rachel to pretend she is married. Meanwhile, Phoebes boyfriend drives the gang crazy with his boundless enthusiasm. Guest starring Alec Baldwin

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Though Joey is thrilled when his name is used in a magazine crossword puzzle, he is reluctant to let the publication do a profile of him after his last magazine interview got him fired. programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with the Baby Shower

programme.desc: Phoebe holds a job interview coaching session for a nervous Chandler, and Ross unwittingly makes Rachel jealous by flirting with a sales assistant. Monica is stung by a restaurant reviewers comments and joins his cookery class to persuade him to reconsider his opinion

programme.desc: Chandler falls asleep in a meeting - with disastrous consequences. Meanwhile, Rachel desperately searches for a solution to baby Emmas non-stop crying and Ross breaks his finger trying to punch Joey

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Rachel tries to decide what to do next, while Phoebe takes some of the heat off her by claiming she is the one who is pregnant. Chandler has trouble on the dance floor and Joey tries to impress an important Broadway producer with his acting ability. Jennifer Aniston and Lisa Kudrow star

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with the Red Sweater
programme.desc: Joey becomes convinced Phoebe is pregnant and proposes to her so she will not have to be a single mother - but Monica quickly tells him the truth. Meanwhile, Chandler and Ross misplace the disposable cameras used during the wedding

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Rachel reveals the identity of the father of her baby, while Chandler and Monica go on their honeymoon, but are constantly upstaged by another couple who get preferential treatment wherever they go

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Ross and Rachels attempt to explain how they ended up in bed together descends into an argument about who made the first move - until Ross shocks everyone by announcing he captured the whole encounter on videotape. David Schwimmer and Jennifer Aniston star

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Ross is horrified to learn Rachel is going on a date with a handsome soap star, and Chandler sabotages a quirky workmates chances of promotion. Meanwhile, Phoebe is attracted to a cute but clumsy chef whom Monica plans to fire. Jennifer Aniston and Courteney Cox star

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with the Halloween Party
programme.desc: Phoebe finds herself attracted to flighty twin sister Ursulas fiance as the gang has fun at Monicas Halloween party. The Bings dress up as Catwoman and a pink bunny, and Rachel tries to kick-start her maternal instincts with a host of trick-or-treaters. Guest starring Sean Penn

programme.title: Definitely, Maybe (2008)
programme.desc: A New York advertising executive on the eve of his divorce tells his daughter about his love life before he was married, including how he met her mother. However, he changes the names of his former lovers, leaving the girl - and viewers - to guess which one of three women he ended up marrying. Romantic comedy, starring Ryan Reynolds, Abigail Breslin, Elizabeth Banks, Rachel Weisz and Isla Fisher

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Pregnant Rachel considers moving out, prompting Ross to tell her about a vacancy in his building, and Joey creates a nursery to persuade her to stay. programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Rachel finally tells her father she is pregnant, prompting him to confront Ross - who is just snuggling up to new girlfriend Mona. Monica feels guilty about denying Chandler a stripper on his stag night so she books one to make amends - but he gets a lot more than he bargained for

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: The gang celebrates Thanksgiving and Monica invites old high-school friend Will, the only student who was fatter than her - unaware of his animosity toward Rachel. Meanwhile, Chandler and Phoebe try to avoid helping in the kitchen and Joey vows to eat an entire turkey. Guest starring Brad Pitt

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Phoebe discovers Ben goes to school with Stings son and immediately sets about trying to wangle free concert tickets. Rachel mediates between an angry Joey and his pregnant sister, while Monica spends a fortune on a new pair of boots - only to find they hurt her feet. Guest starring Trudie Styler

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with the Creepy Holiday Card
programme.desc: Rachels hormones act up, prompting her to proposition Joey, and Chandlers newly divorced boss takes him to a strip club, convinced he and Monica are having problems. Meanwhile, Ross is disturbed to learn girlfriend Mona wants them to send out joint Christmas cards like a married couple

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Joey Dates Rachel

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Chandler Takes a Bath
programme.desc: Monica mistakenly believes Joey is infatuated with Phoebe, and Chandler discovers the pleasures of a scented bath. Rachel vows not to find out the sex of her unborn child

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with the Secret Closet
programme.desc: A concerned Joey takes Rachel to the hospital and realises his romantic feelings for her could be excluding Ross from the joys of fatherhood. Chandler becomes obsessed with learning the contents of a secret closet and Monica shocks Phoebe by responding rather too enthusiastically to a massage

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with the Birthing Video
programme.desc: Monica prepares a Valentines Day surprise for Chandler, while Ross has difficulty telling girlfriend Mona that Rachel has moved in. Phoebe tries to lift Joeys spirits by bringing him a remarkably cheerful dog. Starring Courteney Cox

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Joey Tells Rachel
programme.desc: Ross has difficulty coming to terms with Joeys revelation, but eventually persuades him to tell Rachel how he feels about her, regardless of the consequences. Meanwhile, Chandler is disturbed by Phoebes new boyfriend, who shares a number of personality traits with Monica

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with the Tea Leaves
programme.desc: Joey avoids all contact with Rachel, so she tries to repair their friendship by telling him a big lie. Guest starring Alec Baldwin

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Monica is upstaged by superior public speaker Ross while giving the toast at a wedding anniversary party for their parents - who cause outrage by asking pregnant Rachel to pretend she is married. programme.desc: Monica accepts a job as chef at arenownedManhattan restaurant, while Chandler decides to split his working week between Tulsa and New York. Victory is achieved against another brickbot by either pushing it out of the arena, popping the balloon on its back, with the help of a drawing pin, or sending it through the trapdoor of doom. There are three one-on-one battles, with the winner of each going on to fight in the three-brickbot grand final. The winner of the grand final secures the Big Brick.
