Meanwhile, Gloria gives Mannys date a makeover, and Claire wages war against Phils universal remote control. Guest starring Chazz Palminteri (Bullets Over Broadway)

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Fiery chef Gordon Ramsay comes to the aid of a mother-and-son team who have gone through 20 chefs in two years at their struggling Italian restaurant in California. The adjoining bar is a triumph, but the oldest dining establishment in town needs an overhaul if the inexperienced owners are to make a profit

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: In the conclusion of Gordon Ramsays visit to La Galleria 33 in Boston, Massachusetts, he confronts sisters Rita and Lisa with an ultimatum, and finds himself stuck in a war between the waiters, chefs and owners over who is to blame for the Italian restaurants failings

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: The couples have met their alternate matches, but now its time for the real drama - getting them to watch videos of how their spouses behaved

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: The final dinner party arrives and its a time for celebration and consternation in equal measure. While some of the couples are stronger than ever following the test of meeting their alternate matches, others are left picking up the pieces after a tumultuous week. For one pair, its all too much - their marriage ends tonight

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Marge astonishes Homer and the kids by landing the role of Blanche DuBois in an amateur production of A Streetcar Named Desire - and her performance is boosted by her frustration with Homer. With the guest voice of Jon Lovitz

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: The Mook, the Chef, the Wife and Her Homer
programme.desc: Homer volunteers to take Fat Tonys place as the head of the local Mafia, dragging the rest of the Simpson family into Springfields criminal underworld. With the guest voices of metal band Metallica and Sopranos stars Joe Pantoliano and Michael Imperioli

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Moe becomes a successful poet with Lisas help, and wins the approval of a group of highbrow authors - but enjoys the limelight so much that he claims all the credit for himself, prompting her to seek revenge

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart becomes Nelsons best friend and revels in the protection his new status brings. Unfortunately, the situation means he is unable to see Milhouse - forcing the pair to meet in secret. Meanwhile, Homer becomes addicted to one of Lisas fantasy books

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Mystery and intrigue comes to Springfield as a British secret agent arrives in search of a spy. With the voice of Stephen Fry

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Moe breaks the most sacred rule of a secret society of bartenders, who seek the ultimate vengeance on Homer and his friends

programme.title: The Amazing Race Australia
programme.desc: The top five teams join the circus in Cambodias second-largest city, Siem Reap. Bicycles prove harder to ride than anticipated, before a fiddly final challenge to craft silk from lotus flowers brings mud, sweat and tears. Also, one team melt down as they face an arduous extra task that jeopardises their place in the final four

programme.title: Titanic (1997)
programme.desc: A party of explorers studying the sunken remains of the famous liner meets an elderly woman who was a passenger on the ill-fated maiden voyage. She recounts how she boarded the ship while on the brink of being forced into marriage by her family, and was stopped from killing herself by a penniless artist. She fell in love with her saviour, but the disaster on the horizon meant their time together was doomed to be short. James Camerons Oscar-winning romantic drama, starring Kate Winslet, Leonardo DiCaprio, Billy Zane, Kathy Bates and Bill Paxton

programme.title: Copshop (2021)
programme.desc: On the run from an assassin, a wily con artist devises a scheme to hide out inside a small-town police station. However, when the hitman turns up at the precinct, an unsuspecting rookie cop finds herself caught in the crosshairs. Thriller, starring Gerard Butler and Frank Grillo

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on what they have been watching during the week, with cameras capturing their instant reactions to Heartstopper, Made in Chelsea, The Circle, Ross Kemp: Shipwreck Treasure Hunter, Bee Czar, Gordon Ramsays Future Food Stars, and BBC News coverage of the local elections

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics scrutinise The Masked Singer, Trigger Point, Pam and Tommy, First Dates: Valentines, Dancing on Ice, Dragons Den, Mary Beards Forgotten Art, and offer their take of a BBC News report on the rising cost of living

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on programmes including Love Is Blind, Starstruck, Cheaters, Celebrity Help! My House Is Haunted, Bradley and Barney Walsh: Breaking Dad, Teen First Dates and Sophie Raworths Sunday Morning interview with Boris Johnson. Plus, an appraisal of the coverage of the coronavirus on BBC News. From February 2022

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Married couple Abbie and Charlie join host Anna Richardson and feature as the first picker pair as they search for another woman to join their relationship. Plus 41 year-old actor and glamour puss Chrissie from Leeds is hoping to find husband number four

programme.title: Dont Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Groom-to-be Kain plans a gangster-themed wedding, but his fiancee Charlie has always dreamed of having a wedding day fit for a princess

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats
programme.desc: Guests Jimeoin, Joe Wilkinson, Nancy DellOlio and Greg Rutherford join team captains Jon Richardson and Sean Lock to answer questions based on opinion polls carried out around the country to see who best understands what is going on in Britain today. Irreverent panel show, hosted by Jimmy Carr

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats
programme.desc: Jimmy Carr is joined by captains Sean Lock and Jon Richardson for highlights from the latest series of the comedy panel show. A host of well-known faces make up the teams as they discuss the topical events that set the publics chins wagging

programme.title: Taskmaster Bleeped
programme.desc: Contenders Frankie Boyle, Ivo Graham, Jenny Eclair, Kiell Smith-Bynoe and Mae Martin continue to address the challenges set for them. Greg Davies has some tricky judging to do when people question the definition of the colour gold and nobody understands a simple egg-shelling task. As usual, Alex Horne offers sterling support to all concerned

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Host Jimmy Carr and team captains Sean Lock and Jon Richardson provide their irreverent take on the cosy afternoon puzzle game - showing a little less regard for the rules. Comedian Bob Mortimer and Pointless co-host Richard Osman are the guest players, while Countdown regular Susie Dent is in Dictionary Corner with funnyman Matthew Crosby, and Joe Wilkinson assists maths whizz Rachel Riley with the letters and numbers

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Husband and wife Dave and Pam kick off the competition in Gloucestershire with a farmhouse menu, as they compete against Alettia and Stuart, and Jake and Helen for the cash prize

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Three couples from east Kent host dinner parties, with the highest-scoring duo winning the cash prize of £1,000. Outspoken estate agent Sean and his girlfriend Beth kick off the competition with a Welsh-themed menu. Day two sees Marcus and Miguel lay on a Malaysian feast, but Seans teasing of his girlfriend steals the limelight. Finally its Geoff and Jills chance to shine with their hippy vibe and Indian themed menu, so its a battle of the curries. But whether their blend of spices and loved-up atmosphere is enough to bag them the grand remains to be seen

programme.title: Dont Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Childhood sweethearts Paula and Rodney plan to get married, but lack the funds to tie the knot. In return for £12,000, the pair agree to let cameras capture the planning of their nuptials, on the condition that the would-be groom is left in charge of every detail of the wedding

programme.title: Dont Tell the Bride
programme.desc: A woman who admits to being a control freak is given £12,000 to finance the wedding of her dreams - with one catch - her partner must take sole responsibility for planning the nuptials. While her husband-to-be struggles to come up with some ideas, the hopeful bride anxiously awaits the big day

programme.title: Dont Tell the Bride
programme.desc: A groom is given £12,000 to plan every detail of his nuptials and give his fiancee the wedding of her dreams. However, a rowdy stag night and the husband-to-bes eye for colour threaten to throw the brides big day into disarray

programme.title: Dont Tell the Bride
programme.desc: A couple whose nuptials have been put on hold twice due to escalating debts seek help in finally tying the knot. Looking for a way out of their stalemate, Paul and Emily appeal to the show for funds, and receive £12,000 on the condition that the groom-to-be organises the entire affair alone. The would-be husbands thirst for control means he jumps at the chance to plan the wedding

programme.title: Dont Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Football fan Wayne is given £12,000 to plan his nuptials on the condition that future wife Leanne relinquishes all control of planning the event. With this in mind, the groom-to-be sets about designing the perfect fairy-tale wedding

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Paul Quentel, president of Alfred Angelo, the second largest bridal retailer in the United States, goes undercover to solve any problems as quickly as possible. Posing as a contestant on a reality TV competition, he works among his own staff

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Mike Bloom, president and COO of discount retail chain Family Dollar, intends to double its number of stores within a few years. He decides that to do so he first needs to go incognito within the organisation to monitor where the firm is excelling and where it needs improvement

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to Brooklyn, New York, to tackle a 55-year-old family business. Owner John Esposito left school at the age of 14 and has worked at his parents restaurant, Sals Pizzeria, ever since. Their success meant they could afford to purchase the location next door in the 1990s, naming it Mama Maria after Johns mother, who died in 2002. But when he lost his father as well, John became overwhelmed by the responsibility of running both establishments and his livelihood is at risk

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to Wilkinsburg in Pennsylvania, home to Ms Jeans Southern Cuisine, which was opened by retired special-education teacher Jean Gould. During the chefs attempt to save the business from disaster, he discovers her soul-food restaurant resembles a dentists waiting room and finds a lot of tension between Jean and her employees, who claim she is a Jekyll-and-Hyde character

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The chef visits beachside restaurant Barefoot Bobs in Hull, Massachusetts, owned by husband-and-wife team Marc and Lisa. Every year profits nosedive through the bleak winter months, and matters arent improved when it becomes clear they have both lost their passion - not only for the business but also for each other. With the restaurant and marriage on the line, Gordon tries to help turn things around before its too late

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay revisits three of the most difficult cases he has taken on since the series began. First, he returns to Cafe Hon in Baltimore, Maryland, where owner Denise Whiting was trapped in a nasty battle with the community and had threatened the locals with lawsuits. Next, the chef goes back to Chiarellas in Philadelphia, Pennsylvania. When he first visited owners Tommy and Dina DeFino, the business was struggling so badly that Tommy had completely lost his confidence and wife Dina had lost her patience. On his final stop, Gordon travels to Leones in Montclair, New Jersey, where Rose Leone was depending on her lazy son Michael to run the restaurant

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to the Olde Hitching Post in Hanson, Massachusetts, where he meets a stubborn owner who doesnt react well to criticism. Tom bought the restaurant for his daughter Andrea, but six years later hes still refusing to let her run it. Can the chef break Toms iron grip on the business and persuade him to change his outdated approach?

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: A compilation of memorable moments from recent episodes, featuring hosts Jimmy Carr, Rachel Riley and Susie Dent. Guest players include Jon Richardson, Danny Dyer, John Cooper Clarke, Rob Brydon, Lucy Beaumont, Roisin Conaty, Rob Beckett, Sam Campbell, Rhod Gilbert, Joe Lycett, Jamali Maddix, Katherine Parkinson, Phil Wang, Katherine Ryan and Joe Wilkinson

programme.title: Sean Lock: Keep It Light
programme.desc: The 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown captain captured live on stage in a stand-up performance, talking about everything from the price of cinema food, accusations of him having a mid-life crisis, his behaviour on the internet and jewellery heists. From 2019

programme.title: Derry Girls
programme.desc: Lisa McGees comedy returns for a third and final series, and while there is hope that the Troubles may finally be over, the gangs troubles are only just starting as they get ever closer to adulthood. Tomorrow is GCSE results day and confidence is at rock bottom. If things go badly, how will the gang face their mammies again? Meanwhile, a new member of the Quinn household is causing chaos in the neighbourhood. Liam Neeson guest stars

programme.title: Derry Girls
programme.desc: Jenny Joyce has big plans for the fundraising talent show. Can the gang outshine the competition and put Jenny in her place once and for all? Meanwhile, Ma Mary is at the end of her rope, but salvation is just around the corner in the unlikely form of a plumber

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Uncut
programme.desc: Carol Vorderman, Chris Ramsey, Mel Giedroyc and Susan Calman join team captains Jon Richardson and Sean Lock to answer questions based on opinion polls carried out around the country. Jimmy Carr hosts

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: A compilation of memorable moments from recent episodes, featuring hosts Jimmy Carr, Rachel Riley and Susie Dent. Guest players include Jon Richardson, Danny Dyer, John Cooper Clarke, Rob Brydon, Lucy Beaumont, Roisin Conaty, Rob Beckett, Sam Campbell, Rhod Gilbert, Joe Lycett, Jamali Maddix, Katherine Parkinson, Phil Wang, Katherine Ryan and Joe Wilkinson

programme.title: Dont Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Would-be groom Richard, whose fiancee Catherine dreams of a lavish wedding, seeks the teams help in meeting her lofty requirements. Given £12,000 to plan the ceremony, he enlists the aid of his best man, but worries his friend might lead him astray

programme.title: Dont Tell the Bride
programme.desc: A couple with two daughters seek help in funding their impending nuptials. In the presence of a lawyer, would-be bride Katie agrees to hand control over planning the event to prospective husband Darnell, who is given £12,000 to put together the perfect wedding

programme.title: Dont Tell the Bride
programme.desc: A Hindu couple from Leicester who have ploughed all their savings into an ice-cream business seek help in paying for their wedding. With funds of £12,000 on the line, the groom-to-be agrees to the shows condition that he organises the occasion alone. However, his unusual planning style gives his future wife cause for concern

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Travis Boersma, co-founder and president of one of the largest privately owned drive-through coffee shop chains in America, goes undercover to learn whether the culture he and his brother hoped to implement is being upheld by the companys front-line employees

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Eric Casaburi, a former undercover boss, invites six other employers who also appeared incognito on the show to talk about their experiences of the programme at a restaurant. However, little do they realise that Eric is going to try to fool them by appearing as a waiter. Featuring Kat Cole, Paul Damico, Andy Wiederhorn, Sheldon Yellen, Anthony Wedo and Jane Grote Abell

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In Leeds, giggle monsters Gemma and Ryan kick off the competition with a menu designed to show off their fun side. Couple Jonathan and Keith put on a classic 1970s menu on the second evening, while on the last night, music-loviers Nigel and Yvonne hope their Yorkshire twist will hit the right note

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Rugby enthusiast Andy and dental nurse Holly kick off the competition in Yorkshire with a Mexican fiesta - a fun-filled evening, but with a few blunders in the kitchen. Day two sees married couple Mitesh and Jess cooking up an Indian-inspired meal, but with a couple of spice-fearing guests, they have a tough crowd to please. Finally, its the turn of Yorkshire couple Paul and Mandy to host with some proper grub. After two nights of Paul larking around he has a few surprises in and out of the kitchen to try to secure the £1,000 prize

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Red and his partner Bozey kick off the competition in south Wales with a Welsh menu. Estate agents Princess Trish and her partner Alan cook a glamorous fine-dining menu on the seond night. Alan is a real romantic and he tells his guests how far he will go to show his love for Trish, revealing his tattoos of devotion. Finally, fiances Marc and Dan put on a musical-themed feast, hoping Marcs nanas egg sauce, which has been passed down through generations, will be enough to win them the £1,000 prize

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to Beaver, Pennsylvania, where he meets a brother-and-sister team who find it almost impossible to work together. Their relationship is so fractured that theyre failing to save their fathers Italian restaurant Levantis from being overwhelmed by local competition, and the situation has become so desperate that their dad is in danger of losing his life savings

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay visits Sams Mediterranean Kabob Room in Monrovia, California, and within minutes of his arrival, is caught in the crossfire of an argument between the owner, his wife and their children, all of whom are feeling the pressure of working seven days a week. Can the chef save the business and mend the warring familys frayed relationships?

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to the coastal community of Long Beach, California, to save an Italian restaurant that was opened in 1958 and now under the misguided leadership of Nino, who blamed by brother Michael and sister Carina for the eaterys failings. Their 78-year-old mother Inge desperate for Nino to turn the business around, but the feuding family members will have to solve their differences first

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay continues his travels across America saving failing restaurants from disaster. In the first of two visits to Mill Street Bistro in Norwalk, Ohio, the chef encounters Joe Nagy, who claims he has the best menu from New York to Los Angeles. However, his servers and diners tell a different story, and his resistance to change leads to some explosive confrontations

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: In the concluding part of his trip to the Mill Street Bistro in Norwalk, Ohio, Gordons disagreement with proprietor Joe Nagy erupts into one of his most intense confrontations yet. Just when it looks like he has turned the corner and is ready to accept help, Joe slips back into his old ways, denying his own failings and picking petty fights. Can Gordon get this stubborn owner to finally accept his advice and secure the future of his restaurant?

programme.title: Taskmaster Bleeped
programme.desc: No-naughty-bits version. As the series reaches its halfway point, the Taskmaster is starting to know what to expect from his current crop of comics. But even hes surprised by the outrage Armando Iannucci causes with an ostrich, how Amy Gledhill struggles to remember the word for tube, and what Kumail Nanjiani does to time itself. Meanwhile, Joel Dommett has hours of fun with pots and pans, and Joanna Page and Alex Horne have an intimate conversation about guinea pigs while they wait for Armando to come and join them

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Jimmy Carr hosts the game show mash-up, with Rachel Riley and Susie Dent. Jon Richardson and Sara Pascoe take on Sean Lock and Richard Ayoade. Nick Helm joins Susie in Dictionary Corner

programme.title: Bill Baileys Remarkable Guide to the Orchestra
programme.desc: The comedian joins forces with Oscar-winning composer Anne Dudley to investigate some of the finer nuances of orchestral performance. He teams up with the BBC Concert Orchestra to reveal the lesser-known influences of some of the worlds most celebrated composers, and exhibits some of his own original works

programme.title: Derry Girls
programme.desc: The Quinns excitedly prepare for the annual trip to Barrys amusement park in Portrush. Surely an unfeasible amount of sandwiches and a massive surfboard is all they could need? Well, that and everyone making the train

programme.title: Derry Girls
programme.desc: Jamess driving skills are put to the test as the gang set off with a van full of hooch and high hopes to an adult-free house in Donegal. Meanwhile, the Quinns visit local psychic Carlos Santini in the hope of making contact with a much-loved family spirit. Conleth Hill guest stars

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers
programme.desc: Sketch impeaches Lewyss presidential inking, Alice sheds some light on Rayas tasteless tunnel tatt, and Pash declares war on Rihannas disastrous declaration

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats
programme.desc: Team captains Sean Lock and Jon Richardson are joined by guests Jack Dee, Steve Jones, David ODoherty and Jamelia to answer questions based on opinion polls carried out around the country to see who best understands what is going on in Britain today. Jimmy Carr hosts the topical panel show

programme.title: Derry Girls
programme.desc: The Quinns excitedly prepare for the annual trip to Barrys amusement park in Portrush. Surely an unfeasible amount of sandwiches and a massive surfboard is all they could need? Well, that and everyone making the train

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: At 90, Raymon is the oldest dater to visit the restaurant. His fellow diner is ballroom dancing enthusiast Cecelia, whos searching of a glitzy gent to sweep her off her feet. Cameras also follow brickie-turned-model Frankie, who is on the hunt for his perfect Barbie. On first impressions, glamorous PA Rosie certainly fits the bill, but can he charm her?

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Dapper 24-year-old Will is looking for a woman to share his love of the countryside, but he has never had a girlfriend and is not a natural when it comes to chatting up a lady, while lofty long-haired rocker Daniel, aka Squid, strides into the restaurant on a mission to break the rules. Mum-of-two Emma, 47, is all glammed up and ready to play the love lottery, but Cupid throws a huge surprise her way, and when the man who broke her heart walks through the door the drama begins

programme.title: Celebs Go Dating
programme.desc: The celebrities arrive on Tenerife and settle into a luxury villa. Gabby Allen dates gym-owner Karl, while David Potts heads out for a spicy dinner with fireman Tomasz

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Phil and Claire celebrate Valentines Day a little early with their traditional role-play, meaning the return of Clive and Julianna. But all romantic plans are put on hold when an unexpected turn lands Claire in hospital. Meanwhile, Jays attempt to spend some time alone with Gloria is interrupted by a series of distractions, while Cam and Mitch throw a party for all their single friends - only to end up with shocking hangovers and a new room-mate

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Mitch and Cams girlfriend Sal turns up with big news for the pair - shes getting married. How can they persuade her shes not ready to settle down? Phil gives son Luke a few tips on wooing the ladies, while Claire enjoys some quality time with Haley, before Mannys concerned art teacher draws Glorias attention to his latest crush - their new nanny. Elizabeth Banks (The Hunger Games) guest stars

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: When Ericas college graduation is completely forgotten and everyones only interested the imminent baby, she wonders if she even matters any more

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Erica asks Geoff to take her on a babymoon, far away from Beverly, whose mania about the upcoming birth is making her miserable. Adam and Barry learn how to be great uncles

programme.title: Dont Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Groom-to-be Ash wants to pull off the most romantic wedding ever, but his bride-to-be Vicki shuns anything corny

programme.title: Lego Masters Australia
programme.desc: The remaining six teams have six hours to build fighting robots, or brickbots, which will battle to the death against each other in the Brickbot Arena. Victory is achieved against another brickbot by either pushing it out of the arena, popping the balloon on its back, with the help of a drawing pin, or sending it through the trapdoor of doom. There are three one-on-one battles, with the winner of each going on to fight in the three-brickbot grand final. The winner of the grand final secures the Big Brick. Each team gets a minifig to determine the theme of their brickbot - from shark guy and the boxer to alien warrior

programme.title: The Amazing Race Australia
programme.desc: In Cambodia, the celebrity duos leave behind the majesty of Angkor Wat to navigate the waters of an incredible floating village on the mighty Tonle Sap Lake. Skills and teamwork are put to the test as the teams live like locals for a day, and its back to school for some tough lessons. After shopping for school supplies, they travel by boat to a floating classroom

programme.title: Made in Chelsea
programme.desc: Sam Prince and Livvy devise a plan to set up Chuggs and Zeyno on a date, but not everyones a fan of the blossoming romance. Alice throws a surprise party for her husband, Sam Vanderpump, but among the celebrations, the couple reveal that the reality of new parenthood is taking its toll on their relationship

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay travels to the upmarket quarter of Hollywood to help the owner of failing health-food restaurant Sante La Brea. As well as struggling to control his disrespectful staff, the proprietor receives a surprise visit from the police at the height of dinner service

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The chef travels to La Grange, a suburb of Chicago, to help the owners of Cafe 36, an upmarket bistro threatening to destroy the marriage of its owners due to the scale of their financial losses. The head chefs attitude to quality control is driving customers away, and it is up to Gordon Ramsay to turn the business around

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: In the first of a two-part edition, Gordon Ramsay heads to La Galleria 33 in Boston, Massachusetts, an Italian restaurant run by sisters Rita and Lisa. The pair grew up working at their fathers eatery nearby, but when they opened their own business, they couldnt replicate his success, and they now blame their failure on everything from the weather to the tablecloths

Also, one team melt down as they face an arduous extra task that jeopardises their place in the final four

programme.title: Titanic (1997)
programme.desc: A party of explorers studying the sunken remains of the famous liner meets an elderly woman who was a passenger on the ill-fated maiden voyage. She recounts how she boarded the ship while on the brink of being forced into marriage by her family, and was stopped from killing herself by a penniless artist. She fell in love with her saviour, but the disaster on the horizon meant their time together was doomed to be short. James Camerons Oscar-winning romantic drama, starring Kate Winslet, Leonardo DiCaprio, Billy Zane, Kathy Bates and Bill Paxton

programme.title: Copshop (2021)
programme.desc: On the run from an assassin, a wily con artist devises a scheme to hide out inside a small-town police station. However, when the hitman turns up at the precinct, an unsuspecting rookie cop finds herself caught in the crosshairs. Thriller, starring Gerard Butler and Frank Grillo

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: After nearly three months, the rollercoasters almost coming to an end. But not before one last dose of up-and-down mayhem. The remaining couples face Final Vows and the ultimate choice on whether theyre going to stay betrothed or throw the last quarter of a year of their lives into the bin

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on programmes including Love Is Blind, Starstruck, Cheaters, Celebrity Help! My House Is Haunted, Bradley and Barney Walsh: Breaking Dad, Teen First Dates and Sophie Raworths Sunday Morning interview with Boris Johnson. Plus, an appraisal of the coverage of the coronavirus on BBC News. From February 2022

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Married couple Abbie and Charlie join host Anna Richardson and feature as the first picker pair as they search for another woman to join their relationship. Plus 41 year-old actor and glamour puss Chrissie from Leeds is hoping to find husband number four

programme.title: Dont Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Groom-to-be Kain plans a gangster-themed wedding, but his fiancee Charlie has always dreamed of having a wedding day fit for a princess

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: The entire family heads to Florida to support Phil at his mothers funeral - although the bereaved estate agent struggles with his mums final wish, which is to find a new woman for his dad. Meanwhile, Gloria is arrested and ends up in court, giving Mitchell a chance to show off his finest defence techniques

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: At 90, Raymon is the oldest dater to visit the restaurant. His fellow diner is ballroom dancing enthusiast Cecelia, whos searching of a glitzy gent to sweep her off her feet. Cameras also follow brickie-turned-model Frankie, who is on the hunt for his perfect Barbie. On first impressions, glamorous PA Rosie certainly fits the bill, but can he charm her?

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Dapper 24-year-old Will is looking for a woman to share his love of the countryside, but he has never had a girlfriend and is not a natural when it comes to chatting up a lady, while lofty long-haired rocker Daniel, aka Squid, strides into the restaurant on a mission to break the rules. Mum-of-two Emma, 47, is all glammed up and ready to play the love lottery, but Cupid throws a huge surprise her way, and when the man who broke her heart walks through the door the drama begins

programme.title: Celebs Go Dating
programme.desc: The celebrities arrive on Tenerife and settle into a luxury villa. Gabby Allen dates gym-owner Karl, while David Potts heads out for a spicy dinner with fireman Tomasz

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Phil and Claire celebrate Valentines Day a little early with their traditional role-play, meaning the return of Clive and Julianna. But all romantic plans are put on hold when an unexpected turn lands Claire in hospital. Meanwhile, Jays attempt to spend some time alone with Gloria is interrupted by a series of distractions, while Cam and Mitch throw a party for all their single friends - only to end up with shocking hangovers and a new room-mate

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Mitch and Cams girlfriend Sal turns up with big news for the pair - shes getting married. How can they persuade her shes not ready to settle down? Phil gives son Luke a few tips on wooing the ladies, while Claire enjoys some quality time with Haley, before Mannys concerned art teacher draws Glorias attention to his latest crush - their new nanny. Elizabeth Banks (The Hunger Games) guest stars

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: When Ericas college graduation is completely forgotten and everyones only interested the imminent baby, she wonders if she even matters any more

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Erica asks Geoff to take her on a babymoon, far away from Beverly, whose mania about the upcoming birth is making her miserable. Adam and Barry learn how to be great uncles

programme.title: Dont Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Groom-to-be Ash wants to pull off the most romantic wedding ever, but his bride-to-be Vicki shuns anything corny

programme.title: Lego Masters Australia
programme.desc: The remaining six teams have six hours to build fighting robots, or brickbots, which will battle to the death against each other in the Brickbot Arena. Victory is achieved against another brickbot by either pushing it out of the arena, popping the balloon on its back, with the help of a drawing pin, or sending it through the trapdoor of doom. There are three one-on-one battles, with the winner of each going on to fight in the three-brickbot grand final. The winner of the grand final secures the Big Brick. Each team gets a minifig to determine the theme of their brickbot - from shark guy and the boxer to alien warrior

programme.title: The Amazing Race Australia
programme.desc: In Cambodia, the celebrity duos leave behind the majesty of Angkor Wat to navigate the waters of an incredible floating village on the mighty Tonle Sap Lake. Skills and teamwork are put to the test as the teams live like locals for a day, and its back to school for some tough lessons. After shopping for school supplies, they travel by boat to a floating classroom

programme.title: Made in Chelsea
programme.desc: Sam Prince and Livvy devise a plan to set up Chuggs and Zeyno on a date, but not everyones a fan of the blossoming romance. Alice throws a surprise party for her husband, Sam Vanderpump, but among the celebrations, the couple reveal that the reality of new parenthood is taking its toll on their relationship

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay travels to the upmarket quarter of Hollywood to help the owner of failing health-food restaurant Sante La Brea. As well as struggling to control his disrespectful staff, the proprietor receives a surprise visit from the police at the height of dinner service

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The chef travels to La Grange, a suburb of Chicago, to help the owners of Cafe 36, an upmarket bistro threatening to destroy the marriage of its owners due to the scale of their financial losses. The head chefs attitude to quality control is driving customers away, and it is up to Gordon Ramsay to turn the business around

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart finds his old teachers diary and learns a surprising secret, while Lisa faces a dilemma when she discovers an even bigger eye-opener herself

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Cletus becomes a country music sensation and has to try to handle the pressures of fame. Meanwhile, Homer attempts to become a new man

programme.sub-title: Do Pizza Bots Dream of Electric Guitars?

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: In an attempt to improve his public image, Mr Burns takes to selling plant-based burgers, but Lisa is unable to believe that he has changed his ways.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: Panic on the Streets of Springfield
programme.desc: Lisa makes an imaginary friend, while Homer gets his hands on a new vehicle. With the voice of Benedict Cumberbatch

programme.title: Mrs Doubtfire (1993)
programme.desc: A struggling actors ambitious, no-nonsense wife throws him out and demands a divorce. Desperate to spend time with his children, he puts his talents to good use by donning drag and posing as a British housekeeper to get a job looking after them - unaware of the positive impact the character will have on his life and career. Comedy, starring Robin Williams, Sally Field, Pierce Brosnan, Harvey Fierstein and Mara Wilson

programme.title: First Dates

programme.desc: Ina Garten cooks at two restaurants in the city, and learns the secret to an oyster pan roast

programme.desc: Ina Garten and Giada De Laurentiis prepare a lobster and potato salad lunch, along with mascarpone and lemon gnocchi with thyme butter sauce

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa - Back to Basics
programme.desc: Ina Garten prepares a towering chocolate birthday cake with Tyler Florence, and the duo visit the local farming scene to buy some chicken and vegetables

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa - Back to Basics
programme.desc: The American chef is joined by Michael Symon and the duo prepare a Greek menu including smoked pork ribs, tzatziki and spicy houmous

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa - Back to Basics
programme.desc: Ina Garten prepares a chocolate-themed menu including cupcakes with a peanut butter frosting, chocolate gelato, a chocolate orange fondue and white chocolate truffles

programme.title: Prue Leiths Cotswold Kitchen
programme.desc: Prue cooks a range of recipes perfect for entertaining guests before welcoming her Great British Bake Off colleague Alison Hammond into her kitchen. Prue makes two recipes using watermelon to demonstrate its versatility, and hears from a group of friends producing smoked salmon

programme.title: Jamies Money Saving Meals
programme.desc: Jamie creates Sicilian-inspired meatballs and tomato Norma sauce. Plus, he makes a quick chicken wrap and a carbonara of mackerel

programme.title: Jamies Money Saving Meals
programme.desc: Jamie Oliver proves that frozen fish can be just as good as fresh with his recipe for tikka curry, demonstrates a spin on the much-loved cheese and beans combo with smoky barbecue baked beans and sweet potatoes, and shows how to make hoi sin chicken wraps for just £1.69 a head. Plus, two midweek ideas to transform roast beef leftovers - a Moroccan-inspired tagine and a hot and spicy noodle soup

programme.title: James Martin Digs Deep
programme.desc: Chef Martin Blunos visits James Martin, and they prepare dishes using homegrown tomatoes for the people of Winchester, Hampshire

programme.title: James Martin Digs Deep
programme.desc: The chef hopes his melon plant will bear fruit, and attends a party to celebrate his success as a gardener

programme.title: James Martin: Sweet
programme.desc: James creates a number of pastry and pudding recipes using eggs, including baked Alaska, pavlova and macaroons

programme.title: James Martin: Sweet
programme.desc: Recipes for Italian puddings, including raspberry and nougat semi-freddo, grappa sabayon, fruit and nut biscotti with limoncello, and ricotta cheese with honey

programme.title: Hairy Bikers: Route 66
programme.desc: The third leg of Dave Myers and Si Kings trip sees them on the trail of Oklahomas famous beef. In Oklahoma City, a classic T-bone steak is followed by a visit to the citys Vietnamese community, where they knock up their national dish pho - a broth made of beef or chicken. After checking out El Renos unique onion burger the duo hook up with a couple of fire crews who like to cook - especially brisket. An organic sweet potato farm inspires Dave and Si to make sweet potato brownies, before they finish this stretch on a cattle ranch with Americas most iconic custodian of the land - the cowboy

programme.title: Hairy Bikers: Route 66
programme.desc: Dave Myers and Si King embark on their most epic journey yet. They traverse Americas famous Route 66, planning to visit nine States, serving up plenty of delicious food along the way

programme.title: Hairy Bikers: Route 66
programme.desc: Dave and Si cross the state of Arizona in search of the Wild West and make a small detour from Route 66, starting in Monument Valley, to learn more about this striking place. Theyre invited by a local Navajo police officer to eat with his family at a traditional Navajo barbecue, where a sheep is butchered, grilled and eaten alongside some traditional fry bread. Still riding in the Navajo Nation, the bikers stop at Tsaile College to learn more about rodeo and cook a lamb stew with corn dumplings in homage of the Navajo people they met

programme.title: Hairy Bikers: Route 66
programme.desc: Dave Myers and Si King mount their bikes for the final leg of their epic journey along the American road. They begin in Las Vegas, where they learn how to make apparently the best mashed potato in the world - inspiring them to cook a massive lobster and prawn cocktail. Back on the road they finally reach California, where they follow the path of the 49ers during the gold rush and learn about cooking with marijuana - which is perfectly legal in Los Angeles. They also enjoy the best tacos they have ever eaten at a taco festival, before reaching Santa Monica pier - the end of their trip

programme.title: Prue Leiths Cotswold Kitchen

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Its the semi-final, and the four remaining bakers must set to work on producing 24 exquisite choux buns. Prue Leith has set a complex technical for her first semi-final that leaves everyone stumped. And theres a meringue sculpture showstopper where the bakers mustnt crack under pressure. Noel Fielding and Sandi Toksvig present, while Paul Hollywood passes judgement alongside Prue

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Noel Fielding and Sandi Toksvig present the 2017 grand final, as the three remaining bakers compete to impress judges Paul Hollywood and Prue Leith and take home the trophy. For the final three challenges, they must prepare a batch of loaves, followed by a biscuit bake, and climaxing with a delicate, multi-layered, high-end patisserie showstopper to decide the winner

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Sandi Toksvig and Noel Fielding welcome 12 contestants to the tent, where judges Paul Hollywood and Prue Leith oversee them in three challenges. The competition kicks off with Biscuit Week, and the bakers are challenged to make signature bakes that say something both about them and a place in the British Isles, before tackling one of Pauls childhood favourites in the Technical. Finally, the bakers are tasked to make a 3D biscuit portrait in their first Showstopper

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Its week two and the remaining 11 bakers face cake week - kicking off with a crowd-pleasing signature challenge. Next, the bakers face Prue Leiths first technical, a complicated cake with a very unusual ingredient. Finally, an ambitious chocolate-collared showstopper turns up the heat in the tent. Who will rise to the various tasks - and who will melt under the pressure? Sandi Toksvig and Noel Fielding present, while series regular Paul Hollywood and Prue pass judgement before another baker leaves the contest

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: The remaining bakers tackle bread week, including an ambitious showstopper that is the largest bread sculpture challenge ever set in the tent. Before the plucky contestants reach that stage they must first impress judges Paul Hollywood and Prue Leith with teatime fruity favourite signature bake, followed by a deceptively simple time-test of a technical with an international flavour. Only one can claim star baker, while one of the competitors will have to leave the tent for good

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Its dessert week and judges Prue Leith and Paul Hollywood set three sticky challenges to test the remaining nine bakers. There is a meringue signature, a wobbly technical, and a complex chocolate showstopper. Which bakers will impress Prue and Paul enough to keep their place in the tent? Noel Fielding and Sandi Toksvig announce who will be staying and leaving at the end of the show

Western adventure, with John Payne, Faith Domergue and Slim Pickens

programme.desc: Aspiring con-man Johnny Hooker teams up with old pro Henry Gondorff to swindle mobster Doyle Lonnegan out of a fortune in revenge for the murder of a mutual friend. Enlisting the help of a host of crooks, they quickly conjure up a brilliant elaborate scheme to make him pay for his crime without him even knowing it. However, as their big con unfolds, things dont go according to plan, requiring some last-minute improvisation by the undaunted duo. Oscar-winning Depression-era comedy drama, starring Robert Redford and Paul Newman as the dynamic duo, along with Robert Shaw, Charles Durning and Eileen Brennan. Featuring one of the most distinctive scores in film history, courtesy of composer Marvin Hamlisch

programme.title: 999: On the Front Line
programme.desc: Paramedics attend a suspected domestic assault and need to treat one man who claims he was punched and knocked unconscious. A rare genetic disease leaves a woman with a dislocated shoulder and in excruciating pain, and a man, who in the past has threatened the emergency services with a weapon, calls for an ambulance

programme.title: 999: On the Front Line
programme.desc: Paramedics treat a man who has taken an overdose of tablets and is refusing to go to hospital. His speech is slurred and hes getting more and more drowsy. A tube that a patient has permanently in his chest becomes blocked. It drains fluid from the lungs, but now theres a three-day build-up of liquid which needs to be removed urgently. Plus, a six-year-old girl has had a seizure at school and a confused 94-year-old woman falls over, sustaining a black eye

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Thirty-year-old Chris is admitted after sustaining a potentially life-threatening wound during a game with his friend Jack, who fired the inside shaft of a ballpoint pen into his abdomen using an air rifle. College student Lennon has injured his head after jumping into a door frame while kicking a balloon, while 74-year-old Stafford arrives at AandE because his internal cardiac defibrillator keeps shocking him

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Long-distance lorry driver Neil, 52, has fallen backwards off a ramp onto a concrete floor and is sent for an urgent CT scan, the results of which are a shock. Also receiving treatments are 29-year-old Ben, who has dislocated his shoulder in a cycling accident, and Wendy, 73, who is in resus with a severe open ankle fracture after falling at home

programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: Jimmy Doherty investigates shock reports that changing sea temperatures mean squid and chips could one day replace fish and chips as the UKs national dish, and heads to Thailand, where squid is a national obsession. Kate Quilton goes Down Under to find out about a surprising new meat coming into our supermarkets and Matt Tebbutt heads to Italy to find out how supermarkets can sell pesto at an affordable price when the traditional ingredients are famously expensive

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Former detectives Penny and Jon still work for the police, but with retirement approaching cannot wait to buy a holiday home in Spain that they can escape to for the winter. Theyve decided that northern Costa Almería is the perfect place to find their dream property for a budget of £100,000, which must have a communal pool and be close to both the beach and a golf course. Ben Hillman presents five options for the pair to consider

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Ben Hillman helps Del and his wife Diane find the perfect holiday home on Tenerife, where they can spend their winter months in the sun with their grown-up children and baby grandson. The couple particularly love the west coast of the island, where they have their sights set on a family-sized property with a pool for their £120,000 budget. Ben finds five options for the couple to consider

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition kicks off at David and Ewa Woodwards Keats Cottage in Shanklin on the Isle of Wight. In the rooms, Donna Taylor from Jasmine House in Leicestershire makes a hair-raising discovery, while mother-and-daughter team Lesley and Chloe Priestly take a dislike to one of their competitors at dinner

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The second visit is to Jasmine House in Lutterworth, Leicestershire managed by Donna Taylor who believes in a no frills approach. But it doesnt take long for Martin and Sara to realise all the added extras in the room dont add up. During the afternoon Leslie and Chloe show their fighting spirit during a kickboxing lesson and all the BandBers square up to their host

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants travel to the luxury Halliwell House in Cheshire for the third day of the contest, where owners Martin Hulme and Sara Williams charge nearly £500 per night. Donna is astonished at the room rates, while David and Ewa are expecting nothing but perfection, but the self-service approach at breakfast confuses the guests, leaving Martin and Sara defiant in the face of their feedback

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final two days see the contestants staying the night at Soar Chapel Guest House in Ebbw Vale, the family home of mum and daughter Lesley and Chloe Priestly. Expectations are high for this duo and one guest in particular is not disappointed. Things get going in the afternoon during a beatboxing contest, although old tensions resurface at dinner and the hosts are left to calm things down. A massive spread is laid on at breakfast, but when one guest takes issue with the cooked items, Lesley and Chloe worry what impact it will have come payment day

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The BandB owners meet for the last time to find out what theyve been paid and to settle some scores. David and Ewa Woodward want to challenge Martins criticism over the way they run their business. Next, Donna Taylor wants to find out more about the issue that caused Martin and Sara to lose sleep. Needless to say, there is tension in the air and axes to grind, before the winner is revealed

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Psychiatrist Joe and fellow NHS worker Fiona first fell in love with the idyllic Greek island of Kefalonia 15 years ago on a sailing trip, and now want their very own holiday home there. With a budget of £250,000, the married couple are looking for a property with enough room to entertain all their family, including their newborn grandson. Laura Hamilton shows them five impressive properties to consider

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Photographer Sue and singer Chris dream of owning a home in the north of Limousin, popularly known as the Lake District of France, so Jean Johansson comes up with five options

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Trucker Tony Houston holds the first dinner party in Clacton-on-Sea, Essex, hoping his menu of scallops on black pudding with pea puree, and sea bass with prawn mash will impress his fellow diners. However, if his food fails to live up to his expectations, he anticipates the whole ambience and presentation of the evening will secure him the £1,000 cash prize

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Anthony Street hosts the second day in Essex, and has his work cut out trying to impress the diners after displaying some unusual table manners the previous night. However, he hopes his passion for quirky entertainment will be enough to win them over

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Driving instructor Claire Kelly hosts the third dinner party in Essex. Her devil-may-care approach does nothing to dampen her confidence, and she is convinced hers will be the winning night. Even if her chaotic cooking style and haphazard evening fail to win over the guests, the mother-of-two has some special entertainment lined up to gain a few extra points

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Entrepreneur and foraging fan Richard Harris hosts the fourth night of the competition in the Clacton-on-Sea area of Essex. Not everybody is impressed when they discover he has had help, and Claire Kelly accuses him of being a food snob. However, he hopes a performance by the local church choir will help improve the atmosphere

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Teacher Kerrie Brinkley-Whittington hosts the final dinner party in Essex, and uses a few props to help her night go with a swing. However, she is soon under fire from entrepreneur Richard, who is not amused to be asked to contribute more to group conversations, and when trucker Tony makes an emergency run to the garden, it looks as if the rhubarb dessert could be just as controversial. At the end of the evening, the winner is announced

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Lee and Jenni at the Greyhound Inn in the Peak District put their faith in super-sized sausages to win a high score, and also take their guests to a wildlife park

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The BandBers are in the Ribble Valley for the weeks second visit, at Jacks Little Middop Farm. Jacks self-catering camping pods in the middle of a field immerse his guests in the heart of nature, and some complimentary beers on arrival go down well. The rustic compost toilets, not so much

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Phil and Gil host the weeks third visit at Old Hall Country Breaks in Norfolk. The attention-to-detail at their self-catering accommodation gets the seal of approval from all of their guests, and Phil and Gil keep them sweet with a chocolatier experience in the afternoon. But will the added extras on the guests bills scupper the hosts chances?

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Keighly and Justin host the weeks final visit at The Half Moon Inn in Norfolk. Experienced chef Justin has piled the pressure on himself throughout the week with some big claims about his culinary chops and egg-cooking skills, though poached eggs can prove to be any chefs downfall

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Toilet troubles, tossing and turning, and tears galore abound as the BandB owners take it in turns as hosts to decide which of their establishments provides the best value for money. The weeks scores are revealed and the winner announced

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Lewis, 18, is rushed into the hospital after coming off his motorbike and colliding with two cars. He is immediately taken for a full body CT scan as doctors are concerned about the extent of the injuries to his pelvis, arm and head. Meanwhile, 27-year-old Sam awaits X-ray results after he fainted and cut his lip while smoking a Cuban cigar at a barbecue

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Headteacher Emma arrives in resus having been in a collision with a bus while cycling home from the school she works at. As she is treated, her husband Mick reflects on being informed what had happened. Meanwhile, 33-year-old Josh is treated for severe back pain, and 87-year-old Pamela is examined for a possible blood clot in her leg, and tells the doctors about her childhood in London during the Blitz

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Medics at St Georges hospital treat three women who have been stabbed in a Surrey supermarket car park in broad daylight. Meanwhile, friends and relations recall their associations with the wounded, Jean, 67, Rani, 71, and Janet, 62

programme.title: 999: On the Front Line
programme.desc: Paramedics race against the clock as a man shows signs of a stroke. A drunk man is stranded in the street and has to be taken to hospital for his own safety. A factory worker is in agony with severe back pain and very high blood pressure. Plus, a man has a close call when he thinks he is having a heart attack

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Lewis, 18, is rushed into the hospital after coming off his motorbike and colliding with two cars. He is immediately taken for a full body CT scan as doctors are concerned about the extent of the injuries to his pelvis, arm and head. Meanwhile, 27-year-old Sam awaits X-ray results after he fainted and cut his lip while smoking a Cuban cigar at a barbecue

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Headteacher Emma arrives in resus having been in a collision with a bus while cycling home from the school she works at. As she is treated, her husband Mick reflects on being informed what had happened. Meanwhile, 33-year-old Josh is treated for severe back pain, and 87-year-old Pamela is examined for a possible blood clot in her leg, and tells the doctors about her childhood in London during the Blitz

programme.title: Supermarkets Unwrapped
programme.desc: The team head for the Vegan Aisle for all the news on animal-free food. Helen Lawal visits Tesco to find out how they keep up with all the plant-based burger trend, John Whaite seeks out the secret to the snap in a vegan sausage skin, Kate Quilton finds out how exactly you milk an oat, and Briony May Williams learns how to make a quiche without egg

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: This weeks competition is in and around Leeds, where the first host, 38-year-old foster carer and nature lover Shaun, is serving up an Asia-meets-Yorkshire fusion menu complete with dumplings, Chinese fish and chips and a not-so-traditional Yorkshire pudding

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Aspiring model Ryan is hoping that his French and Caribbean cuisine will tantalise his guests tastebuds in Leeds. During the drinks reception, Ryan is fuming when one guest flouts his runway-ready dress code, and at the table, Ryan bites back with his egg salad bombs then insults another diner when they comment on his clobber. Desperate to lighten the mood, he hosts a modelling masterclass, but his controversial views on beauty backfire. Having spent the evening insulting and then bickering with his guests, has Ryan blown his chances to bag the prize?

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: On night three in Leeds, medical trainer Jen hosts a pink-themed party in an attempt to bag the big bucks. Despite her overuse of pink food colouring, her guests are impressed with her home-cooked dishes, but when Shaun questions her on their provenance, shes forced to come clean. Philip teases the table with his hidden pink side and Ryan isnt afraid to throw some insults when Philip reveals that he won a clothing competition. A surprise performance in the garden proves a cut above for hairdresser Sarah, but will it be enough for Jen to grab the grand?

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: On the penultimate night in Leeds, a Middle Eastern mezze is the suggested offering from freelance creative Philip. Shaun is impressed with his homemade sourdough, but a cheesecake doesnt cut it for hairdresser Sarah. The group gets creative with some clay modelling, but it all goes pear-shaped when Ryan continues to throw insults at his fellow guests. Jen entertains the table with a bizarre cleaning story and Philip ventures into the woods for a muddy mis-endeavour

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: On the final night in Leeds, hair salon owner Sarah hopes to delight her diners with some classic 1980s cuisine. With a reputation for being outspoken, Sarah gets a dose of her own medicine from one diner whos determined to get their own back. Later, a guest reveals a freaky phobia and theres a hair-raising horror story before some very fancy footwork on the dancefloor. Will an evening of disco dancing and retro grub be enough for Sarah to take top spot?

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Chef Mark and yoga teacher Loretta, who live in west London, have been together for 15 years after meeting in Lorettas native Australia. Theyre looking to find their perfect property near Estepona on Spains Costa del Sol for their budget of £200,000. Craig Rowe lines up five options for the pair to choose between

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Jonnie Irwin helps Sheffield couple Rob and Lisa find a three-bedroom holiday home with a swimming pool in the Lanzarote resort of Playa Blanca on a budget of £280,000

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Plumber Richard and music composer Chris, who has a visual impairment, met 10 years ago and bonded as friends after Richard agreed to become Chris tour guide on holiday. The pair now go on regular getaways and the south coast of Tenerife has become a firm favourite, so much so that theyve decided to join forces to buy their own property there as a winter bolthole. With a combined budget of £110,000, they task Ben Hillman to find them the perfect pad

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Simon and Lawrence have been visiting the peaceful Charente region of south-west France for nearly 20 years and know the area inside out. Now, theyre looking for a holiday home there for an ideal budget of £100,000. Theyre after a traditional-style property with enough storage space for their mountain bikes, but Jasmine Harman could be facing an uphill struggle to impress such a knowledgeable couple

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Laura Hamilton helps Kathryn and Mark find a home on the Kassandra Peninsula in the north of Greece. The pair, now approaching retirement, want plenty of room for the family - and their dog - and be near to a beach. They have a budget of £80,000 to invest in the move

programme.title: Kirstie and Phils Love It or List It
programme.desc: Kirstie and Phil catch up with Catherine and Nigel four years after their first visit when they helped them decide what to do with their home in Larne, Northern Ireland. Catherine wanted to move from the disjointed small roomed bungalow in an isolated location but Nigel, who didnt want to buy the property in the first place, was in love with their large garden with stunning views. While Phil took the pair to see some impressive but affordable houses, Kirstie came up with a plan to repurpose their space. Now theyre back to see if the pair stuck to their decision

programme.title: George Clarkes Old House, New Home
programme.desc: The architect tries to unlock the potential of old properties. He starts out in Stroud, where Phil and Leighla are transforming their ramshackle, listed Georgian farmhouse with an industrial-style extension. George also pays a visit to Wootton Bassett, where he helps a couple flip the layout of their Victorian end-of-terrace home

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition kicks off at Redmire Village Pub in North Yorkshire, where hosts Kerrie and Vickie hope the cosy vibes and stunning countryside setting will be a hit

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The second visit of the week comes from The Yorkshire Hosts in historic Harrogate, where Hollie and Ben reckon their plush, self-catering apartments in the heart of the town centre will go down a storm - but the lack of free parking proves problematic, leaving the hosts frustrated

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Tabitha and Steve host the third visit of the competition at Copper Beech Glamping in Staffordshire. They have a relax and recharge ethos at their glampsite, with a tranquil rural setting and luxurious outdoor hot tubs, but unfortunately, one BandBer in particular isnt so relaxed about the idea of the great outdoors

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final visit is to Berkshire, where Ana and Dominic hope their homely pub, the Bull Inn, will charm the BandBers with its quintessential character. First impressions are promising and the hosts hope to finish on a high with a barnstorming breakfast. However talk of the looming payment day raises tensions

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Payment day promises to be a spicy affair, with high emotions, awkward exchanges and plenty of pernickety comments to unpick. As the dust settles, the weeks winner emerges

programme.title: The Emergency Ward
programme.desc: Dr David and nurse Ebony urgently check a young motorcyclist for internal bleeding and spinal damage after he collided with a car. A mans foot has been mangled in a forklift accident. And an 81-year-old grandmother cant remember flipping her car

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: A 79-year-old man arrives in hospital after collapsing in the street whilst walking his dog, and doctors give him medication to try and stabilise his very high heart rate. Meanwhile, a young boy is treated after pushing a plastic toy down his ear, and doctors show concern for a man who has numbness in his arm and little finger, and send him for a CT scan

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Marie, 31, arrives at St Georges AandE in south-west London by ambulance after collapsing at home with an unexplained headache. Doctors work fast to ascertain the cause of her collapse, with potentially devastating results. Maries joined by her partner Cameron and her young child. Cameras also follow Eileen, 87, who comes in with shortness of breath and a high heart rate, and 10-month-old Erin, who has a build-up of wax in her ears following a cold and fever

programme.title: The Emergency Ward
programme.desc: Dr David and nurse Ebony urgently check a young motorcyclist for internal bleeding and spinal damage after he collided with a car. A mans foot has been mangled in a forklift accident. And an 81-year-old grandmother cant remember flipping her car

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: A 79-year-old man arrives in hospital after collapsing in the street whilst walking his dog, and doctors give him medication to try and stabilise his very high heart rate. Meanwhile, a young boy is treated after pushing a plastic toy down his ear, and doctors show concern for a man who has numbness in his arm and little finger, and send him for a CT scan

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Medics at St Georges hospital treat three women who have been stabbed in a Surrey supermarket car park in broad daylight. Meanwhile, friends and relations recall their associations with the wounded, Jean, 67, Rani, 71, and Janet, 62

programme.title: Supermarkets Unwrapped
programme.desc: The Food Unwrapped team take a deep dive into the nations favourite supermarket aisles. In this first episode, the team chill out in the freezer aisle. Jimmy Doherty investigates why theres more to frozen chips than just potatoes, Helen Lawal learns why frozen ready meals have best-before dates, Briony May Williams gets the inside scoop on soft-scoop ice cream, and Andi Oliver learns how to get the most out of your freezer at home

programme.title: 999: On the Front Line
programme.desc: Paramedics race against the clock as a man shows signs of a stroke. A drunk man is stranded in the street and has to be taken to hospital for his own safety. A factory worker is in agony with severe back pain and very high blood pressure. Plus, a man has a close call when he thinks he is having a heart attack

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Thirty-year-old Chris is admitted after sustaining a potentially life-threatening wound during a game with his friend Jack, who fired the inside shaft of a ballpoint pen into his abdomen using an air rifle. College student Lennon has injured his head after jumping into a door frame while kicking a balloon, while 74-year-old Stafford arrives at AandE because his internal cardiac defibrillator keeps shocking him

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Long-distance lorry driver Neil, 52, has fallen backwards off a ramp onto a concrete floor and is sent for an urgent CT scan, the results of which are a shock. Also receiving treatments are 29-year-old Ben, who has dislocated his shoulder in a cycling accident, and Wendy, 73, who is in resus with a severe open ankle fracture after falling at home

programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: Jimmy Doherty investigates shock reports that changing sea temperatures mean squid and chips could one day replace fish and chips as the UKs national dish, and heads to Thailand, where squid is a national obsession. Kate Quilton goes Down Under to find out about a surprising new meat coming into our supermarkets and Matt Tebbutt heads to Italy to find out how supermarkets can sell pesto at an affordable price when the traditional ingredients are famously expensive

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Former detectives Penny and Jon still work for the police, but with retirement approaching cannot wait to buy a holiday home in Spain that they can escape to for the winter. Theyve decided that northern Costa Almería is the perfect place to find their dream property for a budget of £100,000, which must have a communal pool and be close to both the beach and a golf course. Ben Hillman presents five options for the pair to consider

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Ben Hillman helps Del and his wife Diane find the perfect holiday home on Tenerife, where they can spend their winter months in the sun with their grown-up children and baby grandson. The couple particularly love the west coast of the island, where they have their sights set on a family-sized property with a pool for their £120,000 budget. Ben finds five options for the couple to consider

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition kicks off at David and Ewa Woodwards Keats Cottage in Shanklin on the Isle of Wight. In the rooms, Donna Taylor from Jasmine House in Leicestershire makes a hair-raising discovery, while mother-and-daughter team Lesley and Chloe Priestly take a dislike to one of their competitors at dinner

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The second visit is to Jasmine House in Lutterworth, Leicestershire managed by Donna Taylor who believes in a no frills approach. But it doesnt take long for Martin and Sara to realise all the added extras in the room dont add up. During the afternoon Leslie and Chloe show their fighting spirit during a kickboxing lesson and all the BandBers square up to their host

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants travel to the luxury Halliwell House in Cheshire for the third day of the contest, where owners Martin Hulme and Sara Williams charge nearly £500 per night. Donna is astonished at the room rates, while David and Ewa are expecting nothing but perfection, but the self-service approach at breakfast confuses the guests, leaving Martin and Sara defiant in the face of their feedback

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final two days see the contestants staying the night at Soar Chapel Guest House in Ebbw Vale, the family home of mum and daughter Lesley and Chloe Priestly. Expectations are high for this duo and one guest in particular is not disappointed. Things get going in the afternoon during a beatboxing contest, although old tensions resurface at dinner and the hosts are left to calm things down. A massive spread is laid on at breakfast, but when one guest takes issue with the cooked items, Lesley and Chloe worry what impact it will have come payment day

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The BandB owners meet for the last time to find out what theyve been paid and to settle some scores. David and Ewa Woodward want to challenge Martins criticism over the way they run their business. Next, Donna Taylor wants to find out more about the issue that caused Martin and Sara to lose sleep. Needless to say, there is tension in the air and axes to grind, before the winner is revealed

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Psychiatrist Joe and fellow NHS worker Fiona first fell in love with the idyllic Greek island of Kefalonia 15 years ago on a sailing trip, and now want their very own holiday home there. With a budget of £250,000, the married couple are looking for a property with enough room to entertain all their family, including their newborn grandson. Laura Hamilton shows them five impressive properties to consider

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Photographer Sue and singer Chris dream of owning a home in the north of Limousin, popularly known as the Lake District of France, so Jean Johansson comes up with five options

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Trucker Tony Houston holds the first dinner party in Clacton-on-Sea, Essex, hoping his menu of scallops on black pudding with pea puree, and sea bass with prawn mash will impress his fellow diners. However, if his food fails to live up to his expectations, he anticipates the whole ambience and presentation of the evening will secure him the £1,000 cash prize

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Anthony Street hosts the second day in Essex, and has his work cut out trying to impress the diners after displaying some unusual table manners the previous night. However, he hopes his passion for quirky entertainment will be enough to win them over

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Driving instructor Claire Kelly hosts the third dinner party in Essex. Her devil-may-care approach does nothing to dampen her confidence, and she is convinced hers will be the winning night. Even if her chaotic cooking style and haphazard evening fail to win over the guests, the mother-of-two has some special entertainment lined up to gain a few extra points

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Entrepreneur and foraging fan Richard Harris hosts the fourth night of the competition in the Clacton-on-Sea area of Essex. Not everybody is impressed when they discover he has had help, and Claire Kelly accuses him of being a food snob. However, he hopes a performance by the local church choir will help improve the atmosphere

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Teacher Kerrie Brinkley-Whittington hosts the final dinner party in Essex, and uses a few props to help her night go with a swing. However, she is soon under fire from entrepreneur Richard, who is not amused to be asked to contribute more to group conversations, and when trucker Tony makes an emergency run to the garden, it looks as if the rhubarb dessert could be just as controversial. At the end of the evening, the winner is announced

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Lee and Jenni at the Greyhound Inn in the Peak District put their faith in super-sized sausages to win a high score, and also take their guests to a wildlife park

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The BandBers are in the Ribble Valley for the weeks second visit, at Jacks Little Middop Farm. Jacks self-catering camping pods in the middle of a field immerse his guests in the heart of nature, and some complimentary beers on arrival go down well. The rustic compost toilets, not so much

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Phil and Gil host the weeks third visit at Old Hall Country Breaks in Norfolk. The attention-to-detail at their self-catering accommodation gets the seal of approval from all of their guests, and Phil and Gil keep them sweet with a chocolatier experience in the afternoon. But will the added extras on the guests bills scupper the hosts chances?

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Keighly and Justin host the weeks final visit at The Half Moon Inn in Norfolk. Experienced chef Justin has piled the pressure on himself throughout the week with some big claims about his culinary chops and egg-cooking skills, though poached eggs can prove to be any chefs downfall

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Toilet troubles, tossing and turning, and tears galore abound as the BandB owners take it in turns as hosts to decide which of their establishments provides the best value for money. The weeks scores are revealed and the winner announced

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Lewis, 18, is rushed into the hospital after coming off his motorbike and colliding with two cars. He is immediately taken for a full body CT scan as doctors are concerned about the extent of the injuries to his pelvis, arm and head. Meanwhile, 27-year-old Sam awaits X-ray results after he fainted and cut his lip while smoking a Cuban cigar at a barbecue

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Headteacher Emma arrives in resus having been in a collision with a bus while cycling home from the school she works at. As she is treated, her husband Mick reflects on being informed what had happened. Meanwhile, 33-year-old Josh is treated for severe back pain, and 87-year-old Pamela is examined for a possible blood clot in her leg, and tells the doctors about her childhood in London during the Blitz

programme.title: 999: On the Front Line
programme.desc: Paramedics attend a suspected domestic assault and need to treat one man who claims he was punched and knocked unconscious. A rare genetic disease leaves a woman with a dislocated shoulder and in excruciating pain, and a man, who in the past has threatened the emergency services with a weapon, calls for an ambulance
