programme.title: David Attenboroughs Wild City
programme.desc: Exploring Singapores islands, which have a host of remarkable creatures, including the tiger tail seahorse and the quick-changing cuttlefish

programme.title: David Attenboroughs Dragons and Damsels
programme.desc: Arguably more beautiful than butterflies, better fliers than hummingbirds and with intriguing and complex behavioural patterns - dragonflies and damselflies are marvels of the insect kingdom. This documentary uses the latest camera technology to show their manoeuvres, mating strategies, territorial behaviour and flight dynamics, revealing them to be the ultimate insect

programme.title: Great Barrier Reef with David Attenborough
programme.desc: Following his visit to the Great Barrier Reef in 1957, naturalist and broadcaster David Attenborough returns and uses the latest filming techniques to unlock the secrets of the natural wonder. In the first edition, he descends beneath the waves at night and uses cutting-edge technology to generate computer scans of the sea floor. He also learns about a complex community of animals, as well as the annual coral spawning, which is responsible for the great diversity in the reef

programme.title: Great Barrier Reef with David Attenborough
programme.desc: Using the latest technology, the naturalist explores the shark-infested waters of Osprey Reef in the Triton submersible, before returning to the nesting grounds of the Green Sea Turtle, 60 years after his first visit to Raine Island. He also marvels at manta ray cleaning stations on Lady Elliot Island, and tracks dwarf minke whales to discover their surprising reasons for returning, and why the reef is vital for their survival

programme.title: Great Barrier Reef with David Attenborough
programme.desc: The naturalist examines what the next few decades may hold for this remarkable ecosystem, and looks at the work of scientists who are trying to preserve the area and the species that inhabit it, assisted by research vessel the Alucia. He also embarks on an ambitious attempt to dive further into the reef than ever before to witness the resilient coral that live down in the depths and see if they hold answers that may help to overcome challenges that lie ahead, as the impact of humans on the reef continues to take its toll

programme.title: David Attenborough Meets Obama
programme.desc: Another chance to see Barack Obamas conversation, recorded in May 2015, with renowned naturalist and film-maker David Attenborough. In a twist on usual convention, the then-US president took the role of interviewer, quizzing Attenborough about his thoughts on the future of the planet, their shared passion for nature, and potential ways to protect the environment. Also includes behind-the-scenes footage from Sir Davids latest project on the Great Barrier Reef, as well as highlights from throughout the veteran broadcasters career

programme.title: Micro Monsters with David Attenborough
programme.desc: David Attenborough employs the latest technologies to explore the violence, rivalries and deadly weaponry existing within the world of bugs. This first episode examines the survival tactics of its terrifying residents including killer ants, trap-setting spiders and beetles with the ability to shoot boiling chemicals at their enemies

programme.title: Micro Monsters with David Attenborough
programme.desc: The broadcaster continues his bug-eyed view of the world of creepy-crawlies, revealing how predators defuse the defences of their prey. Highlights include the cockroach wasp, busy preparing a tasty - and very live - treat for its young, the whirligig beetle, which employs a water-based radar system, and the jumping portia spider, which feeds on other arachnids

programme.title: Micro Monsters with David Attenborough
programme.desc: A further selection of creepy-crawly close-ups, focusing on courtship in the bug world. Highlights include scorpions shaking their booty, the perfume-wearing nasonia wasp and the tropical cricket, for whom romance goes out of the window as it uses bribery to seal the deal with would-be partners. One potential partner to steer well clear of, however, is the praying mantis, the female of which is notorious for eating the male just after - or even during - mating. Narrated by David Attenborough

programme.title: Micro Monsters with David Attenborough
programme.desc: A close-up view of sex, bug-style, as David Attenborough talks viewers through the different ways in which creepy-crawlies reproduce. Size matters for the minuscule male orb spider, creepily sneaking up on its intended and trying to mate without her noticing, while theres no rest for the lothario-like butterfly, which has plenty of notches on its proverbial bedpost. However, the harvestman spider has no use for sex at all, and reproduces by cloning itself

programme.title: Micro Monsters with David Attenborough
programme.desc: David Attenborough shifts the focus to bugs that prefer co-operation rather than conflict. They include burrowing cockroaches, the suitably named social spiders - which share a 30-metre web - the queen bee and her happy hive of workers and green ants pulling together to build a nest

programme.title: Micro Monsters with David Attenborough
programme.desc: The broadcaster concludes his close-up examination of the creepy-crawly world, shifting focus to the bugs ultimate invention - the colony. Key residents of these minuscule mega-cities include honey bees, termites, leafcutter ants - who have a knack for farming - and their Argentine cousins, members of a community so vast it spans an entire continent

programme.title: David Attenboroughs Kingdom of Plants
programme.desc: The naturalist and film-maker explores the many varieties of plant life housed at the Royal Botanic Gardens in Kew, west London, and explains what they reveal about the natural world and the development of life on Earth. He begins inside the establishments Palm House, whose climate has been engineered to simulate conditions found in rainforests, charting the evolution of plants that grow in the worlds wettest regions and investigating how flowering plants spread across the globe so rapidly

programme.title: David Attenboroughs Kingdom of Plants
programme.desc: The naturalist explores how the plants at Kew Gardens change through the seasons and demonstrates the surprising properties of several species, including the predatory pond-dwelling bladderwort utricularia and a fungus that appears to be capable of mind control. He also discusses the largest single organism on the planet, visits the worlds biggest flower and explains how plants and insects can communicate using scents and music

programme.title: David Attenboroughs Kingdom of Plants
programme.desc: The naturalist concludes his exploration of the Royal Botanic Gardens in Kew, west London, by examining plants that have evolved to minimise their dependence on water, enabling them to survive in the worlds driest environments. He witnesses a cactus blooming at midnight, tells the story of the spectacular flowering of the Agave franzosinii, and visits the Millennium Seed Bank, a facility designed to save plants from future extinction

programme.title: Flying Monsters with David Attenborough
programme.desc: The broadcaster explores the world of the pterosaur, a flying creature that occupied the skies 200 million years ago. Visiting sites around the world, from the Dorset coast to New Mexico, he explains how the reptiles evolved to defy the forces of gravity, and examines the features of their anatomy that can still be seen in present-day descendents. He also discovers why they became extinct after dominating the skies for millions of years

programme.title: Making David Attenboroughs Flying Monsters
programme.desc: Exploring the creation of David Attenboroughs documentary, which uses state-of-the-art 3D technology to bring the airborne animals of the prehistoric world to life

programme.title: David Attenboroughs Rise of Animals
programme.sub-title: From the Seas to the Skies
programme.desc: Part one of two. The naturalist explores the evolution of vertebrates over the past 500 million years, beginning with a look at how remarkable advances allowed primitive fish to make the radical move on to land, and then take to the skies with the advent of flight. He uses fossils of both ancient and living species combined with CGI and film to chart their journey out of the water to populate all corners of the globe

programme.title: Great Barrier Reef with David Attenborough
programme.desc: The naturalist examines what the next few decades may hold for this remarkable ecosystem, and looks at the work of scientists who are trying to preserve the area and the species that inhabit it, assisted by research vessel the Alucia. He also embarks on an ambitious attempt to dive further into the reef than ever before to witness the resilient coral that live down in the depths and see if they hold answers that may help to overcome challenges that lie ahead, as the impact of humans on the reef continues to take its toll

programme.title: David Attenboroughs Global Adventure
programme.desc: Documentary capturing some of the greatest filming sequences of David Attenboroughs career, using previously unseen footage, from the deepest dives in a submersible on the Great Barrier Reef to watching a million bats take off in a cave in Borneo. Other highlights include life in the frozen tundra of South Georgia, a colony of King Penguins and the worlds largest migration of Hammerhead sharks in the Galapagos Islands

programme.title: David Attenboroughs Global Adventure: Home Planet
programme.desc: Further footage of David Attenboroughs global wildlife adventures, from the depths of the Great Barrier Reef to the ancient rainforests of Borneo

programme.title: David Attenboroughs Global Adventure: The Rise of Nature
programme.desc: The broadcaster explores the rise of life on Earth, from the emergence of the first creatures on seabeds hundreds of millions of years ago to the wildlife of today

programme.title: David Attenboroughs Dragons and Damsels
programme.desc: Arguably more beautiful than butterflies, better fliers than hummingbirds and with intriguing and complex behavioural patterns - dragonflies and damselflies are marvels of the insect kingdom. This documentary uses the latest camera technology to show their manoeuvres, mating strategies, territorial behaviour and flight dynamics, revealing them to be the ultimate insect

programme.title: Micro Monsters with David Attenborough
programme.desc: A further selection of creepy-crawly close-ups, focusing on courtship in the bug world. Highlights include scorpions shaking their booty, the perfume-wearing nasonia wasp and the tropical cricket, for whom romance goes out of the window as it uses bribery to seal the deal with would-be partners. One potential partner to steer well clear of, however, is the praying mantis, the female of which is notorious for eating the male just after - or even during - mating. Narrated by David Attenborough

programme.title: Micro Monsters with David Attenborough
programme.desc: A close-up view of sex, bug-style, as David Attenborough talks viewers through the different ways in which creepy-crawlies reproduce. Size matters for the minuscule male orb spider, creepily sneaking up on its intended and trying to mate without her noticing, while theres no rest for the lothario-like butterfly, which has plenty of notches on its proverbial bedpost. However, the harvestman spider has no use for sex at all, and reproduces by cloning itself

programme.title: Micro Monsters with David Attenborough
programme.desc: David Attenborough shifts the focus to bugs that prefer co-operation rather than conflict. They include burrowing cockroaches, the suitably named social spiders - which share a 30-metre web - the queen bee and her happy hive of workers and green ants pulling together to build a nest

programme.title: David Attenboroughs Kingdom of Plants
programme.desc: The naturalist and film-maker explores the many varieties of plant life housed at the Royal Botanic Gardens in Kew, west London, and explains what they reveal about the natural world and the development of life on Earth. He begins inside the establishments Palm House, whose climate has been engineered to simulate conditions found in rainforests, charting the evolution of plants that grow in the worlds wettest regions and investigating how flowering plants spread across the globe so rapidly

programme.title: David Attenboroughs Kingdom of Plants
programme.desc: The naturalist explores how the plants at Kew Gardens change through the seasons and demonstrates the surprising properties of several species, including the predatory pond-dwelling bladderwort utricularia and a fungus that appears to be capable of mind control. He also discusses the largest single organism on the planet, visits the worlds biggest flower and explains how plants and insects can communicate using scents and music

programme.title: David Attenboroughs Kingdom of Plants
programme.desc: The naturalist concludes his exploration of the Royal Botanic Gardens in Kew, west London, by examining plants that have evolved to minimise their dependence on water, enabling them to survive in the worlds driest environments. He witnesses a cactus blooming at midnight, tells the story of the spectacular flowering of the Agave franzosinii, and visits the Millennium Seed Bank, a facility designed to save plants from future extinction

programme.title: David Attenboroughs Galapagos
programme.desc: The broadcaster explores the Galapagos, a collection of volcanic islands in the Pacific known for its extraordinary wildlife. More than 150 years after Charles Darwin formulated his ground-breaking theory of evolution on the remote archipelago, Attenborough explains how life on the islands has continued to evolve in biological isolation, examining how the ever-changing volcanic landscape has given birth to species and sub-species that exist nowhere else in the world. He begins by revealing how Galapagos rose from the ocean four million years ago

programme.title: David Attenboroughs Galapagos
programme.desc: The broadcaster reveals how life has learnt to adapt quickly in the ever-changing volcanic landscape, resulting in species that exist nowhere else in the world. David investigates the driving forces behind their evolution, exploring the appearance and behaviour of remarkable creatures and vegetation including giant whale sharks, marine iguanas and seemingly normal dandelion seeds that grow into plants the size of trees

programme.title: David Attenboroughs Galapagos
programme.desc: The broadcaster concludes his exploration of the archipelago with a look at how, despite their proximity, no two of the 19 islands are the same. He also uncovers evidence that evolution on Galapagos is occurring faster than Charles Darwin could ever have imagined, and encounters Lonesome George, the last remaining giant Pinta Island tortoise, who died just a few weeks after filming in June 2012

programme.title: David Attenboroughs Conquest of the Skies
programme.desc: The veteran naturalist examines the world of flight, travelling across the globe to chart the evolutionary story of those creatures who seemingly defy the rules of gravity by taking to the air. Initially focusing on insects, Attenborough meets a descendant of the dragonfly, before examining the Atlas beetle, which tends to restrict flight to times when it needs a mate or a fresh supply of food. More aesthetically pleasing is a group of beautiful tropical butterflies, followed by an in-depth study into the blow fly - the jet fighter of insects

programme.title: David Attenboroughs Conquest of the Skies
programme.desc: The veteran naturalist visits the jungles of Borneo to meet creatures that like to glide through life - the harlequin tree frog and the little-known colugo - often referred to, incorrectly, as a flying lemur. He also has a CGI-assisted encounter with the first true vertebrate flyer, the pterosaur, receives a flying lesson from a small flock of swans at Loch Lomond in Scotland and encounters the planets largest species of bat

programme.title: David Attenboroughs Conquest of the Skies
programme.desc: The veteran naturalist turns his attention to creatures that dominate the skies today. He begins with the vast bird family, watching a group of vultures as they go scavenging and some peregrine falcons dive bombing for their prey. He then moves on to the floating forests of Ecuador to find out what makes the humble hummingbird tick, before ending his journey at the Gomantong bat caves of Borneo - a place he first filmed in 1972 - witnessing a mass exodus of the creatures

programme.title: Secret World of Sound with David Attenborough
programme.desc: The broadcaster explores the ways different creatures hear and produce sound and how it can influence their decisions, using cutting-edge audio technology to reveal a new perspective and understanding of animal behaviour

programme.title: Secret World of Sound with David Attenborough
programme.desc: From melodic songs to strange hums, David Attenborough shares the sounds that gibbons, lyrebirds, bull elk and more use to find a mate - and warn off the competition

programme.title: Secret World of Sound with David Attenborough
programme.desc: A look at how baby animals communicate in their quest for survival, using sound to beg and call for help in the early days of life

programme.title: Attenborough and the Giant Elephant
programme.desc: Naturalist David Attenborough investigates the life of Jumbo, a famous Victorian elephant, supposedly the largest that ever lived. Jumbo arrived at London Zoo in 1865 and was popular with the royal family, but was dangerously unhappy in captivity. In later life, he would be sold to PT Barnums circus, becoming a celebrity before dying under mysterious circumstances. Attenborough examines Jumbos remains and considers the lives of elephants in the wild to learn more about the animals difficult life

programme.title: David Attenboroughs Natural History Museum Alive
programme.desc: The broadcaster invites viewers to join him as he takes an after-hours stroll around one of his favourite places, the Natural History Museum. But this is no ordinary tour as some of the many exhibits spring to life as the veteran naturalist strolls along

programme.title: The Bachelor King
programme.desc: Documentary exploring the lives of king penguins, filmed on the sub-Antarctic island of South Georgia over five months. The programme imagines what one penguins life would be, following it during the challenging, awkward time between adolescence and adulthood. Presented by David Attenborough

programme.title: Great Barrier Reef with David Attenborough
programme.desc: Following his visit to the Great Barrier Reef in 1957, naturalist and broadcaster David Attenborough returns and uses the latest filming techniques to unlock the secrets of the natural wonder. In the first edition, he descends beneath the waves at night and uses cutting-edge technology to generate computer scans of the sea floor. He also learns about a complex community of animals, as well as the annual coral spawning, which is responsible for the great diversity in the reef

programme.title: Great Barrier Reef with David Attenborough
programme.desc: Using the latest technology, the naturalist explores the shark-infested waters of Osprey Reef in the Triton submersible, before returning to the nesting grounds of the Green Sea Turtle, 60 years after his first visit to Raine Island. He also marvels at manta ray cleaning stations on Lady Elliot Island, and tracks dwarf minke whales to discover their surprising reasons for returning, and why the reef is vital for their survival

programme.title: Reef Wrecks
programme.desc: An exploration of shipwrecks and the ecosystems they support, beginning with those located off the coast of Bonaire, an island in the Caribbean

programme.title: David Attenboroughs First Life
programme.desc: In the first of a two-part documentary, the naturalist explores the origins of life on Earth. Beginning the journey near his childhood home in Charnwood Forest, Leicestershire, he learns how a fossil discovery transformed scientists understanding of the evolution of complex organisms, and in Newfoundland and Australia he reveals the earliest kinds of animal to exist on the planet. With the help of cutting-edge technology and visual effects, the programme brings the creatures to life, demonstrating how they survived

programme.title: David Attenboroughs First Life
programme.desc: In the conclusion of the two-part documentary, the naturalist travels to Burgess Shale in Canadas Rocky Mountains, where he explores how evolution gained pace once creatures developed mouths and mobility. In Scotland, he reveals that one of the smallest fossils found holds the secret to how animals began surviving on dry land, and explains the bloom of life during the oxygen-rich Carboniferous period

programme.title: Attenborough at 100: Behind the Lens
programme.desc: As David Attenborough turns 100, this intimate film presents new interviews, behind-the-scenes footage and extraordinary clips

programme.title: The Fast and the Furious (2001)
programme.desc: In a move to identify suspected hijackers, an undercover police officer infiltrates the high-octane world of illegal late-night street racing by rival gangs. He is befriended by a champion driver, but when he also forms a bond with the racers sister, he is pitched into a conflict of loyalties. Thriller, starring Vin Diesel, Paul Walker, Michelle Rodriguez and Jordana Brewster

programme.title: 2 Fast 2 Furious (2003)
programme.desc: A disgraced former cop is arrested by the FBI for illegal street racing, but his one-time colleagues offer him freedom in exchange for going on an undercover mission. Teaming up with an old racing friend and a customs official, he has to infiltrate and bring down a drug-trafficking operation. Thriller sequel, with Paul Walker reprising his role from The Fast and the Furious alongside Tyrese Gibson, Eva Mendes and Cole Hauser

programme.title: The Fast and the Furious: Tokyo Drift (2006)
programme.desc: An American teenager is sent to live with his father in Tokyo after a brush with the law, but soon becomes involved in illegal street racing. When he ends up owing money to gangsters after losing a race against a driver with Yakuza connections, he has to learn to master the Japanese style of driving to win and pay back his debts. Action adventure, starring Lucas Black, Nathalie Kelley and Bow Wow

programme.title: Fast and Furious (2009)
programme.desc: News of a friends murder brings international fugitive Dominic Toretto back to his home city of Los Angeles in search of revenge. It is not long before his pursuit leads him to cross paths with FBI agent Brian OConner, and despite their hostile feelings toward each other, the pair work together to bring down those responsible. Thriller sequel, starring Vin Diesel, Paul Walker, Michelle Rodriguez and Jordana Brewster

programme.title: Fast and Furious 5 (2011)
programme.desc: Criminal Dominic Toretto is broken out of prison by his partners in crime and together they flee to South America. They begin assembling a gang of crooks to carry out a heist in Rio, but the FBIs top manhunter is in the country and hot on their trail. Action adventure sequel, starring Vin Diesel, Dwayne Johnson, Paul Walker and Jordana Brewster

programme.title: Fast and Furious 6 (2013)
programme.desc: A gang of fugitives is reunited by an FBI manhunter, who offers the criminals pardons in return for their help. They must go to Europe and bring down a criminal syndicate led by a ruthless London gangster, whose right-hand woman is an old friend of theirs assumed to be dead. Action thriller sequel, with Vin Diesel, Dwayne Johnson and Michelle Rodriguez

programme.title: Fast and Furious 7 (2015)
programme.desc: After defeating Owen Shaw and his crew and securing amnesty for their past crimes, Dom, Brian and the rest of the team return home to live normal lives again. However Shaws older brother Deckard - a rogue special forces assassin vows revenge on Dom, who he holds responsible for leaving Owen in a coma. Action thriller sequel, starring Vin Diesel, Jason Statham and Paul Walker in his last film role

programme.title: Fast and Furious 8 (2017)
programme.desc: Street racing criminal Dominic Toretto is drawn out of retirement by an encounter with a ruthless cyberterrorist, who recruits him for an international criminal scheme. As he sets out to steal the technology she needs to unleash chaos on the world, he is drawn into conflict with both old enemies and his former gang. Action adventure sequel, starring Vin Diesel, Charlize Theron, Dwayne Johnson and Kurt Russell

programme.title: The Fast and the Furious (2001)

programme.title: From
programme.desc: Kenny leads a group into the forest in search of food as Donna and Ellis try to talk Boyd out of a dangerous plan. Meanwhile, Tabitha makes a mind-bending discovery. Sci-fi horror, starring Harold Perrineau

programme.title: Fantasy Island
programme.desc: A bookworm who wants to say yes to life goes back in time to meet her favourite author and a survivalist learns the ultimate challenge is something he has not trained for

programme.title: Fantasy Island
programme.desc: A young artist Ramon wants to see his mentor Jasper again, but the former teacher realises he may not have been the best influence

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Andrea orchestrates an encounter between the prison gang and the residents of Woodbury at an abandoned farm, where she hopes to turn attentions to their shared enemy - the walkers. An attack by a passing clutch of undead gives Daryl a chance to bond with his opposite number Martinez, and Hershel finds common ground with Milton, but things remain as turbulent as ever between Rick and the Governor. Post-apocalyptic drama, starring Andrew Lincoln and David Morrissey

programme.title: From
programme.desc: Boyd struggles to find a path forward as the town says farewell to one of their own, while Fatimas health takes a turn for the worse and Tabitha finds help from an unlikely ally

programme.title: Most Haunted
programme.desc: Psychic Brian Shepherd joins Yvette Fielding and the team at Morecambe Winter Gardens to see if the spirit of actress Thora Hird still lingers there

programme.title: Most Haunted
programme.desc: Yvette Fielding and the team investigate ghostly phenomena in the 19th-century military building Spitbank Fort, where a violent and unpredictable lonesome spirit is said to roam

programme.title: Most Haunted
programme.desc: Yvette Fielding and a team of investigators visit Chambercombe Manor in Devon, the former residence of Lady Jane Grey, where a previous owner once found a skeleton in a secret chamber

programme.title: Jurassic Attack (2013)
programme.desc: A group of soldiers crash land in an unfamiliar jungle which is inhabited by a group of long hidden dinosaurs. Adventure, starring Gary Stretch

programme.title: Star Trek: Enterprise
programme.desc: First-ever episode of the Star Trek spin-off, set 100 years before the original series, a time when space exploration is in its infancy. Quantum Leaps Scott Bakula stars as Captain Jonathan Archer, the original skipper of the Starship Enterprise, who leads his crew on their maiden voyage, a mission to return a wounded Klingon to his people

programme.title: Star Trek: Enterprise
programme.desc: Part two of two. Captain Archer comes face to face with Sarin, who reveals Klaang was delivering proof of a Suliban conspiracy to the high court when he was shot down. Sci-fi drama, starring Scott Bakula and Jolene Blalock

programme.title: Star Trek: Enterprise
programme.desc: The crew discovers an abandoned ship full of humanoid corpses which appear to have been the victims of scientific experiments - leaving them struggling to escape before the alien perpetrators return. Scott Bakula and Jolene Blalock star

programme.title: Star Trek: Enterprise
programme.desc: The crew excitedly forms its first landing party when an Earth-like planet is discovered but when adverse weather forces its members to take shelter in nearby caves, a strange and sudden distrust threatens to divide the team. Jolene Blalock and Connor Trinneer star

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Chakotay gets stranded on a planet with no means of communicating with Voyager. As war breaks out between two alien races, he becomes drawn into the battle for justice. Drama, starring Robert Beltran

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Janeway and the crew answer a distress signal from a nearby alien ship. The Doctor and Torres go to explore the craft resulting in a confrontation with a deadly hologram. Sci-fi drama, starring Kate Mulgrew and Robert Picardo

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Seven of Nine believes the Borg are summoning her and returns to the wrecked ship from which she was captured as a girl. Sci-fi action, starring Kate Mulgrew and Jeri Ryan

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: The crew members begin to suffer from a perplexing array of illnesses, which Seven of Nine discovers are the result of cloaked aliens secretly conducting dangerous experiments on board the ship. Sci-fi drama, starring Kate Mulgrew and Jeri Ryan

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: As the group debates the next course of action, Rick wanders after a lost friend. Meanwhile, the Governor restores order in Woodbury and makes plans to punish those responsible. Post-apocalyptic drama following the exploits of a former County Sheriff struggling to survive in the aftermath of a zombie epidemic, starring Andrew Lincoln

programme.title: Stephen Kings Needful Things (1993)
programme.desc: A mysterious antiques dealer opens a quaint shop in the small town of Castlerock, and his fascinating wares are soon the hearts desire of many of the residents. However, the stranger does not want money for his stock. Instead, the customers have to pay a higher price as he goads them into turning on one another in return for what they want. Horror, based on Stephen Kings novel, starring Ed Harris and Max von Sydow

programme.title: From
programme.desc: Tensions are at an all-time high as the town residents learn that one of their own has gone missing. Sci-fi horror, starring Harold Perrineau

programme.title: From
programme.desc: Boyd is forced to make a tough decision when newcomers arrive in town at nightfall. Victor unearths memories from the past in the hopes of finding answers. Sci-fi horror, starring Harold Perrineau and Scott McCord

programme.title: From
programme.desc: Victor must face a painful reminder of his past, Julie looks for ways to cope with her trauma, while Boyd struggles to keep the town safe as the residents begin to question his judgement. Elsewhere, Tabitha tries to adjust to her new surroundings. Sci-fi horror, starring Harold Perrineau and Catalina Sandino Moreno

programme.title: From
programme.desc: Fatima and Ellis make a big decision about her pregnancy, while Boyd fears for the future of his family. Tensions rise in the Matthews house as Randall opens up to Marielle about his fears. Sci-fi horror, starring Harold Perrineau and Catalina Sandino Moreno

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: With their security threatened, Rick and the group must make a choice. Woodbury has become a police state, making Andrea uneasy. Post-apocalyptic drama following the exploits of a former County Sheriff struggling to survive in the aftermath of a zombie epidemic. Starring Andrew Lincoln

programme.title: Most Haunted
programme.desc: Yvette Fielding, guest medium Ian Shillito and the team investigate paranormal activity at East Riddlesden Hall in Keighley, West Yorkshire

programme.title: Most Haunted
programme.desc: Yvette Fielding and a team of experts visit South Stack Lighthouse off Anglesey, where they investigate ghostly phenomena

programme.title: Most Haunted

programme.title: Arctic Armageddon (2023)
programme.desc: As global temperatures plummet, scientists must figure out a way to save humanity from entering another ice age. Sci-fi thriller, starring Patrick Labyorteaux, Joe Finfera and Lindsey Marie Wilson

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Part three of three. Tealc is forced to undergo a dangerous ritual to free his brainwashed mind from the evil Apophis. Sci-fi drama, starring Christopher Judge and Peter Williams

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Carter experiences a blackout while on a mission, and wakes to find she has been followed home by an alien - who seems altogether too friendly. Sci-fi drama, starring Amanda Tapping

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Tealc, Carter and Daniel return to Stargate Command, where they report a mysterious fifth member of SG-1 is trapped on the planet with Jack - a story that Hammond views with suspicion. Sci-fi drama, starring Richard Dean Anderson

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: The teams wormhole triggers an ecological disaster that threatens a friendly planet, and ONeill discovers its usual guardians, the Asgard, are unable to help, as offering assistance would violate a treaty with the Goauld and jeopardise other protectorates. Sci-fi drama, starring Richard Dean Anderson

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: Part one of two. Daniel Jackson of SG-1 uncovers a pointer to the whereabouts of the Lost City of the Ancients, and Dr Weir prepares her team to venture into the distant Pegasus Galaxy. When they eventually reach their goal, however, they find themselves facing a struggle for survival in a hostile and unfamiliar land. First episode of the spin-off from Stargate SG-1, starring Torri Higginson

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: Part two of two. Unable to return to Earth, Weir and the team go in search of an alternative fuel source. They come across a small settlement but receive a cold reception from the inhabitants, who live in constant fear of an approaching enemy

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: One of the Athosian children accidentally unleashes what appears to be a harmless entity during a game. However, everyone soon begins to realise the mysterious being is anything but innocuous

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: The teams ship is damaged while fleeing from the Wraith and gets stuck halfway through the Stargate, leaving the crew less than an hour to find a way of dislodging it. To make matters worse, an alien parasite attaches itself to Sheppards neck and begins to suck the life from him

programme.title: Escape from New York (1981)
programme.desc: Former special forces soldier Snake Plissken is sentenced to life on Manhattan Island, an anarchic penal colony for the most dangerous criminals. When Air Force One is hijacked and crashes there, Snake is coerced into rescuing the US president from prisoners holding him hostage. John Carpenters sci-fi action adventure, with Kurt Russell, Donald Pleasence, Lee Van Cleef, Adrienne Barbeau and Isaac Hayes

programme.title: From
programme.desc: The edges begin to fray as concerns about Fatimas pregnancy deepen. Jade follows a trail in the forest

programme.title: From
programme.desc: Accusations start flying in the aftermath of a tragedy. Victor struggles to recover memories about the towns past

programme.title: SurrealEstate
programme.desc: Drama about a real estate agency that sells haunted and possessed houses. Luke struggles to handle an engaged property, while Susan falls in love with a home with a special power

programme.title: From
programme.desc: Boyd is pushed to his limit as time begins to run out and Randall is haunted by his trauma. Sci-fi horror, starring Harold Perrineau and Catalina Sandino Moreno

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: The prison-based survivors are forced to admit they are heavily outgunned by the Woodbury faction, prompting Rick to mount a dangerous expedition to scavenge more weapons. Post-apocalyptic drama, starring Andrew Lincoln

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Andrea orchestrates an encounter between the prison gang and the residents of Woodbury at an abandoned farm, where she hopes to turn attentions to their shared enemy - the walkers. An attack by a passing clutch of undead gives Daryl a chance to bond with his opposite number Martinez, and Hershel finds common ground with Milton, but things remain as turbulent as ever between Rick and the Governor. Post-apocalyptic drama, starring Andrew Lincoln and David Morrissey

programme.title: Chicago Fire
programme.desc: Severide, Kidd and Van Meter investigate a fire at a recording studio. Kylie helps James keep a secret from Chief Boden

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: The headquarters is under serious threat when the notorious leader of a drug cartel - and one of the worlds most wanted men - is arrested and his henchmen set out to free him. During the turmoil, Isobel must make the difficult decision whether to sacrifice her conscience or her career

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: A shooting at a quinceanera leaves two people dead, but the team believes they may not have been the intended targets. Maggie is conflicted as the team decides the best plan of action for using a witness to take down their suspect. Action drama, starring Missy Peregrym

programme.title: FBI: International
programme.desc: When an American vintner is shot and killed on his wine estate in France, the Fly Team must determine if the local protest group is to blame

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: Frank contends with public outcry to defund the NYPD School Safety Division after a physical altercation between a school officer and a student goes viral. Danny and Baez help a father track down his missing family

programme.desc: Documentary following the Thames Valley Police as they use unmarked cars fitted with on-board video cameras, offering an insight into vehicle crime and how it can be prevented. The programme also features shocking footage of dangerous drivers

programme.desc: Reality series charting the work of US Customs and Border Protection agents, responsible for acting as the first line of defence for air, sea and land entry-points to the US

programme.title: Send in the Dogs
programme.desc: PC Greaves and his four-year-old German shepherd Riley track down a motorist who panicked when he saw flashing blue lights and ran off, while PC Whitaker and his dog Roscoe have to disarm a man who has a 12-inch knife. Narrated by Ken Stott

After the Springboks beat the seemingly unbeatable New Zealand All Blacks in the final, President Nelson Mandela took to the pitch in an historical moment to shake the hand of Francois Pienaar and forever unite the nation

programme.title: Birds of a Feather
programme.desc: Now that Sharon has given up work, Tracey is the only one in the house bringing in a wage, and its not nearly enough to pay the bills, so Dorien kindly offers to dip into her savings to help out. However, when she calls the bank it emerges every penny she had has been spent on legal fees. In desperation, the sisters take their old friend to a car-boot sale and sell her beloved collection of designer clothes, right down to the shoes on her feet - which are snapped up by former TOWIE star Amy Childs. Sitcom, starring Pauline Quirke, Linda Robson and Lesley Joseph

Sitcom, guest starring Clive Mantle (Casualty, Holby City) and Jamie Foreman (EastEnders Derek Branning)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

programme.desc: The story of Collin Turner, who was tragically killed by his abusive wife while he was on the phone to 911.

programme.title: Judge Judy
programme.desc: After a high-speed chase, the driver of a getaway car serves time for robbery; the Judge goes after his missing partner in crime.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: When the father of a young writer is found dead, tensions mount against the travellers in Kembleford, and the priest races to find out who actually committed the murder before one of them is wrongly sent to the gallows. Starring Mark Williams, Nathalie Buscombe and Philip McGinley

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: The Saint Marie Heritage Society is re-enacting the French invasion of the island when its president dies. At first it looks like an extreme reaction to a dodgy stew as the rest of the group have fallen ill - but when lab reports reveal there was poison in the pot, Humphrey is left wondering why the victim was the only one to end up in the mortuary. Meanwhile, Dwayne takes Humphrey out on the town to show him his own way of celebrating the founding of Saint Marie, and the DI continues to struggle with his feelings for Camille. Caribbean whodunit, guest starring David Bamber and Tyger Drew-Honey

programme.title: Hudson and Rex
programme.desc: When Sarah bumps into Charlie and Rex on a day off, Charlie recounts the first case that he and Rex ever solved together

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: After a rare humanoid skull is stolen, Murdochs investigation reveals a few suspects and a dead potential buyer

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: On Christmas Eve, Murdoch and Choi must intercept a spirited trouble-seeking drunk before his foes find him

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: The renowned Dr Katherine Talbot (Claire Goose) is slated to speak at a gathering of the League of Women Voters. Unfortunately, her presence isnt welcome by all and her impassioned speech is interrupted when a bomb explodes injuring fellow womens suffrage advocate Clara Martin and killing a mysterious man. Meanwhile, the professional tension between Murdoch and coroner Violet Hart is exacerbated by what he deems a slow investigation. Crime drama, starring Yannick Bisson

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: When a dockworker is assassinated, Murdoch pursues elusive witness Robert Parker and learns anti-union thugs may be involved. His concern is the murderer is poised to kill again if not arrested first. Crime drama, starring Yannick Bisson

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: A death at an investment event leads Crabtree to a savvy visionary who happens to be the father he never knew, but Murdoch suspects he may be culpable. Drama, with Yannick Bisson

programme.title: Miss Scarlet and the Duke
programme.desc: When a famous magician does the ultimate disappearing act and vanishes into thin air, Eliza is hired to investigate - despite the fact that Duke is already on the case

programme.title: Miss Scarlet and the Duke
programme.desc: Eliza and William go undercover after a string of crimes all point to one restaurant, and Eliza bumps into a girl who made her life a misery growing up

programme.title: Inspector George Gently
programme.desc: A schoolgirls killing brings Gently into the alien world of pop and media celebrity when it turns out the victims best friend is a rising TV star. Bacchus suspects the dead girls music teacher, since rumours persist that she was having an affair with him. But when it seems everyone has a different opinion of the girl, Gently must uncover these different faces to get to the truth of her murder. Neil Morrissey guest stars alongside Martin Shaw and Lee Ingleby

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: When the father of a young writer is found dead, tensions mount against the travellers in Kembleford, and the priest races to find out who actually committed the murder before one of them is wrongly sent to the gallows. Starring Mark Williams, Nathalie Buscombe and Philip McGinley

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: The priest and his friends find themselves stranded with a group of hedonists and are desperate to escape, fearful that their lives are in danger. Fifties-set crime drama based on the stories by GK Chesterton, starring Mark Williams as a Roman Catholic priest who attempts to solve various misdemeanours

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: A body is discovered in a vineyard and Father Brown is tasked with searching for the murderer among a group of suspects who are all seeking to reinvent themselves. Fifties-set crime drama based on the stories by GK Chesterton, starring Mark Williams and Sorcha Cusack

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: The priest becomes embroiled in an audacious art heist masterminded by his adversary Flambeau, who intends to use Father Brown and his friends to help him settle an old score. Fifties-set crime drama, starring Mark Williams

programme.title: Saint-Pierre
programme.desc: When a billionaire is found decapitated, Fitz and Arch find themselves in a classic whodunnit, looking for the killer in the victims family

programme.title: Shakespeare and Hathaway: Private Investigators

programme.title: Allegiance
programme.desc: A manhunt for two dangerous brothers, whose crimes left long-term scars on a community and a legacy of mistrust for the police, reveals regrets that still haunt Vince

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: DI Jack Mooney and the team are called to a workshop where acclaimed artist Donna Harman has been found dead. Suspicion immediately falls on the three people closest to the crime scene, but with no one entering the workshop between the time the victim returned to start on her next painting and being found dead, the scene paints a tricky picture. Only a solitary drink can seems to hold the answer, but matters are complicated when Donnas art dealer and an art collector enter the fray. Meanwhile, Jack is confused by his blossoming feelings for Anna. Whodunit, starring Ardal OHanlon, with Nina Wadia, Barbara Flynn, Louise Brealey and Vivienne Acheampong

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: Locals on the Caribbean island of Saint Marie make plans to celebrate the New Year - only for the festivities to be cut short when a masked man stabs a woman in her own home, providing Detective Inspector Jack Mooney and his team with yet another murder to solve. Ardal OHanlon stars as the Irish detective, with guest appearances by Adrian Edmondson, Nina Wadia and Samuel West

programme.title: Shakespeare and Hathaway: Private Investigators
programme.desc: Lu infiltrates a local slimming club to discover their secrets, but gets more than she bargained for when she realises her sister is a member. Mark Benton and Jo Joyner star

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: DI Jack Mooney and the team are called to a workshop where acclaimed artist Donna Harman has been found dead. Suspicion immediately falls on the three people closest to the crime scene, but with no one entering the workshop between the time the victim returned to start on her next painting and being found dead, the scene paints a tricky picture. Only a solitary drink can seems to hold the answer, but matters are complicated when Donnas art dealer and an art collector enter the fray. programme.title: Mediterranean with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: A journey around the region, examining the challenges currently facing the nations in the area. Simon begins in Malta, uncovering the countrys reputation for organised crime, before moving on to the southern coast of Italy, where he joins police officers exploring underground tunnels used by crime bosses on the run. Finally, he arrives in Albania and discovers an ancient tradition of revenge where children can pay the price for their parents actions

programme.title: Mediterranean with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: Simon explores the eastern Mediterranean, beginning in Cyprus, where he goes on patrol with UN peacekeepers overseeing an abandoned buffer zone. He moves on to Lebanon, where he discovers the roots of Christianity, and Israel, where he boards a navy vessel guarding the countrys offshore oil reserves. Finally, he crosses the worlds most heavily fortified borders into Gaza, where he meets a woman helping reconstruction efforts by making bricks into ash

programme.title: Mortimer and Whitehouse: Gone Fishing

programme.desc: Sandra reopens an investigation into the suspected suicide of a Foreign Office diplomat, whose body was found in a frozen London lake after she had suffered the personal tragedy of a miscarriage and the professional embarrassment of having a government laptop stolen from her home. The womans fiance and twin sister both believe her death is connected to sensitive information held on the missing computer and blame her boss for her downfall - and when Sandra clashes with the man himself, it only makes her more determined to pursue the conspiracy theory, despite Stricklands advice to tread carefully. Simon Day and Sharon Small guest star

programme.desc: Sandra reopens an investigation into the suspected suicide of a Foreign Office diplomat, whose body was found in a frozen London lake after she had suffered the personal tragedy of a miscarriage and the professional embarrassment of having a government laptop stolen from her home. The womans fiance and twin sister both believe her death is connected to sensitive information held on the missing computer and blame her boss for her downfall - and when Sandra clashes with the man himself, it only makes her more determined to pursue the conspiracy theory, despite Stricklands advice to tread carefully. Simon Day and Sharon Small guest star

programme.title: New Tricks
programme.desc: Retired detective Steve McAndrew arrives from Glasgow to help reinvestigate one of his original cases when a missing girls DNA is found at the scene of a petrol station robbery in Clapham, south London. Its clear that the inquiry is a very personal one for McAndrew, and although his personality rubs the team up the wrong way, his methods soon pay dividends. Denis Lawson stars

programme.title: Signora Volpe
programme.desc: Sylvia takes on a freelance job for MI6: undercover at a beautiful villa by Lake Trasimeno, tasked with keeping watch on a controversial South American politician

programme.title: The Brokenwood Mysteries
programme.desc: While a visiting theatrical troupe puts on a nativity play at St. Judas, a precious holy relic goes missing, and the actor playing Jesus is killed

programme.title: Monsieur Spade
programme.desc: Set in 1963 in the sun-drenched south of France, Clive Owen stars as iconic detective Sam Spade, who has swapped gritty San Francisco for a peaceful life - until that calm is violently disrupted. Spade arrives in Bozouls and falls for a vineyard owner. Years later, he remains, a widower living out his golden years in peace. However, the return of an adversary changes everything.

programme.title: The Last Detective
programme.desc: Comedy drama series from A Touch of Frost writer Richard Harris. Detective Constable Dangerous Davies is an obstinate traditionalist used to being given bottom-of-the-pile jobs at his north London station until a routine inquiry offers him a lead in a 20-year-old unsolved murder case. Enlisting the help of his eccentric drinking buddy Mod Lewis, the mild-mannered detective sets out to prove himself to his colleagues. Peter Davison and Sean Hughes star

programme.title: Call the Midwife
programme.desc: Lucille treats an elderly hoarder (Annette Crosbie) suffering from a malodorous leg ulcer, and fears that living surrounded by towering piles of rubbish, books and tins of food will have a serious effect on her recovery. Sister Hilda has a challenging case on her hands when a family newly arrived from Ghana are found to be suffering from an unidentified illness, and Violet runs for a place on the local council, but Fred is not convinced she can make a difference to the community, placing more faith in the Civil Defence Corps

programme.title: Sister Boniface Mysteries
programme.desc: A skeleton found buried in Edie Paigntons allotment is difficult for Sister Boniface to identify as male or female. Paigntons husband has disappeared, as has Frank Harsdens pregnant daughter Jenny. More tests by Sister Boniface reveal the victim had been murdered with a cultivator and buried in a caustic soda mixture.

programme.title: Queens of Mystery
programme.desc: Mattie is close to finding the identity of the killer, but there are other parties, much closer to home, whod prefer Matilda not to disturb too many secrets

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: The Bill
programme.desc: Hagen goes undercover as chauffeuse to the leader of a vice ring - but her crisis of confidence in the aftermath of the Santini trial threatens to blow her cover. Samantha Robson stars

programme.title: The Bill
programme.desc: The escape of a dangerous prisoner ensures that DC Webbs first night duty turns out to be something of a baptism of fire. Chris Simmons stars

programme.title: The Bill
programme.desc: Holmes follows a case of suspected money laundering, while Beechs shady past comes back to haunt him when a former girlfriend is hit by a car

programme.title: The Bill
programme.desc: Part one of two. Brownlow and Mannion must uncover the truth behind a claim that an officer disobeyed orders during a riot

programme.title: The Bill
programme.desc: Webb and Holmes are bemused by Lennoxs strange behaviour. Chris Simmons, Joy Brook and George Rossi star

programme.title: Call the Midwife
programme.desc: Lucille treats an elderly hoarder (Annette Crosbie) suffering from a malodorous leg ulcer, and fears that living surrounded by towering piles of rubbish, books and tins of food will have a serious effect on her recovery. Sister Hilda has a challenging case on her hands when a family newly arrived from Ghana are found to be suffering from an unidentified illness, and Violet runs for a place on the local council, but Fred is not convinced she can make a difference to the community, placing more faith in the Civil Defence Corps

programme.title: Call the Midwife
programme.desc: Valerie helps mother of five Betty come to terms with her sixth childs birth defect. The Turners oversee a measles vaccination trial at the clinic, but are concerned by an overly anxious first-time mother. They soon discover she is concealing a devastating loss, which could have serious repercussions. Nurse Crane decides to bring a taste of the seaside to Poplar for the Whitsun bank holiday, and Violets political career goes from strength to strength as she wins the seat on the council for Poplar North

programme.title: Catherine Cooksons The Man Who Cried
programme.desc: Feature-length period drama about Abel Mason, an ordinary working man whose extramarital affair leads to murder, and prompts him to hit the road with his son in search of a new life. The pair head north and Abel eventually finds employment with a wealthy garage owner. Ciaran Hinds and Kate Buffery star

programme.title: Campion
programme.sub-title: Death of a Ghost - Part One
programme.desc: Part one of two. Albert decides to get away from it all and visits old friend Belle Lafcadio, a rich art collector - but it isnt long before hes forced to team up with Oates to solve a murder. Drama series based on Margery Allinghams stories, starring Peter Davison

programme.title: Campion
programme.sub-title: Death of a Ghost - Part Two
programme.desc: Part two of two. An art exhibition featuring the work of a dead artist is disrupted when two bodies are found in the gallery. When Albert investigates, he and his colleagues are shocked by the identity of one of the deceased. Drama series based on Margery Allinghams stories, starring Peter Davison

programme.title: Harry Wild
programme.desc: The literary influenced killing of a heckler during a guided tour brings Harry and Fergus into the middle of a literature-themed murder plot

programme.title: Silent Witness
programme.desc: Feature-length episode. Father and son Bill and Frankie McAteer are killed in an apparent car accident on their way home from work at Billingsgate Market, but Nikki and Jack arrive to discover the younger mans body is riddled with bullets. Back at the Lyell centre, Clarissa summons her husband Max, a digital forensics expert, to help crack the case - and he uncovers disturbing video evidence showing a sexual encounter between Frankie, his girlfriend Becky and best friend Liam. Crime drama, starring Emilia Fox

programme.title: New Tricks
programme.desc: The veteran detectives investigate the murder of a palaeontologist at the Natural History Museum, discovering the victim was a respected but outspoken scientist with a knack for rubbing people up the wrong way. When it comes out he was strongly opposed to the museums sponsorship deal with a large fuel company, the cops soon have plenty of suspects. Amanda Redman stars, with guest appearances by Trevor Bannister, Lucy Brown and Natasha Little

programme.title: The Brokenwood Mysteries
programme.desc: Mike, Kristin, and Chalmers must determine who wanted a veterinary nurse dead, with the answer seemingly tied to simmering tensions between the twin sisters with whom the victim worked

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: The Two Ronnies
programme.desc: Ronnie Corbett and Ronnie Barker star in a festive edition of their celebrated comedy show, first aired in 1984. West End star Elaine Paige joins in the sketches, jokes and songs, featuring the Ballad of Snivelling and Grudge and A Film Story with Peter Wyngarde as Sir Guy. Patrick Troughton and John Owens also appear

programme.title: Red Dwarf
programme.desc: Lister and the Cat are horrified when Rimmer duplicates himself, but their shock turns to hilarity when the identically petty pair move in together, only to find they are not very well matched. Chris Barrie, Craig Charles and Danny John-Jules star

programme.title: Red Dwarf
programme.desc: First-ever episode of the sci-fi comedy series. After three million years in suspended animation, Dave Lister awakes to find hes the last surviving member of the human race, with only a mutated cat and a hologram of his least favourite crewmate for company. Craig Charles and Chris Barrie star

programme.title: Red Dwarf
programme.desc: The ship exceeds the speed of light, allowing the crew to see echoes of future events, but while Rimmer gets a pleasant surprise, Lister is shocked to see what appears to be his own violent death. Sci-fi comedy, starring Chris Barrie, Craig Charles and Danny John-Jules

programme.title: Red Dwarf
programme.desc: Lister yearns for intelligent conversation with people he actually likes, but with only Rimmer for company, he is forced to take desperate action - sitting the chefs exam. Sci-fi comedy, starring Chris Barrie, Craig Charles and Norman Lovett

programme.title: Red Dwarf
programme.desc: Rimmer is sent into a frenzy of scientific research when Holly recovers an unidentified pod floating in space, which the hologram is convinced is of alien origin. Meanwhile, Lister is thrilled to discover he was regarded as a god by Cats people until he finds out what has been done in his name. Comedy, starring Chris Barrie, Danny John-Jules, Craig Charles and Norman Lovett

programme.title: Red Dwarf
programme.desc: Lister comes down with a mutated strain of pneumonia that makes his feverish hallucinations come to life. Some of them turn out to be very tricky customers indeed, and wage a war over control of the patients mind. Sci-fi comedy, starring Chris Barrie, Craig Charles and Craig Ferguson

programme.title: River Walks
programme.desc: Zoologist and broadcaster Miranda Krestovnikoff walks along the Deben in Suffolk, from Sutton Hoo, famous for its archaeological treasures, to Ramsholt Quay on the coast. Along the way she passes salt marshes, tidal lagoons and wooded groves, exploring the rivers history and wildlife and meeting people whose lives are shaped by it

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Great Canal Journeys
programme.desc: Timothy West and Prunella Scales return to Wales to explore a canal that has eluded them for more than half a century. The Monmouthshire and Brecon canal is cut off from the rest of Britains network of waterways by the Black Mountains, and meanders its way through the tranquil Usk valley. Along the way the couple visit the old ironworks at Blaenavon, where children as young as five were once put to work, and lend a hand with some lock restoration work. They also explore the castle at Tretower - which is rumoured to be haunted

programme.title: Great Canal Journeys
programme.desc: Timothy West and Prunella Scales travel down the River Nile from Luxor to Aswan. Tim has some misgivings about attempting such a daring journey, but is won over by Prus desire for fresh adventure. They discover how travel along the river was vital to the ancient Egyptian civilisation, and discover how the first ever canals were constructed nearby to ferry building materials for the temple at Karnak. Along the way, they visit a Nubian village, purchase aphrodisiacs in a souk, and dance by moonlight

programme.title: Great Canal Journeys
programme.desc: Timothy West and Prunella Scales explore the Naviglio Grande Canal in Italy, which runs from Lake Maggiore to Milan and is Europes oldest working canal, providing passage for marble-carrying barges for over 500 years. Along the way, they stop at the Swiss lakeside town of Locarno, the gardens of Isola Bella, and Milans most famous cathedral, as well as learning a traditional Italian barging song

programme.title: Great Canal Journeys
programme.desc: Timothy West and Prunella Scales explore the waterways of North-West England, from the suburbs of Manchester, through Britains first purpose-built canal, to the port at Ellesmere. They discover how canals played a vital role in transforming Britain during the Industrial Revolution, and have subsequently become a central point of Manchesters gay community

programme.title: Great Canal Journeys
programme.desc: Timothy West and Prunella Scales return to Wales to explore a canal that has eluded them for more than half a century. The Monmouthshire and Brecon canal is cut off from the rest of Britains network of waterways by the Black Mountains, and meanders its way through the tranquil Usk valley. Along the way the couple visit the old ironworks at Blaenavon, where children as young as five were once put to work, and lend a hand with some lock restoration work. programme.title: Thailand: Earths Tropical Paradise
programme.desc: Exploring the wildlife and culture of the Southeast Asian nation. The first episode examines the south of the country, a popular tourist destination for Westerners, and examines the role of spirituality in daily life. Narrated by Sophie Okonedo

programme.title: Thailand: Earths Tropical Paradise
programme.desc: In central Thailands forests, fertile plains and even its city streets, nature finds a way of living alongside people, and spirituality can be found in human and animal relationships, both likely and unlikely. This bustling region is known as the nations rice bowl - but even here, there are magical places to be found. Narrated by Sophie Okonedo

programme.title: Thailand: Earths Tropical Paradise
programme.desc: The mountains and forests of northern Thailand, an area that is home to a variety of wildlife, leading to unusual partnerships developing between animals and people. Narrated by Sophie Okonedo

programme.title: Patagonia: Earths Secret Paradise
programme.desc: A glimpse at the rarely seen South American wilderness, home to a range of creatures from terrain as varied as the Andes to Cape Horn. Cameras reveal the secret lives of pumas and hummingbirds, soar with condors over glacial peaks and explore monkey puzzle forests dating back to the time of the dinosaurs. The extreme kayakers who gain thrills and excitement from traversing the areas raging waterfalls are observed, as are the native cowboys, known as gauchos, as they round up wild horses. Narrated by Santiago Cabrera

Along the way the couple visit the old ironworks at Blaenavon, where children as young as five were once put to work, and lend a hand with some lock restoration work. They also explore the castle at Tretower - which is rumoured to be haunted

programme.title: Great Canal Journeys
programme.desc: Timothy West and Prunella Scales travel down the River Nile from Luxor to Aswan. Tim has some misgivings about attempting such a daring journey, but is won over by Prus desire for fresh adventure. They discover how travel along the river was vital to the ancient Egyptian civilisation, and discover how the first ever canals were constructed nearby to ferry building materials for the temple at Karnak. Along the way, they visit a Nubian village, purchase aphrodisiacs in a souk, and dance by moonlight

programme.title: Great Canal Journeys
programme.desc: Timothy West and Prunella Scales explore the Naviglio Grande Canal in Italy, which runs from Lake Maggiore to Milan and is Europes oldest working canal, providing passage for marble-carrying barges for over 500 years. Along the way, they stop at the Swiss lakeside town of Locarno, the gardens of Isola Bella, and Milans most famous cathedral, as well as learning a traditional Italian barging song

programme.title: Great Canal Journeys
programme.desc: Timothy West and Prunella Scales explore the waterways of North-West England, from the suburbs of Manchester, through Britains first purpose-built canal, to the port at Ellesmere. They discover how canals played a vital role in transforming Britain during the Industrial Revolution, and have subsequently become a central point of Manchesters gay community

programme.title: Great Canal Journeys
programme.desc: Timothy West and Prunella Scales return to Wales to explore a canal that has eluded them for more than half a century. The Monmouthshire and Brecon canal is cut off from the rest of Britains network of waterways by the Black Mountains, and meanders its way through the tranquil Usk valley. programme.desc: Timothy West and Prunella Scales travel down the River Nile from Luxor to Aswan. Along the way, they visit a Nubian village, purchase aphrodisiacs in a souk, and dance by moonlight

programme.title: Thailand: Earths Tropical Paradise
programme.desc: Exploring the wildlife and culture of the Southeast Asian nation. The first episode examines the south of the country, a popular tourist destination for Westerners, and examines the role of spirituality in daily life. Narrated by Sophie Okonedo

programme.title: Thailand: Earths Tropical Paradise
programme.desc: In central Thailands forests, fertile plains and even its city streets, nature finds a way of living alongside people, and spirituality can be found in human and animal relationships, both likely and unlikely. This bustling region is known as the nations rice bowl - but even here, there are magical places to be found. Narrated by Sophie Okonedo

programme.title: Thailand: Earths Tropical Paradise
programme.desc: The mountains and forests of northern Thailand, an area that is home to a variety of wildlife, leading to unusual partnerships developing between animals and people. Narrated by Sophie Okonedo

programme.title: Patagonia: Earths Secret Paradise
programme.desc: A glimpse at the rarely seen South American wilderness, home to a range of creatures from terrain as varied as the Andes to Cape Horn. Cameras reveal the secret lives of pumas and hummingbirds, soar with condors over glacial peaks and explore monkey puzzle forests dating back to the time of the dinosaurs. The extreme kayakers who gain thrills and excitement from traversing the areas raging waterfalls are observed, as are the native cowboys, known as gauchos, as they round up wild horses. Narrated by Santiago Cabrera

programme.desc: Vintage comedy from Messrs Barker and Corbett, including a man getting more than he bargained for when he goes in search of McClearys Gold

programme.title: Still Open All Hours
programme.desc: Granville organises a cut-price sale - but only as a means to get rid of old stock - while Nurse Gladys is reunited with a former patient. Romance is in the air in the neighbourhood, as Mrs Featherstone has her eye on a new arrival while Mavis tries to reignite Granvilles passion over a cup of coffee

programme.title: Not Going Out
programme.desc: Lucy accidentally runs over a pet rabbit belonging to the daughter of an important client, so she needs someone to help cover her tracks. Unfortunately, the best people she has are Lee and Daisy. Comedy, starring Lee Mack, Sally Bretton and Katy Wix

programme.title: Not Going Out
programme.desc: Tim becomes part of a band at work and Lucy falls for the lead guitarist. In a fit of jealousy, Lee decides to follow his best friends example and try his hand at the rock n roll lifestyle. Comedy, starring Tim Vine, Sally Bretton and Lee Mack

programme.title: Ever Decreasing Circles
programme.desc: Martin takes on the bureaucracy of office politics when he discovers his work space has been cut in half. Comedy, starring Richard Briers

programme.title: Ghosts
programme.desc: Mike and Alison receive a life-changing offer beyond their wildest dreams. Still reeling from the news, and anxious to discuss it, they are interrupted by a heartbroken Obi, who has been suddenly dumped by a strangely callous Brenda. Alison and Mike agree to reconvene with lists of pros and cons. At first, Obis romantic woes find a sympathetic ear in eternally lovelorn Thomas, but even he tires of Obis self-pity. Meanwhile Alison must fend off the Ghosts, desperate to sway her decision

programme.title: Almas Not Normal
programme.desc: Alma bags herself a talent agent and lands an acting role that turns out to be completely demoralising. Meanwhile, Lin is back in hospital and has discovered a penchant for witchcraft, while Almas best mate Leanne has transformed a truck into a bar thats become Boltons biggest hot-spot. Comedy, written by and starring Sophie Willan, with Jayde Adams, Lorraine Ashbourne and Siobhan Finneran

programme.title: Ghosts
programme.desc: Christmas is just around the corner and Mikes mum Betty is staying - and testing Mike and Alisons patience with her interfering ways. Theres no easy way to ask her to go home so the couple - and the ghosts - struggle on, with Button House feeling fuller than ever. Now a convert, Robin is missing that all-important Christmassy feeling, so the gang members share their secrets to getting into the festive spirit - but when even more decorations and merry music dont do the trick, the ghosts wonder if Robin will be able to capture that Christmas magic again

programme.title: Men Behaving Badly
programme.desc: Gary sells one of Dorothys records when Tony identifies it as a valuable collectors item - but struggles to find a replacement when she asks where it has gone

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Only Fools and Horses
programme.desc: Del encounters an old flame from almost 20 years previously, and Rodney experiences the joys of dating - but the brothers soon face awkward questions from the past. David Jason and Nicholas Lyndhurst star, with Diane Langton (The Rag Trade)

programme.title: Only Fools and Horses
programme.desc: Del and Rodney mourn Grandads death, and feel gratified to see such a good turn-out of friends and relatives at his funeral - even if most people are more interested in the food afterwards. However, one of the guests, a certain long-lost seafaring uncle, ends up outstaying his welcome. Long-running comedy, introducing Buster Merryfield to the cast as Uncle Albert

programme.title: Only Fools and Horses
programme.desc: Uncle Albert has a nasty fall into the cellar at the Nags Head, but turns his injury into a profit-making opportunity - eagerly egged on by wheeler-dealer Del-Boy. Vintage comedy, starring David Jason, Nicholas Lyndhurst and Buster Merryfield

programme.title: Only Fools and Horses
programme.desc: Feature-length episode. Del-Boy embarks on a new romance with Raquel, an actress he meets through a computer dating agency, while Rodney takes Nervous Nerys out for a burn in the three-wheeler - but as ever with the Peckham twosome, nothing goes quite according to plan. Christmas special from 1988, starring David Jason, Nicholas Lyndhurst and Tessa Peake-Jones

programme.title: Only Fools and Horses
programme.desc: Rodney aspires to be a pop star, taking on the role of the drumless drummer in Mental Mickeys band but, not surprisingly, Del-Boy manages to ruin his chances. With a guest appearance by DJ Mike Read, alongside David Jason and Nicholas Lyndhurst

programme.title: Almas Not Normal
programme.desc: Alma decides its time to start focusing on herself and her career so she joins a stand-up comedy course run by her old acting teacher Ian, who is now a comedian and global star after one of his videos went viral. Meanwhile, Joan receives news that her mother Alice has died and her estranged siblings gather to plan the funeral. Guest starring Steve Pemberton and Julie Hesmondhalgh

programme.title: Men Behaving Badly
programme.desc: Gary goes to the pub to drown his sorrows, so Dermot invites Deborah to their flat for a romantic evening of candlelight, dinner and music. Laddish comedy, starring Harry Enfield and Martin Clunes

programme.desc: Del pays a stripper to attend a party at the Nags Head with Rodney, who has been bet by Mickey Pearce that he cannot find a date for the occasion. Comedy, starring David Jason and Nicholas Lyndhurst

programme.desc: Granvilles idea to open a new catering arm, offering his customers tasty toasties, doesnt quite go according to plan when his reconditioned toaster blows a fuse. However, one of the guests, a certain long-lost seafaring uncle, ends up outstaying his welcome. Long-running comedy, introducing Buster Merryfield to the cast as Uncle Albert

programme.title: Only Fools and Horses
programme.desc: Uncle Albert has a nasty fall into the cellar at the Nags Head, but turns his injury into a profit-making opportunity - eagerly egged on by wheeler-dealer Del-Boy. Vintage comedy, starring David Jason, Nicholas Lyndhurst and Buster Merryfield

programme.title: Only Fools and Horses
programme.desc: Feature-length episode. Del-Boy embarks on a new romance with Raquel, an actress he meets through a computer dating agency, while Rodney takes Nervous Nerys out for a burn in the three-wheeler - but as ever with the Peckham twosome, nothing goes quite according to plan. Christmas special from 1988, starring David Jason, Nicholas Lyndhurst and Tessa Peake-Jones

programme.title: Only Fools and Horses
programme.desc: Rodney aspires to be a pop star, taking on the role of the drumless drummer in Mental Mickeys band but, not surprisingly, Del-Boy manages to ruin his chances. With a guest appearance by DJ Mike Read, alongside David Jason and Nicholas Lyndhurst

programme.title: Only Fools and Horses
programme.desc: Del encounters an old flame from almost 20 years previously, and Rodney experiences the joys of dating - but the brothers soon face awkward questions from the past. David Jason and Nicholas Lyndhurst star, with Diane Langton (The Rag Trade)

programme.title: Open All Hours

programme.desc: Arkwright decides Granville needs toughening up and starts dragging him around the store by his ear, but the regular customers are unhappy by what they see

programme.title: Harry Enfield and Chums
programme.desc: Comedy sketches with the popular funnyman, featuring Kevin and Perry, Wayne and Waynetta Slob and the Self-Righteous Brothers. With special guests Desmond Lynam, Jimmy Hill and Martin Clunes

programme.title: Harry Enfield and Chums

programme.title: Ghosts
programme.desc: Christmas is just around the corner and Mikes mum Betty is staying - and testing Mike and Alisons patience with her interfering ways. Theres no easy way to ask her to go home so the couple - and the ghosts - struggle on, with Button House feeling fuller than ever. Now a convert, Robin is missing that all-important Christmassy feeling, so the gang members share their secrets to getting into the festive spirit - but when even more decorations and merry music dont do the trick, the ghosts wonder if Robin will be able to capture that Christmas magic again

programme.title: Almas Not Normal
programme.desc: Alma bags herself a talent agent and lands an acting role that turns out to be completely demoralising. Meanwhile, Lin is back in hospital and has discovered a penchant for witchcraft, while Almas best mate Leanne has transformed a truck into a bar thats become Boltons biggest hot-spot. Comedy, written by and starring Sophie Willan, with Jayde Adams, Lorraine Ashbourne and Siobhan Finneran

programme.desc: Granvilles idea to open a new catering arm, offering his customers tasty toasties, doesnt quite go according to plan when his reconditioned toaster blows a fuse. Leroy and Willis meet Beth and Ruby with a view to going on a date, but Willis is worried that Rubys not right for him. David Jason, James Baxter, Johnny Vegas and Geoffrey Whitehead star in veteran writer Roy Clarkes much-loved comedy

programme.desc: Arkwright is reluctant to buy a new suit until Nurse Gladys Emmanuel persuades him to. He agrees, but only if I can be made in the same style as his old one. Roy Clarkes classic comedy, starring Ronnie Barker, David Jason and Lynda Baron

programme.title: Not Going Out
programme.desc: Lee Macks not having much luck with lights these days, whether its the fizzling sign at the start of this show, the blackout during his recent Sheffield gig, or the dimly lit area at the start of this seventh series. Lee and Lucy have enjoyed a spot of culture at their local cinema, but the sparkle of a French movie is soon diminished when the romantic walk home finds them in an imposing underpass. She has her handbag stolen by a bunch of cocky youths from under his nose. Given the fact the layabout failed to protect her, or come up with an accurate description of their muggers, Lee feels the urge to prove his manliness, but will a spell at the local boxing ring be a help or a hindrance? Sally Bretton and Katy Wix also star

programme.title: Not Going Out
programme.desc: Lucy announces that she plans to marry Pavlov, a mechanic from the old Eastern bloc who needs her help to stay in the country and avoid returning to his tragic life back home. However, Lee is the only one who seems to object to the arrangement. Comedy, starring Lee Mack, Sally Bretton, Tim Vine and Timothy West

programme.title: Harry Enfield and Chums
